name: Greg Lopez
subject: Reminder: Caucus Begins This Week!
body:
Magnify Your Voice, #LopezListens
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| It's Caucus Time!
---
|
---
Friend,
Caucus week is upon us and is happening all across Colorado! We hope you plan to participate in the process. You may Pre-Register [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s--iIr4TEoExA6tv2lsBz9iHamtnDGRdAttiygCfP_NSmlmnPzcrtSmWuETXZLyJpXC7lkl3Ua5BgrPOxtFvihNkSxZttIo6dq19pNXDPH0hwXnXtJFyZomVnnPhOmX2q5llDoKrOjLzTIb6Iil9Nw==&c=KYWs1JuRyWMXDAZCLQMajRJBFTDJPrhQTYxQAeHhrtPrLWjz8mWa_w==&ch=k2dtNQYD3pKU2YW8RqQ1bvLhAviA3BZ1rkVs5MYBlpnW5WrWehGsCg==).
---
| |
---
Your county is holding Caucus on Tuesday, March 1 unless otherwise listed below:
---
---
| | [Find Your County GOP Website HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s--iIr4TEoExA6tv2lsBz9iHamtnDGRdAttiygCfP_NSmlmnPzcrtSmWuETXZLyJ-WfC3PXJmTYtm_esD9kG36iTPQD9jNsY1gbRxzHL950Qsi9bqO2zmGzCsqAes_67P2t9duwnh9ESSqpioe0s9BB7DaUPX3ez3GbPrcnXMdw=&c=KYWs1JuRyWMXDAZCLQMajRJBFTDJPrhQTYxQAeHhrtPrLWjz8mWa_w==&ch=k2dtNQYD3pKU2YW8RqQ1bvLhAviA3BZ1rkVs5MYBlpnW5WrWehGsCg==)
---
| |
---
Why Should I Attend Caucus?
---
At Caucus, you will become a Precinct Committee Person (PCP) who:
* Works Local Neighborhoods for Get Out The Vote (GOTV).
* Votes on Party Bylaw Changes.
* Elects District Captains.
* Elects County Party Officers.
* Elect to become a County Delegate.

---
| |
---
Why Should I Attend County Assembly on March 19th?
---
As a County Delegate at Assembly you will be able to:
* Vote on which County-wide Candidate appears on the June Primary Ballot.
* Vote on various resolutions to be added to the State Party Platform.
* Elect to become a State Delegate (4,743) or Alternates (4,738).

---
| |
---
Why Should I Attend State Assembly on April 9th?
---
As a State Delegate, you will be able to:
* Vote for Candidates for Secretary of State, State Treasurer, Attorney General, At-Large State Board of Education, U.S. Senate, and
* Most Importantly...

...Vote for Greg Lopez to be your Governor Candidate in the June Primary to face and defeat Jared Polis in November!
---
| |
---
Be the change we have been waiting for. Become a delegate and vote for the best conservative candidates at all office levels including me, Greg Lopez, for Governor!
---
---
|
---
To win Colorado, it's going to take all of us chipping
---
| | [Donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s--iIr4TEoExA6tv2lsBz9iHamtnDGRdAttiygCfP_NSmlmnPzcrtaFO8AQmu1zlLzVZxv2gskHaBX5Q9LrX-nypvMtPKL961B45hdBE1ZmvOMNOqsjy8DEeSLWjZagmj6-lc7CotFUM-TuqsGvwUdO3w2O6fh0U&c=KYWs1JuRyWMXDAZCLQMajRJBFTDJPrhQTYxQAeHhrtPrLWjz8mWa_w==&ch=k2dtNQYD3pKU2YW8RqQ1bvLhAviA3BZ1rkVs5MYBlpnW5WrWehGsCg==)

Join us. We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, in 2022, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that's one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
---

Let’s make sure we build on the momentum. | GEORGIA SENATE POLLING: WALKER 49% - Warnock 48% This is urgent, Fellow American. The latest polling shows we're leading this critical Senate race in Georgia by just one point. You have been one of our most loyal supporters since launching our campaign, and we need your help again. Polling shows we cannot afford to let up - not even for one day. Our opponent knows the race is a dead heat, so he's already spending millions on his first advertising blitzes when we're still 8 months before the election! This poll has already fired up the Democrats in Washington, who are determined to do whatever it takes to hold their Senate majority. Let's win! name: Shelby Baioni
subject: MEDIA RELEASE: Brice Wiggins Sets Sights on Congress with Qualifying Deadline Now Behind Him
body:
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **Media Contact:** **Shelby Baioni** **sbaioni@focusgroupms.com** **(228) 325-2954**
* * *
**Brice Wiggins Sets Sights on Congress with Qualifying Deadline Now Behind Him** **_For photos accompanying this release along with a Word document version, visit:_** [_https://www.dropbox.com/sh/9bek2vxpax5exly/AACcZICRtvPHhIGmNpp6tOIqa?dl=0_](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUfZK2EragSb2mWFHFGGdD-2BYKetYUY8nwJB9RiJm-2BQzde8NiAHFRZpuIjR3t1jUkRAwp1cdidsZ8z1ZUwiZ2f7mrtiVSKJbo2RIfG4GQM-2BFSFWCEO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlLnNmcwI3cpmyAhVdDVAFyfwGco8VQR4LWnFCd4EGoiM-2BlIgBrCt-2BUH4WLQveha5B650UPTGoBlyqTIB6jVIN0vBsT-2BmePP8PsaPN6P5kdXUg4UQ-2FsDG0SfwskcJpjUifo7-2FcWqnTP8UZT2B-2FHKnQZA-3D) **March 1, 2022 PASCAGOULA, Miss.** – The deadline to qualify for Mississippi’s 2022 4th Congressional District race passed at 5 p.m. today. State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula), who recently qualified, now has his sights set on the June 7 primary election. "As of today, the field of candidates is set. I’ve traveled the 4th District, from the Pine Belt to the Coast. I’ve talked to many people and have heard common concerns from most everyone,” said Wiggins. “D.C. is self-centered and out of touch. Spending is out of control. Inflation is on the rise. Leadership, vision, availability and accountability from the current representative for South Mississippi are non-existent or ineffective.” Wiggins has the experience to hit the ground running from day one. A former prosecutor and current Chairman of the State Senate Judiciary A Committee and Appropriations Committee member, Wiggins gets things done. In 10 years, he has authored and passed bills written to improve the lives of all Mississippians, and now he wants to take this same drive, energy and proven effectiveness to serve our state in Congress. Wiggins’s accomplishments at the state level include authoring and passing Mississippi's first early education initiative, the Early Learning Collaborative Act, resulting in Mississippi being recognized as a Top 5 state in the country in early childhood education. In the area of criminal prosecution, Brice authored and passed the “Lonnie Smith Act,” which strengthened Mississippi’s child abuse laws and “Katie’s Law” allowing for DNA collection after violent felony arrests. To learn more about Brice’s results, [Read His Full Bio Here](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUXB2bjRzdfCVjWiR-2BpeqL-2BaBBzXhWYqi-2BAk8VLNrJ0-2Bx7Z8D-2FTcHgS-2BmfYLwOlMNUw-3D-3DJkB9_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlMbR8MD8DKIz4d6ZwVtfBkrGUG4eW4d899E4-2B0janDAV5i75rufsmnZNj3rLtksW6d7vaBg-2F3qmm50Ae2GWZfbqkw8UMPj6Q4dfNnZCq3DCnaBejwDO525Kvj3kTK7D1tKGZ6Wwv-2BLtLsW9Sp7Wc7sE-3D). “The citizens of the 4th District are proud of where we live and what we can be. But our current voice in Congress doesn’t match the strength and vitality of this region,” said Wiggins. “We need real leadership -- someone to stand and fight for South Mississippi and our values. I’m the candidate with the experience, fortitude and credibility to get things done from day one.” “In these remaining few weeks of the legislative session, I will be working very hard for the people of my State Senate district. And then I look forward to this next phase of our campaign. I hope to meet as many people in the 4th District as possible before June 7,” said Wiggins. “We welcome everyone to join us in this great effort on behalf of South Mississippi. Just visit our website at [bricewiggins.ms.](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUXB2bjRzdfCVjWiR-2BpeqL-2BYc-2FKfa42zwRAyjnTXkXaZ2EGKH_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlGb9-2FFsEjb-2FTd0Xsnp7-2BdU7qFkwUSc8C3qhJtDFOoxf84n5AtKsQn39I9mWAflrvtNZj03cyk0DpLkfBiwvzl-2FVFxJTPX0RR6bm5jugt6Qtwu0VS7zJHXFVrNQmowyn3knkh3aFECt0GfFgMYofkNV4-3D)” To learn more, volunteer, donate or otherwise support the campaign, visit [bricewiggins.ms.](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUXB2bjRzdfCVjWiR-2BpeqL-2BYc-2FKfa42zwRAyjnTXkXaZ2SHf2_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlI3Fbs9lvgsonKWsP7qsu2PBQ6mbr9RyUqbQP3Jy7oHWGLGcCPPyi5Ndxh2W33BJ-2Be0YAsgKV7uli6p9OTIcpI4CnDZFsVSjl9t-2FaGGslCyYksCTN25-2B-2FMbjehepnAjD7F2X0uoN0cos-2BWMKHlsoqP4-3D) Follow the campaign on these social media platforms. [Facebook](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUb8Hzhz9hTfMErRs-2Fni8h9jUnE8dFxTgGbT90LPZ8lbOB4ySFhe9KK2kZiIKadk3Eg-3D-3DMEtz_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlF4HfHBTEZTCKWE65zs8RpivXJrxwVPgJMSH0ULoChENXLru4Iwe4tk2nXRbDmxVHqIb5ulSdYHFC6zlUjm8YcFyfmX7jp-2BjZVpiq8ZaoowHE-2BDviFr99wL0AJkVVnrusrxJFr1oxHWYknWlDkb7ZWk-3D) [Twitter](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUYlxfToasijKf9HfUlHmYfa7y4XKuVCfWP3QJxzGzZFISiv6_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlNf7A-2FX7uiOFNeJC4sJevbiy8c7dn01HS45c5pBc7XN-2F8bYShVy2mOX-2FHhHFotazkEeY9kUd-2Bz5U1VrtDocDtJglq8Ix6xOpKJOeK745RRBb-2FqDtUms0BMuLsHCRJm-2B5hzjmOnA-2FkRWtoGIsBP8ts00-3D) [Instagram](https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUQbhiplhjyl4QcRwNc7RzVRSwKNMl-2F2NpHXWCF2D4RyCYxXXnpmKxfwMlv2HZ8Yr6g-3D-3DGfdg_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8fnV-2BsGJwuV3WEEWQdW-2BZTR2uHnKTok6FgUfJvALyt6glXpguy3Ld9vir-2FsIx3Rghb1w-2BwiuCfwbZW0xzLmoGlModBrB74U-2B4EUpHF3nC7RuHlzvM1RIb8j0hE5u0A6DKnieu6rE-2Btx6EFuHHHDojLbWDWyKuLNnLISlDhNYSQ-2Bc7qdn9qhbmu573KeyUhuGNWScKjhzWWvdgg5K-2Fmhbzrh3hA7ymO33s5w9GlS6Ab8g-3D) ## _Mississippi State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula) represents District 52 of Mississippi in Jackson County, including the cities of Pascagoula, Gautier, and Ocean Springs. He is now running for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4. Brice has generations of ties to the Jackson County area, growing up in Pascagoula as the great-grandson of former mayor Ed Wiggins. He believes in giving back to his community. His current committee assignments in the Mississippi Senate are: Judiciary, Division A (Chairman); Judiciary, Division B; Appropriations; Congressional Redistricting; Corrections; Legislative Reapportionment; Education; Medicaid; Ports & Marine Resources and Public Health & Welfare._

clean_body: | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Media Contact: Shelby Baioni sbaioni@focusgroupms.com (228) 325-2954 Brice Wiggins Sets Sights on Congress with Qualifying Deadline Now Behind Him For photos accompanying this release along with a Word document version, visit: March 1, 2022 PASCAGOULA, Miss.** – The deadline to qualify for Mississippi’s 2022 4th Congressional District race passed at 5 p.m. today. State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula), who recently qualified, now has his sights set on the June 7 primary election. "As of today, the field of candidates is set. I’ve traveled the 4th District, from the Pine Belt to the Coast. I’ve talked to many people and have heard common concerns from most everyone,” said Wiggins. “D.C. is self-centered and out of touch. Spending is out of control. Inflation is on the rise. Leadership, vision, availability and accountability from the current representative for South Mississippi are non-existent or ineffective.” Wiggins has the experience to hit the ground running from day one. A former prosecutor and current Chairman of the State Senate Judiciary A Committee and Appropriations Committee member, Wiggins gets things done. In 10 years, he has authored and passed bills written to improve the lives of all Mississippians, and now he wants to take this same drive, energy and proven effectiveness to serve our state in Congress. Wiggins’s accomplishments at the state level include authoring and passing Mississippi's first early education initiative, the Early Learning Collaborative Act, resulting in Mississippi being recognized as a Top 5 state in the country in early childhood education. In the area of criminal prosecution, Brice authored and passed the “Lonnie Smith Act,” which strengthened Mississippi’s child abuse laws and “Katie’s Law” allowing for DNA collection after violent felony arrests. To learn more about Brice’s results, . “The citizens of the 4th District are proud of where we live and what we can be. But our current voice in Congress doesn’t match the strength and vitality of this region,” said Wiggins. “We need real leadership -- someone to stand and fight for South Mississippi and our values. I’m the candidate with the experience, fortitude and credibility to get things done from day one.” “In these remaining few weeks of the legislative session, I will be working very hard for the people of my State Senate district. And then I look forward to this next phase of our campaign. I hope to meet as many people in the 4th District as possible before June 7,” said Wiggins. “We welcome everyone to join us in this great effort on behalf of South Mississippi. Just visit our website at ” To learn more, volunteer, donate or otherwise support the campaign, visit Follow the campaign on these social media platforms. ## Mississippi State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula) represents District 52 of Mississippi in Jackson County, including the cities of Pascagoula, Gautier, and Ocean Springs. He is now running for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4. Brice has generations of ties to the Jackson County area, growing up in Pascagoula as the great-grandson of former mayor Ed Wiggins. He believes in giving back to his community. His current committee assignments in the Mississippi Senate are: Judiciary, Division A (Chairman); Judiciary, Division B; Appropriations; Congressional Redistricting; Corrections; Legislative Reapportionment; Education; Medicaid; Ports & Marine Resources and Public Health & Welfare. If you would rather not receive future communications from Senator Brice Wiggins, let us know by clicking Senator Brice Wiggins, PO Box 1611, Ocean Springs, MS 39566 United States

subject: A state of disunion
body:

Businesses are crumbling under inflation, supply chain issues, and labor shortages.

Crime - particularly violent crime - is at an all-time high.

Freedom of speech is under attack.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: State of the Union
body:
Biden has failed | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6175993?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Tonight, we are set to hear from Biden in his first State of the Union address. He will likely tell us he is doing a great job – **but Americans know the truth.**

**Biden, Harris, and Pelosi have pushed radical policy after radical policy, and it's hurting you are your family.**

We have:
🚨Record setting inflation
🚨Skyrocketing gas prices
🚨Violent crime surges
🚨American credibility problem
🚨Southern border crisis
🚨National debt crisis

Biden’s actions have caused this pain. He canceled the Keystone XL pipeline and limited the US domestic energy industry. He repealed the successful policies of President Trump and stopped construction of the wall at our Southern border. He and Pelosi have forced through some of the most reckless and massive spending our nation has ever seen. And the President’s reckless withdrawal from Afghanistan projected weakness to the world and emboldened our enemies.

Despite what the President says tonight – the state of our union is a string of problems that Biden has caused and refuses to fix.
---
| |
---
|
---
| [MAKE BIDEN FIX HIS CRISES](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=4bdb97717f&e=13f35c4add "MAKE BIDEN FIX HIS CRISES")

| **One-party democratic rule in this nation has been a disaster. You’re paying more to eat and fuel your car. Our cities are less safe. Our nation is less secure. **

**Let’s end this one-party rule, and restore some much-needed sanity to our government. **

clean_body: Biden has failed | | | | | | Tonight, we are set to hear from Biden in his first State of the Union address. He will likely tell us he is doing a great job – but Americans know the truth. Biden, Harris, and Pelosi have pushed radical policy after radical policy, and it's hurting you are your family. We have: 🚨Record setting inflation 🚨Skyrocketing gas prices 🚨Violent crime surges 🚨American credibility problem 🚨Southern border crisis 🚨National debt crisis Biden’s actions have caused this pain. He canceled the Keystone XL pipeline and limited the US domestic energy industry. He repealed the successful policies of President Trump and stopped construction of the wall at our Southern border. He and Pelosi have forced through some of the most reckless and massive spending our nation has ever seen. And the President’s reckless withdrawal from Afghanistan projected weakness to the world and emboldened our enemies. name: Eden McKissick-Hawley
subject: there's a chance we get pummeled, Peter.
body:
I'm nervous, but I'm choosing hope.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442130/332967337/1300596418?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3eden_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UxYTMyMS1jMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcZ0TUU5oCBfze1tzaCnE1ScJZpTzpbMufsn6eM2-zc=)
Supporters,

Today is Election Day in Texas’ 30th District. Jessica and her team have spent months and months working towards this moment.

Now feels like the right moment to be vulnerable and transparent about what might happen tonight.
**This is long, but please read this in its entirety if you can...**

I’m going to tell you my deepest fear, something that very few people in politics would care to admit on Election Day:

I’m terrified that we will get crushed. I’m not just worried we may lose. I’m worried that we might get pummeled. I’m scared we aren’t going to come anywhere close to where we want to be, that we will let down Jessica, that we will let down our supporters.

Are we confident in the strength of our campaign? Yes, absolutely. But there were so many factors working against us, that we can never be sure. So our natural reaction is to assume our worst fears.

The truth is that Jessica’s campaign could not afford to conduct a poll. We simply did not have $25,000 to spare. (Yes, you read that right.) Instead, we were honest, clear, and bold in our positions from day one.

We weren’t backed by a $2M dark money super PAC like our opponent. We did not play her games. Yes, we are talking about Jasmine Crockett, our opponent who we out-fundraised $51 at a time.

Unlike Jasmine, we put our heads down, did the work, and used our limited resources effectively. We pushed as hard as we could, even when others let their foot off of the gas because their wealthy funders picked up their slack.

Our opponent drives a car that is more expensive than the median income in the district... She’s not for universal healthcare, she’s not for forgiving student loan debt, not for a Green New Deal, and the list goes on. None of this is a secret.

**But money and corruption talks, and she’s got a huge advantage.**

Let’s compare this with Jessica:

Jessica’s campaign was fueled by $280,000 from **5,500 individual contributions** with an average donation amount of $51.

Read that again.

This campaign was led by a young, a queer brown campaign manager, a young Taiwanese digital director, and a band of 20 year olds who fought tooth-and-nail to lift up Jessica and her message.

Kavin. Eden. Megan. Annie. Carson. Belén. Jeremiah. Sierra. Andrew. Jack. Misael. Sean.

**These are the names of the people who were inspired by Jessica Mason to fight the good fight.** This team looks like the goddamn United Nations, and we are so proud of that. We are showing the country -- one race at a time -- that politics is for _**everyone.**_

Politics is for Jessica, a daughter of South Dallas who grew up in poverty.
Politics is for fearless Black women who beat the drum and inspire us to be better.
Politics is for the daughter of a teamster truck driver.
Politics is for the little girl struggling with asthma, whose mom cannot afford her inhaler.
Politics is for the young person wandering into the military recruiting office in search of a brighter future.
Politics is for young, gay, brown men campaign managers born to poor immigrants in Queens.
Politics is for women adopted from Taiwan.
Politics is for people who have been pushed so far outside of the system they cannot see a way in.
**So even if we lose, we can know we courageously stuck to our values. We stood up against the swamp, we took it head on. We rattled the cage. We sent a strong message to groups in Washington who spend millions in races for corrupt gain. They’re on notice, and they know it.**

We followed our leader and stood tall. When things got hard, we came out swinging, and we won’t let our foot off the gas until the last person in line has voted.

If we lose, it’s because we rejected the swamp ecosystem that holds back South Dallas. Period, point blank.

Thank god that’s not Jessica, who has been loud and clear about what she believes in since she launched her campaign. We can sleep tonight knowing we said what we meant, and we meant what we said.

**If we aren’t victorious, we aren’t backing down from telling the truth and living our values.**

It takes 100 tries to get just 1 great leader across the finish line in this country. So if we aren’t victorious, we are going to continue doing the work of breaking barriers and keep it moving. This is why Barrier To Entry exists.

We know it’s worth it. We saw it with Peter and Ed and Shenise in 2021.

Peter brought solar panels to Galesburg. Shenise brought police reform to Dayton. Ed brought affordable housing to Pittsburgh. The impact of this work reverberates city to city, from coast to coast.

**We have given this everything. Absolutely everything. We stretched your dollars as far as we could. We did right by you. We thought of you every step of the way, and felt you with us.**

So for the next couple hours, I’m shoving that fear aside. I'm going to choose joy and hope. I’ll save the righteous indignation for another time.

**And really, we already won. They know it, too. **

Please tune in this evening (or tomorrow morning depending when results are finalized!) to see where we end up. This is ours, this is yours. Let's do this!

Team Jessica until the end of time,
**\-- Eden**
**[**P.S. We need to replenish our funds after this primary election. If you can contribute any amount to support this work and the next campaign we work with, that would be much appreciated. Make a contribution now! >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442131/332967338/214728439?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3eden_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UxYTMyMS1jMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcZ0TUU5oCBfze1tzaCnE1ScJZpTzpbMufsn6eM2-zc=)**
* * *

name: Jane Timken
subject: State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio
body:
Take a second and read.

| [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=e19e02b26040403180d3236ea9fb0f71&_e=SOLMUEnAfs2pvgpq7gjRBbe-E5LUenpGHRylCrMrz7s9FOT3FY29kw75WmqsTpklXHZPScXOw3l2lS9aehf2fR3h27EXcR6WBpCSFBsnfnZGEHEaFe7Ha0aUOMvW4ef62H52W1SPUBI-OU79UUuBDYV-aXgloef4GsNyckj2N8vEuJ8bkgDiSYLIQaVaeFp8oeFKpboHktrN_htGztkVmxdk7RW02CiG4elrWT0kS4dUwaA46o0y5EMeje7fHVNmvbEcqXOE9z4KLCKNUBmfHgX6PoVySzLuXenhi3LUOdbR9CJGlu9iigmDTp0Mb9xlzvG0rxfJnWdR8hDRNJpyv6R65qULzBac-aLmZFLxFdD0YLEsgehlZtgFmtVroZ8yE52znZSt982l6UjZeP_U-3y2By9AI5hrKbZZCbdzU4G4IL8jZyGFkvVOqecK_Jqd66Rqopt5OOko4wM7FYFrz6HeKCgcw89HLzIxYVeVdcKsXaTYMwyLoKCQKWxYCd3x6LQTNgMku-26i45PIW0ZmlI8ZpVsbCL4eZ2Rrfyxj00%3D)

What’s the State of the Union under Joe Biden? **_LAST._**

What was the State of the Union under President Trump? **_FIRST._** | | [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO PUT AMERICA FIRST AGAIN**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=e19e02b26040403180d3236ea9fb0f71&_e=SOLMUEnAfs2pvgpq7gjRBbe-E5LUenpGHRylCrMrz7s9FOT3FY29kw75WmqsTpklXHZPScXOw3l2lS9aehf2fR3h27EXcR6WBpCSFBsnfnZGEHEaFe7Ha0aUOMvW4ef62H52W1SPUBI-OU79UUuBDYV-aXgloef4GsNyckj2N8vEuJ8bkgDiSYLIQaVaeFp8oeFKpboHktrN_htGztkVmxdk7RW02CiG4elrWT0kS4dUwaA46o0y5EMeje7fHVNmvbEcqXOE9z4KLCKNUBmfHgX6PoVySzLuXenhi3LUOdbR9CJGlu9iigmDTp0Mb9xlzvG0rxfJnWdR8hDRNJpyvyDLuNCqgN0C7It1qQnSF62NbwLBpISM9G-wXZZzCOuLrk_tnWD0oR-07_VR3CJvC61UIKuRA5ZXUTq_8HmHm2ME-e5lCpmBzCQj_FzgkixarnyMuoU881NSjjiW6kneB0SjNh8unCC_p7A6PQwW2tgKgHBTnDqK0FxjuTEaZdXORzUjIz6yE7HA1GwRHIyJs6fQbea4LaoC7YLw9nzTiFU%3D)
---

**President Biden has made it abundantly clear since DAY 1 he’s more concerned about making sure foreign adversaries, Socialists, and people who hate America are higher up on the totem pole than the American people.**

He’s made it clear that the Southern Border, the economy, and our children’s future are of no concern to him. As long as the woke liberal leaders are pleased, President Biden is happy as a clam.

That’s got to change. That’s why I’m fighting like hell to win Ohio again for the America First Agenda and Take Back the Senate Majority because that’s the only way we’re going to _**PUT AMERICA FIRST AGAIN.**_

**If you’re committed to Putting America First Again and Taking Back the Senate Majority then please step up today and join our campaign by rushing your support below.**

FIRST. | | President Biden has made it abundantly clear since DAY 1 he’s more concerned about making sure foreign adversaries, Socialists, and people who hate America are higher up on the totem pole than the American people. He’s made it clear that the Southern Border, the economy, and our children’s future are of no concern to him. As long as the woke liberal leaders are pleased, President Biden is happy as a clam. That’s got to change. That’s why I’m fighting like hell to win Ohio again for the America First Agenda and Take Back the Senate Majority because that’s the only way we’re going to PUT AMERICA FIRST AGAIN. If you’re committed to Putting America First Again and Taking Back the Senate Majority then please step up today and join our campaign by rushing your support below. subject: In a few short minutes

body:
President Biden will address the nation and lie. [http://email.mg.sybrware.com/c/eJxtTrFqxDAU-5p4DM_2s50bPFw5SrntoF26FMfv1WdwLmkcGtqvr7MXBBJISCpz_Mjkr-fft-_l5YbvAz1dLvur_EJBniPaaE4iewVKgQYFUmsc-hGC-USMNBhNZGWHMKW-_ozrHlbu4zyJuw9xBGNPhMYZ5YIzI4FjRCWB2UgWxd-3bamdPnfquaFu8xoS92meU-Gw5Ho0NWOqqT5obeq_o0eAKYfGVkmO2sFIgdmBRWLJZGO_PJJYPS17LiVX69rhNIVcjoE_BvhQhg]

In a few short minutes President Biden will address the nation in his Constitutionally-mandated speech.

He’s going to try and tell us that the economy is doing well, that Russia is contained, and our southern border is secure.

We know those are lies.

More, he’s going to fail to mention support for our police officers, a parental centered education, and the human trafficking
epidemic.

We know he is a failed leader.

In 2024, we need to replace him. But before that, we need to replace Congress in 2022. We need strong conservative leadership to
check the overreach of the executive branch.

Only with a majority in the House and Senate are we able to pull our country back from the brink and restore principled
leadership. The liberal Washington Post found last week that “Biden’s presidential approval rating [was] at a new low”. Our
country is fed up, but we need to take that sentiment and turn it into action.

I need you to not only support me on election day, but also now with a $25 donation. We can do this.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Confirmed – President Biden is about to walk into the halls of Congress to give his FIRST ever State of the Union address. We need to know if Democrats in Cresco are planning to watch his State of the Union Address in a few minutes. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Fellow American,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_

Joe Biden just finished his State of the Union Address. He said a whole lot, but then again, most of the crises he mentioned are of his own making. name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Senator Bryce Reeves Responds To President Biden's State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
Senator Bryce Reeves Responds To President Biden's State of the Union Address
| | |
---
| | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f489fcafe-2e8f4aa1-3ec5-4aa0-ae99-9b57e9db0650-000000/YC8XID2EEf3LGlzQtbMC9Co5JTM=260)
---
| |
---
| **Senator Bryce Reeves Responds To President Biden's State of the Union Address** Following this evening's State of the Union Address by President Joe Biden, Senator Bryce Reeves had the following to say: "President Biden's State of the Union address was a farce. We see the real State of the Union every day at gas pumps, in grocery stores, and in our bank accounts. Our southern border is utter chaos and we have lost the respect of allies and adversaries abroad. Americans are starving for genuine leadership - leadership this President has failed to provide. Closing American airspace to Russia is a good step forward, but the entire world is looking to see our nation take the lead in the crisis in Ukraine. President Biden has abdicated that leadership role to France, a decision that will have long lasting consequences. We have turned our backs on our principles, and we must remain the beacon of hope and democracy in the world. I hope come next year's State of the Union address we will have more reasons to be hopeful. I'm stepping up to bring that leadership to Congress this year. As Americans we all need to stand up and not only pray for our leaders, but encourage them to do the hard right over the easy wrong. I look forward to doing my part to start to restore principled American leadership." ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff’s deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---
|

clean_body: From COVID, the economy, foreign policy, crime, and education. President Biden has a lot of explaining to do. Peter, Tonight we watched and listened to President Biden's State of the Union address, and Mr. President, we are in far worse shape today than we were just a year ago. If Joe Biden were to provide Americans with an honest assessment of the state of our union, he would say that our nation is struggling because of his ineffective leadership. Now that we heard from President Biden, I want to know a more important opinion regarding our current state. I want to hear from you, Peter, how you feel this past year has been for our nation. We need common sense, conservative leaders in Washington, D.C. now more than ever. Madeline Dean is a rubber stamp for all of the radical, far-left policies that got us into this mess. This November voters have a real opportunity to change the disastrous direction of this country. It's time for a dramatic change in leadership. Do you feel our nation is on the wrong track and needs change? Make your voice heard. The failures of his administration and their inability to admit mistakes are the primary cause of our snowballing issues. Unfortunately, this list of our nation's problems seems to keep getting longer: National polling continues to show that most Americans do NOT have a favorable opinion of this administration COVID and the politicization from the Biden/Harris administration has only grown distrust in our institutions The push for more socialism and more failed policies. Biden continues to press for his Build Back Better Agenda which would destroy our energy industry and increase inflation even more The American economy is in shambles: unconscionable gas prices, millions-fewer Americans are working today (despite jobs being in large supply), a massive expansion of government spending and colossal increase in federal debt has sparked the largest rise in inflation in over 40 years. From America's retreat in Afghanistan to today's flat-footed response to Ukraine, Biden's foreign policy is feckless at best, dangerous at worst. To name just a few ... Pennsylvania can lead the change for a better future if we commit, but we can't wait a moment longer. We need new leadership, new ideas, and most of all, the people need to see that their trust and support is making a difference. I am well prepared and equipped to face the REAL issues impacting families in Pennsylvania. I will fight for better opportunities for our small and local businesses, a more transparent and effective education system, and create better security by holding politicians accountable and prioritizing the safety of our nation. Peter, 2022 is our best chance to save the future of PA! Are you with me? If you are, please consider to help bring forth the more decisive leadership we NEED and DESERVE. Thank you, Christian Nascimento | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by The Friends of Christian Nascimento

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Gazelka Calls for GOP Unity
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
Fellow Minnesotan, I’m concerned with the constant rhetoric against the state party, the many GOP seasoned volunteers and delegates, and Republican legislators concerning their efforts to stand up for Republican values. We had a recent difficult major transition at the state party. As Senate GOP leader, I did my best to see past and present state GOP leaders be successful. When they are successful, we all win. I don’t know any leader, especially a new leader, that is going to get everything right. When they make mistakes, or their team does, we all need to help them get better. That is the case with the timely recording of delegates. It was a mess. But they will get better. It wasn’t fraudulent; it was glaring mistakes from a brand new team. GOP caucus volunteers have also been maligned and smeared without just cause. These are the dedicated volunteers that tirelessly work for conservative values across the state. It is a thankless job but very important for our future success. We all need to thank the many BPOU chairs and leaders for their selfless work. Finally, the narrative that virtually every Republican legislator is part of the swamp is disgusting to me. These are the men and women that answered the call to save our state. They are the ones that are on the front lines battling for all of the things that conservatives hold dear. I’m proud to serve alongside the Republican Senate and House members. They are not RINOs, they are Republican champions. Without these dedicated legislators, Minnesota would look a lot more like New York or California. When the state leans left, it is very difficult to hold the line, and yet republican legislators did just that. So when bloggers and new, inexperienced candidates speak ill will of all of these people that have been engaged in this fight for a while, we all need to speak up and say it’s time for that rhetoric to stop. I don’t mind when we draw distinctions between the candidates, truthful comparisons, not outright lies. That is appropriate and necessary. But those that call the state party, volunteers, and virtually every GOP legislator the swamp, it’s time to band together and say enough! We can win this fall if we come together. We won’t come together if there is constant undermining of the people that have made the difference in protecting our state. Jesus said, "a House divided against itself cannot stand." It was true then, it’s true now. Together, let’s take our state back. The opportunity has never been better. I’m particularly angered that one of the campaigns would constantly declare that the volunteers were doing something wrong when it appears that their campaign is the one that was writing in names down to be delegates, without permission, who were not at the caucuses. I’m standing up for Mandy Heffron, a long-time Republican volunteer and a Gazelka for Governor team member, a young Christian woman who is always trying to do the right thing. I am offended that the Shah campaign would go after volunteers like her. You can spew lies about me, but when you mess with volunteers it is very, very inappropriate. Senator Paul Gazelka _Candidate for Governor_ | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0e1ac193245645fe97f79cdf0f987fb9&_e=nS3s_Dw_7YQVXGyRsK3Hg-i1S0KXEStoMRPnw8-4kJeGWUIP3O6XnLj3t7bcewBJuPB87qqYeCOV74E8kimMvvNsEHcWhLC-1NirSmo_AfgQgAvbyCdxnDnua3grkl6rdoq_KDqjPs1jmmMoiZYlp-D6GBJb2kt5w2s-lJw66mHM7DcmAwXakL3sKL8z9_N5r3aVi54YpLODvLJF4Wu3rDAgjMsTjy5OZQ8xqKNz4Sph0yoZjJpvkhBPHgXc-6R6vy89xKij_s5vUxKRZRVrUQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0e1ac193245645fe97f79cdf0f987fb9&_e=nS3s_Dw_7YQVXGyRsK3Hg1TOoegEND5nP4pTnahqgdkQgYuxVnhmzHICF_zosL3SGWBXq05SKFeBDBcC674B3m0IDJPg540Ra79XzE9z-hYMTP6oOYBSdk-vY0rGRMOpfZfRxi-ZkHvSSUfhle-HZBlfTHiF2vXGt18BVv92DORbAyw6GLuY_0i0ZMUvGLqqk2bh4QJSrcGHKZcB6F3EtV7NkaEoCVUxT_0PZrylVQP0DsoZhCWw3fKS6KHjIB9mFD6lTtUXKiBHiZu6pBDbVg%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=0e1ac193245645fe97f79cdf0f987fb9&_e=nS3s_Dw_7YQVXGyRsK3Hg4kL7nkg3EXvanpHbltpPjICi-LGrjmEuY9mtCl4aD5g1PLQ0QyaFAiBcCEOaAAvljESO-OWJWcJ0sjSV8hWRoAvQJi2F-eelFwqlGyZprRyrSxATeE1olOAoCH3QbzygPCo0YoYYc5cT00EHkqsP_U06qo_huygeYWkmxgEQFk2Z_6pvD847au-96_JpxVaSXSoUz6OVS2CqJF5aafIHqy4N4YCfzxpOZlgT7yN5Mf55X1XxnhHjSPCVkfXuNQSIA%3D%3D)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nickfornj/de-gregorio-josh-gottheimer-dccc-on-the-run-from-our-unmatched-campaign-15924518?e=31104c58a7)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| | De Gregorio: Gottheimer’s SOTU Theater Can’t Hide Complicity in Biden’s Disastrous Agenda
---
| **FAIR LAWN** – Tonight, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran who served in both Iraq and Afghanistan, and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, offered the following response to the State of the Union Address:

“Joe Biden did his best tonight to paper over an economy that is in tatters thanks to the highest inflation in decades, along with another preventable foreign policy disaster that occurred under his watch,” said De Gregorio.

He continued, “Josh Gottheimer is so desperate to distance himself from this failing administration that he took it upon himself to write his own address. Despite his invented caucuses and tonight’s presidential make believe, **the State of Josh’s Union is a 90+ percent voting record with Nancy Pelosi and AOC that makes him 100% complicit in the far-left policies that are making life harder for Fifth District families**. It is imperative that we take back this seat to put a badly-needed check on Joe Biden.”

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain Responds to State Of The Union Address
body:
Bill McSwain decried President Biden’s weak leadership, and promised to protect Pennsylvanians as Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=30694a2988)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 1, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Responds to State of the Union Address
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Tuesday night issued the following statement in response to President Biden's State of the Union Address:
---
| **_“Under President Biden, the American people have endured a crippled economy, skyrocketing inflation, record-setting violent crime, an unprecedented crisis at the border, and a mismanaged pandemic. These issues impact every aspect of American life, but they have one thing in common - they are the result of a weak, aimless President who has proven himself incapable of defending and protecting the American people at home or abroad.

In Pennsylvania, Governor Tom Wolf's own reckless agenda has forced hardworking families across the Commonwealth to face crushing burdens, including job losses, shuttered businesses and schools, increased taxes and cost of living, and a sinking economy.

That ends when I'm Governor. Pennsylvanians deserve a Governor who will put their needs first, and who will stand up for the rule of law while fighting to enact pro-business, pro-energy, and pro-family policies. It's time for a Governor who will get the government off your back and will fight any federal attempts to intrude on our Commonwealth's liberty, sovereignty, or constitutional rights. As Governor, I will restore conservative values to our state, end statewide mandates, and create an election system in which everyone can have faith. This is the kind of leadership that Pennsylvanians deserve and that I will provide.”_**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=46aba7ef33&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=310e135cfc&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---

subject: I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert.

body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6646?t=6&akid=1412%2E878179%2EUmN69M) Hi - I’m Alex, and I’m running for Congress against the most deranged, brainwashed, dumpster-fire-of-a-human in Colorado... Lauren Boebert. [Today is our campaign’s big launch, so I’m asking if you could help us build our team as big as possible by splitting a donation between us and Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6646?t=7&akid=1412%2E878179%2EUmN69M) **Let’s face it:** I’m running against a conspiracy theorist who somehow wandered into Congress in a delirious rage. Her racist rants, failed attempts to overthrow the government, and the fact that she gets her policies from QAnon Reddit posts all feed into this epic shit-storm that is politics today.

And all the while, folks like us are left behind to deal with actual, real world problems.

**We deserve better:** I’m not a sellout. I don’t change my opinions based on what polls well. I stick to my values, and don’t waiver just for a big check or a shout out.

And I’m building a team of skeptics like me who are tired of the bullshit, the pandering, and the mind-numbing stupidity that people like Boebert have brought to the table.

[**So I’m asking you to join me. Will you split a donation between our team and Voter Protection Project today so we can take down the national embarrassment that is Lauren Boebert?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6646?t=8&akid=1412%2E878179%2EUmN69M) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6647?t=9&akid=1412%2E878179%2EUmN69M)

Let’s build something real – something that can bring more common sense governing and less phony grandstanding. And let’s burn the MAGA-machine to the ground.

Thank you,

Alex Walker

name: Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General
subject: Tiffany Shedd Statement on Biden’s State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 1, 2022
Contact: press@sheddforaz.com

Tiffany Shedd Statement on Biden’s State of the Union Address

ELOY, AZ – Tiffany Shedd, a Republican candidate for Attorney General of
Arizona, issued the following statement today regarding Joe Biden’s State of
the Union address:

“Joe Biden made it clear during tonight’s State of the Union that he will
continue to pursue the same failed policies that have created a crisis at our
southern border.

“What we are witnessing is not about immigration. It is an invasion by human
traffickers, drug smugglers, and the cartels that employ them, and I am
watching it happen on my family farm ninety miles from the border.

“Biden’s failure to secure our border has resulted in a humanitarian crisis
the likes of which America and Arizona have never seen. Women are being
systematically raped by traffickers, drug smugglers’ fentanyl is the number one
cause of death for Americans ages eighteen to forty-five, and American families
are falling victim to cartel violence.

“Rather than directing his attention towards protecting Americans and stopping
this crisis, Biden has enabled it while also pursuing an agenda of
unconstitutional mandates and gun control that threaten our rights guaranteed
by the US Constitution.

“Now, more than ever, it is incumbent upon states to protect Americans from
the border invasion and from the federal government’s assaults on our
liberties. Not only does Arizona have the legal authority to secure our border,
we also have a moral and ethical duty to our citizens to do it. As Attorney
General, I will not sit by while a multibillion-dollar criminal enterprise
floods our state with drugs, violence, and illegal immigrants."

###

Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: MEDIA RELEASE: Brice Wiggins Statement on President Biden’s State of the Union Address
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e110ed84c82/media-release-brice-wiggins-statement-on-president-bidens-state-of-the-union-address?e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
**Brice Wiggins Statement on President Biden’s State of the Union Address**
_**For photos and graphics accompanying this release visit:** https://www.dropbox.com/sh/ulps4w3smth09fv/AABR1WGRthL07sRVWiD1osfNa?dl=0_**March 1, 2022** **PASCAGOULA, MISS.** – This evening, President Biden addressed the nation on a variety of issues affecting us all. As a candidate for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4, I think the people of our district deserve to know what I think in response.The State of our Union has worsened since Joe Biden took office just over a year ago. Inflation is at a 40-year high. Prices at the gas pump are out of control with no end in sight. Supply-chain bottlenecks affect Americans every day in too many ways to count. Crime is out of control in many cities and Biden’s open border policies have led to violent criminals and drugs crossing freely into the U.S.It’s time for strong Republican leadership that can effectively push back against policies that have led to these unprecedented crises and stand up for Americans.I agree with President Biden’s expansion of services to address the unprecedented mental health crisis in our country. Americans are exhausted by the pandemic and economic pressures. They need support and relief from the combination of negative forces affecting their lives. We need to take steps to make sure that services and treatment for mental illness reach people quickly.\On Ukraine, President Biden stated, “We, the United States of America, stand with Ukrainian people. Throughout our history, we have learned this lesson. When dictators do not pay a price for their aggression, they cause more chaos.”I agree with this. But, there’s also a direct correlation between Putin’s aggression in Ukraine and the weak foreign policy strategy in the current White House. In the weeks leading up to Russia invading Ukraine, the Biden administration lobbied against Republican-led efforts to sanction Russia. In fact, the U.S. imported a record amount of oil from Russia last year, while restrictions were placed on American energy production, including the blocking by the Biden administration on the Keystone pipeline project. This helped fund Putin’s war on Ukraine and these policies need to be reversed.I wholeheartedly support the emergency spending bill that will get more weapons to Ukrainian forces and humanitarian aid to the Ukrainian people. I also support sending more American troops to neighboring countries to reassure our NATO allies.As your Congressman, I will work tirelessly for you, to reverse policies that have led to the multitude of problems. I’ll anticipate the long-term results of our government’s actions so we don’t continue to have to deal with foreign policy crises after the fact because we failed to act properly before the fact.Tonight the president gave a statesman-like address and praised Republicans for helping pass the infrastructure bill. That said, all too often over the past year President Biden has governed by demonizing Republicans and attempted to use razor-thin majorities to jam unpopular, budget-busting spending bills through the Congress. This approach hasn’t worked and it won’t work. I hope his speech marks a turning point, but count me a skeptic.To learn more, volunteer, donate or otherwise support the campaign, visit [bricewiggins.ms](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=cdd81c17d8&e=698f056321)Follow the campaign on these social media platforms.[Facebook](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ed17179334&e=698f056321)[Twitter](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=694d017e46&e=698f056321)[Instagram](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4d7a442046&e=698f056321)
| [DONATE NOW](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=73df4eff01&e=698f056321)
---
___________________________________________________________Mississippi State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula) represents District 52 of Mississippi covering south Jackson County, including the cities of Pascagoula, Gautier, and Ocean Springs. He is now running for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4. Brice has generations of ties to the Jackson County area, growing up in Pascagoula as the great-grandson of former mayor Ed Wiggins. He adamantly believes in giving back to his community. His current committee assignments in the Mississippi Senate are: Judiciary, Division A- (Chairman); Judiciary, Division B; Appropriations; Congressional Redistricting; Corrections; Legislative Reapportionment; Education; Medicaid; Ports & Marine Resources and Public Health & Welfare._
|
---
| | | | | |
---|---|---
| | |
---

His current committee assignments in the Mississippi Senate are: Judiciary, Division A- (Chairman); Judiciary, Division B; Appropriations; Congressional Redistricting; Corrections; Legislative Reapportionment; Education; Medicaid; Ports & Marine Resources and Public Health & Welfare. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brice Wiggins for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Arview For Senate
subject: The State of our President
body:
What did you think of the State of the Union address?

| [](http://www.arviewforillinois.com/?e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=1)
---
Peter, did you watch Biden's State of the Union address? That speech wasn't as much about the state of our union as it was about the state of Joe Biden's presidency. And let me tell you, _it's not good_. | [](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KAwThnf-X4-m47YWbSOu_SFEkv52bF1l_8Vl9FIN6fw6A&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=2 ">>> DO YOU AGREE? <<<") [>>> DO YOU AGREE? <<<](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KAwThnf-X4-m47YWbSOu_SFEkv52bF1l_8Vl9FIN6fw6A&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=2)
---
Early exit polls show that America is just as divided after his speech as it was before - _**perhaps more**_.
While 49% of respondents said the speech made them more hopeful about the future, **54% said the U.S. is heading in the wrong direction** under Biden.
[**> >> ARE YOU ONE OF THEM? <<<**](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KAwThnf-X4-m47YWbSOu_SFEkv52bF1l_8Vl9FIN6fw6A&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=3)
Perhaps, like me, they're expecting more Republicans to get elected at the mid-terms in November and that makes them feel hopeful.
Democrats are exposed and we now have the perfect opportunity to [**change the direction our nation is heading**](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KAwThnf-X4-m47YWbSOu_SFEkv52bF1l_8Vl9FIN6fw6A&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=4)! If we don't win in 2022, it will be our own fault!
That means it's more important than ever that true patriots stand up and take back our liberties! Do it for our children. Do it for our future.
[**Donate today!**](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KAwThnf-X4-m47YWbSOu_SFEkv52bF1l_8Vl9FIN6fw6A&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=5 "Donate today!")
Thank you,
Arview For Senate
[http://www.arviewforillinois.com/](http://www.arviewforillinois.com/?e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=6)
Arview For Senate · 407 E Poplar, West Frankfort, IL 62896, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/unsubscribe?e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=7).
You can also keep up with Arview For Senate on [Twitter](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNFijncP1rrPxxg75veucfT7Yzf5POfGoJrCIxPuR-eC_&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=8) or [Facebook](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6kVP9k94H4H1LSTHMlc2cv9JVVoYmAO3WU7vQ6KthNWv&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_of_the_union_2022&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z43u9tj3aagolv3nacjk9ppbg869lmq3g6d20aro_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onic8oe8pdk6pjrdddgsuoe6tplc1pbcc9jcaom4tbmm2r71cln64pmdc9kelhj1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mmom0tj0cpr61cr3cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zafaro4nsqeom7ge655b0idsdq960mgccfpg9hfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72cdh2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgfvr76nkqfppqpldn8jhne1dm7cqnm1bqjv82h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72cdh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0ivtsd03rav0nr6pv78hi58nl46roeua9rrdij0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72cdh2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb8f6p1hvoso8qb4j303kum4igbm59se515arv8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72cdh2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu97mif7ge71hpj9r4gmsdkslo6e6d7e2nsk2q9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs)

| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3qgj92mqdjhp7kosqin0u35eed2nhjjh8g01s9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqgcer47tkaanhkfbvtfcjvkuvo3fpr7c4cd75i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtb6ggueoe0oa3qtc9l4kh7vl9u4rd2r2be0aog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65spgscqr8pjimlqe2tb16dq61cr4eapj2p9m6er34sr568qe3ddme5qj4spge3gefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphksipm8ptnc9j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo5su09ps6j8uop5kco3n5daiv836bmfhfqeotbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme six years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk3rdjv472nq9g9go14i4vtrqj6gjmmti3lv3uhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgg4bbv0qp0aecm40md80trsgang46bvq3aumh7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3o6sip0dinnh1p7htm0dan74jmp4n3coiph34f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhemq68v03bnsblkajrgnk2aa8bj3urdelfbaclg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2h19jf7oaknbvcn9ks92ii8hip7vejjh7mbc38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziljq3bl87fis325hgaoljvie9lkeufacb1mphm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9i61o72c5h2bs) God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9539%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3uIDqFVRZ1vbgRskntGY9g&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14493%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hANHjVZefrKBoH1BJXVIDw&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gjUWGjN3RGiuuCg3OiHazw&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14405%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LNS1MF8Cbetb%2f7hJugbeYw&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yThFMlDcNG9lo7gpEv3xMg&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson

clean_body: I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute I believe that children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values. They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools. I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here... Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: One Year Ago, Today My Life Changed Forever...
body:
The Opportunity Of A Lifetime Must Be Seized Within The Lifetime Of That Opportunity - Leonard Ravenhill Last year at this time, I was exploring a ru
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4068.1.92fd7fa19e83a681aa6995be15388367) |
---
## The Opportunity Of A Lifetime Must Be Seized Within The Lifetime Of That Opportunity - Leonard Ravenhill
---
Last year at this time, I was _exploring_ a run for the **US Senate in Oklahoma**. One of my best friends, **Clay Clark** , asked me to come do an interview with his friend, **Ann Vandersteel** , on the **SteelTruth Show.** This interview which took place on this day last year changed my life forever. **General Michael Flynn** tuned into that interview and saw something in me that caused him to want to get to know me. The day after the interview, **Ann Vandersteel** sent me a text at _5am_ asking if she could give **General Michael Flynn** my cell phone? I was amazed. The General called me, and we had a _beautiful conversation_ where we began to build an _incredible relationship_. I am honored to be the first candidate that **General Flynn** endorsed in the 2022 election cycle. It was on _March 16, 2021_ that **General Flynn** flew down to Tulsa and we launched **[#LahmeyerForSenate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4069.1.b1c4e746374821e72c5ad6ea20aeb5da)**! This weekend **General Flynn** is joining me again in Oklahoma and I am beyond grateful for his friendship and mentorship in my life. Please continue to pray for me as we get closer and closer to the BIG day on June 28, 2022! Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4070.1.affe11b2e40e5b791b3f8e1c1c6adbee), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4071.1.228a19547e462e44103b62cd96aaa5fb), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4072.1.3654ac883fcd7f8d5060d2fce4017e13), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4073.1.e2acabaf6fa0d9a3877be7995bb7b9ca), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4074.1.21d6b1e10577145fa3e4bcc309a44370)).
---
| | [ Click Here To Help #SaveAmerica ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4075.1.a9f897b9649e3307414ec8449327c3e0)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4076.1.cdc447010046018724dbcd2eaebc2f7b)
---
**IMPORTANT UPDATE!**
We have just been able to add more seats to the [OKC Rally](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4077.1.9d17603c16c16d411ea842fc91d2b514) w/General Flynn and Roger Stone this Friday at Sundance Airport.
We have partnered w/**OK2A** & **OKHPR** for this rally in [OKC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4078.1.fb9a77abec025dab75d23e1771b2c1d1). _Therefore, all**OK2A** & **OKHPR** members receive FREE admission!_
There are now tickets available that are [FREE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4079.1.0d823bd13ec3e6c74f3132bd3d61a958) for the general public but a seat is not guaranteed with the free ticket (first come, first serve).

**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4674224.4083.1.96470b820f3bf27d80c6fc4d53bcc3e5)** : (Only 3 Seats Left)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
President Trump just delivered one of his biggest and most important speeches ever. &n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3lske--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

**PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP JUST NOW:**
**“Another top priority to save American democracy must be to break up the Big Tech Giants and restore free speech in America. and we’ll be fighting that very hard by opening Truth Social.”** **** Fellow Conservative, President Trump just delivered one of his biggest and most important speeches ever. He spoke directly to millions of Americans... _and sent shivers down the spine of Big Tech Giants._ Why? name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: My reaction to last night's State of the Union
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Dr. Bob Lorinser reacts to State of the Union
"The strength of our union is dependent on leaders in Washington earnestly working together toward that unity." - Dr. Bob Lorinser
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup]
Dr. Bob Lorinser is a retired member of the U.S. State Department’s Foreign Services. The use of his diplomatic rank, job titles, and photographs depicting government entities does not imply endorsement by the Department of the State or the Foreign Services.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup]
➦ FAST $50 ➦ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tourdaup?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
[^ Tap to make an immediate $50 donation.]
WASHINGTON, D.C. — Dr. Bob Lorinser, the Democratic candidate running to represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in the House of Representatives, encourages bipartisanship in Congress after the State of the Union.
I applaud President Biden's effort to win the hearts and minds of Americans, and I'm confident there are multiple issues we all agree on," said Dr. Bob Lorinser, Democratic candidate for U.S. Congress (MI1).
"Citizens in Northern Michigan and the U.P. champion efforts toward economic recovery, freedom at home and abroad, and safer and healthier communities — all of which received universal praise and applause."
Dr. Lorinser says as the country moves forward out of the pandemic, combats inflation, and deals with international crises, leaders must find meaningful solutions that benefit the lives of everyday citizens in Michigan's 1st district.
"The role of a good Representative is to focus on what brings citizens together, not on what divides us," said Dr. Lorinser. "There are clear bipartisan actions supported across the aisle in both chambers."
According to Dr. Lorinser, the announcement of mental health initiatives and solidarity with the Ukrainian people were among the most poignant moments of Biden's speech.
"The strength of our union is dependent on leaders in Washington earnestly working together toward that unity. I hope after tonight Congress is motivated to build on what we have in common — our desire for liberty, success, justice, and peace — to create a more perfect union for everyone."
