name: Great America Update
subject: "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6726%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=MZfyYeeEwne5C2md6PNUzg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69263%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=feK7MncKcGKOcq7sUuZG6g&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69264%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T2fL6S2OU6Fi%2f5SlxgljQg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course--it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach. ** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69275%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wpZfFYqBHTsMml4vrik39A&sysid=1) Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4oj2rv0l1feg3uq4i4f4qqcnnv0ea2d9h6s9g7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn4oj1e2rj2c3me8oe8oj4s9pr7djncdh6adlm6io7csb1elqmeor26jgb3clnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj39pplmgrreob665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm4ob5c3i6eoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkbdkt8ggo9ik69qip2cjsdc1kepch9q9bc5m34o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9gmao74cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhn6erbdjjoqbm0fdu13bqov4jahbil8alj69oq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9gmao74cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlbuf3fahf6u67cdl1i26eek1e4lt4rnscvicpjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9gmao74cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z8u1d6135m9g6cmeuhi75a2tlm0bs7c4llcrvhu8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj8lvuo72cbjq4ubr2jtjskd03776nfut9ql4qig_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9gmao74cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Val Demings
subject: What you do next could change everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Republicans are worried
| | |
---
Friend, I need you to hear this, because what you do next could change everything:

National Republicans just announced they are preparing a MASSIVE attack ad campaign against me. And when Floridians turn on their TVs, they'll be blanketed by GOP lies aimed at ending my historic campaign. Right now, I cannot defend myself without your immediate help, friend.
[**I just set an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before midnight to counter the GOP’s desperate attacks. Please, rush $5 right now to help me fight back. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479243/333087408/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2485-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2UzNTY3Ny01NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsoalQbQ8gIEtx3fJNLAtwqRAbkD7ciCbg_eDWfEufs=)
The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised a record-breaking **$104.8 MILLION** in 2021. The RNC chair has already attacked me personally, and my team just heard that they're gearing up to run attack ads to defeat me.
Republicans are worried that Marco Rubio is only _2 points_ ahead of me and that election veterans like James Carville think I can win. The GOP knows this race could determine the Senate majority – **so they'll spend as much money as it takes to buy this seat.**
**If I don't raise $25,000 before midnight, I won't have the resources to defend myself from Mitch McConnell's committee's desperate attacks. That means I'll fall behind in this close race, and McConnell could regain complete Senate control.**
**[Please, will you rush $5 – or whatever you can spare before midnight – to help me prepare for the NRSC's deceitful attack ads? I can only surge ahead in this race if you help me right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479244/333087409/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2485-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2UzNTY3Ny01NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vsoalQbQ8gIEtx3fJNLAtwqRAbkD7ciCbg_eDWfEufs=)**

clean_body: Republicans are worried | | | Friend, I need you to hear this, because what you do next could change everything: National Republicans just announced they are preparing a MASSIVE attack ad campaign against me. And when Floridians turn on their TVs, they'll be blanketed by GOP lies aimed at ending my historic campaign. Right now, I cannot defend myself without your immediate help, friend. = The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised a record-breaking $104.8 MILLION in 2021. The RNC chair has already attacked me personally, and my team just heard that they're gearing up to run attack ads to defeat me. Republicans are worried that Marco Rubio is only 2 points ahead of me and that election veterans like James Carville think I can win. The GOP knows this race could determine the Senate majority – so they'll spend as much money as it takes to buy this seat. If I don't raise $25,000 before midnight, I won't have the resources to defend myself from Mitch McConnell's committee's desperate attacks. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: The #1 Governor's Race in the Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Michigan is the key swing state in the 2024 Presidential election. We have a real opportunity to flip the state, but I need your help today. | | | |
---
| | | Peter,

The number one Governor's race in the country is in Michigan. We have a real opportunity to flip the state, but I need your help today.

**My name is Michael Brown. I’m a Marine Corps veteran, Captain with the Michigan State Police and a conservative Republican candidate for Governor.**

For the last three years, Gretchen Whitmer has pushed a radical agenda on Michigan's citizens. As a result, her popularity has plummeted and we have an historic opportunity.

Whitmer _devastated small businesses_ with her prolonged lockdown.

She forced Covid patients into nursing homes _needlessly increasing deaths_.

She closed schools and _forced masks on kids_.

She _ordered the shut down of a critical oil pipeline_ in Michigan.

She marched in a “ _defund the police_ ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement.

On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans.

We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and _I need your help today_.

**Will you join me by making a contribution to my campaign? A donation of $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan.**
---
| [DONATE $25 TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=04ed863e9b&e=0636b97700 "DONATE $25 TODAY")
---
| [DONATE $50 TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=82820f3d12&e=0636b97700 "DONATE $50 TODAY")
---
| This campaign requires a hard-working candidate who can take our message to all corners of the state. That’s what I bring to the table.

I have a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems.

In addition, I am the _only candidate_ who has actually won elective office before — having twice been elected a county commissioner.

That’s why I’ve built a steady stream of _endorsements from Sheriffs, Prosecutors, Legislators, and business leaders_.

Rocker Ted Nugent was an early supporter saying, “With Mike as the Governor at the helm of Michigan it can once again be the greatest state in the nation. Right now under Gretchen Whitmer’s failed leadership, Michigan is the laughing stock of America.”
---
|
---
| Peter, Michigan is the key swing state in the 2024 Presidential election. It was pivotal in both 2016 and 2020, and it will be all the more critical in 2024.

_It’s important we sweep the state with an America-first patriot_ so we can turn this state red once again. I’ve put everything into this campaign – all of my chips are on the table to stop Michigan's despotic Governor.

**Will you join me in this campaign? Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing.**

Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
| [HELP FLIP MICHIGAN. MAKE A DONATION TODAY.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=773ad8d63d&e=0636b97700 "HELP FLIP MICHIGAN. MAKE A DONATION TODAY.")
---
|

Contributions to Michael Brown for Governor are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Refund the $12 Billion Surplus to Taxpayers!
body:
| Peter -- As your next governor, I will sunset the income tax. **The current budget surplus is a great place to start, and definitive proof that the state can function without stealing your hard earned income.** With this surplus we could give Minnesota Taxpayers a one year income tax holiday. After Minnesotans get a taste of this freedom, they won't want to go back. We can sunset the income tax **PERMANENTLY** , over the next ten years. This would make Minnesota the first ever state to end an income tax after having one, and is exactly the kind of bold action we need to Save Minnesota. Did you know that roughly $15 Billion of the State Budget comes from the income tax? Just recently the Minnesota Management and Budget Office announced an additional $1.5 Billion in the budget surplus that YOU'VE been overtaxed. **The surplus is being intentionally misrepresented.** The true total is $12 Billion, not $10 Billion. The politicians want you to forget about their tucked away cash in the budget reserves. **We’re not going to.** **** That means we would still have to cut $3 Billion to reach that number, but we can do that with a fresh set of eyes and a business owner's perspective. Another good first step would be slashing pork and voting down **unconstitutional omnibus bills.** If refunded, each taxpayer would receive over **$4,000**! Tim Walz is promoting a plan that would see individuals receiving $175 and couples getting $350. Where is the rest of the money going?! The Walz plan is a slap in the face to our state. Walz has shown time and time again that he does not respect taxpayer money or the taxpayers who fund it! He will continue to push his bloated, heavy-handed, and tyrannical policies through, unless we fight to have **OUR** money returned to **US**. They don’t want **you** , the taxpayer, to be refunded the surplus! Career politicians are no better than Tim Walz! Senate Republicans have a majority, and are failing to represent our conservative ideals. Senators Michelle Benson and Paul Gazelka are behind the Senate GOP plan to not give us back **ANYTHING**! The last time there was a surplus, Senators Jensen, Benson and Gazelka voted to increase funding to the Dayton Administration, take out an extra $1 Billion in debt, and keep the surplus in reserves. **If these Republicans didn't vote their conscience then, how can we trust them in the Governor's office?** The Senate GOP is focused on permanent tax cuts, and I support that! We can give the budget surplus back **AND** slash the income tax for good! **How’s that for a permanent tax cut!** Now that the government proved it can fulfill its role with less money, we need to cut their streams of revenue before they use all of that money up too! This means that we can refund taxpayers, remove the income tax, and still accomplish the government’s core duties. **I'm calling on all conservatives to go to your local party convention this month, and become a delegate to the State Convention to support my campaign. We can Give The Surplus Back and Remove the Income Tax once and for all.** If you are a delegate, you are in charge. All it takes to Save Minnesota is your willingness to commit three days of your time to attend your local and state conventions. Conservatives have a rare opportunity to take back our state. We CANNOT afford to**** let it slip by. YOU can save our state from vaccine/mask mandates, a weak economy, and big government. With your help, we will get you the surplus refund you deserve. **This is our moment. Now let’s win.** Thank you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [www.ElectNeil.com](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDD1Ub6RYh9Vgrrtgs-Sc8qk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refund_12_surplus_to_taxpayers&n=1)
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refund_12_surplus_to_taxpayers&n=2). -=-=-

Senators Michelle Benson and Paul Gazelka are behind the Senate GOP plan to not give us back ANYTHING! The last time there was a surplus, Senators Jensen, Benson and Gazelka voted to increase funding to the Dayton Administration, take out an extra $1 Billion in debt, and keep the surplus in reserves. If these Republicans didn't vote their conscience then, how can we trust them in the Governor's office? The Senate GOP is focused on permanent tax cuts, and I support that! We can give the budget surplus back AND slash the income tax for good! How’s that for a permanent tax cut! Now that the government proved it can fulfill its role with less money, we need to cut their streams of revenue before they use all of that money up too! This means that we can refund taxpayers, remove the income tax, and still accomplish the government’s core duties. I'm calling on all conservatives to go to your local party convention this month, and become a delegate to the State Convention to support my campaign. We can Give The Surplus Back and Remove the Income Tax once and for all. If you are a delegate, you are in charge. All it takes to Save Minnesota is your willingness to commit three days of your time to attend your local and state conventions. Conservatives have a rare opportunity to take back our state. We CANNOT afford to let it slip by. YOU can save our state from vaccine/mask mandates, a weak economy, and big government. With your help, we will get you the surplus refund you deserve. This is our moment. Now let’s win.** Thank you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor -=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States

body:
I want to know what you think [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=cc578740a355496887b2a64a53a4f4cf&_e=qV1cb8Fn5Ci7Z8B9ebQdSXGPzSKdoXwx1A5W4eAf_VSLaz_sPkKpkdyS26Wsi7HMXS6RN83z3nCsye9Tx8zi3bR88rFA-Gu8OChCMYA6p7gPqRAZoBs-uiLz9XbNH15yuvkN1ROzZEpg7YXWi5iRgpXs9GYka5Ge_0pOLlYWH7ShKOaS_GwkbFWEjnlphMWp6oIM214150h8KEuiedscyZojgLE4KVxbWRwE7GzDLrmM6HapHDbznIsMK3WHbKINUwVsexTFh4UXAPFfMGevIHfy9vYQ2pY6pNiT7PqXBrs8PdK0S8qXFjvPo1dYq_j2EDsY0dGwgP9zgdtGvTh-yg%3D%3D) Hi Peter, It goes without saying — Russia has put the world on edge. Your opinion is very important to me, so I wanted to ask one quick question: [**Do you think American leadership is weaker under President Biden and Speaker Pelosi?**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=cc578740a355496887b2a64a53a4f4cf&_e=qV1cb8Fn5Ci7Z8B9ebQdSXGPzSKdoXwx1A5W4eAf_VSLaz_sPkKpkdyS26Wsi7HMXS6RN83z3nCsye9Tx8zi3bR88rFA-Gu8OChCMYA6p7gPqRAZoBs-uiLz9XbNH15yqYgWFzARz0tugia8dsyJzQsvDcsvFLwiOaXUTCFfYtuIqV3CX85fgJLzMmoSgBlQkMMTS8CorqlZ-zW81r1KhvhU_CgVDfrcYQgNeXp1ez4h6uOSJRdgGrBgOVFTNi9R42MsXm7etEKrzgExxnE848GvOQQwX-u1cqzPwe2AVEFQkUUE75HHa2BQnY-G-piI42trQvESWsd9ESgI7zWBaA%3D%3D) [**Yes

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9545%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ByStpvqI4y596O3bisRQWw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14426%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=25nkW3EtTw04rLhsmVRoJg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BH7EK60Td8gD%2fbSncoZtBg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BH7EK60Td8gD%2fbSncoZtBg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9545%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ByStpvqI4y596O3bisRQWw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9545%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ByStpvqI4y596O3bisRQWw&sysid=1)

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Bob Healey Jr.
subject: Biden’s SOTU was full of deceit, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress, Inc
body:
Sent from my iPhone | |
---
Friend,

I just watched Biden’s State of the Union, and while I can’t say I’m surprised, I am really disappointed.

This administration has brought disastrous consequences upon the people of New Jersey and America, and tonight, all we heard were more lies.

Biden keeps saying that his policies are going to boost our economy, but where are the results? We’re seeing skyrocketing inflation, huge spikes on our grocery bills, and an ever-rising cost of gas that will only get worse.

We need to be energy independent, not dependent on foreign countries like China and Russia.

Friend, our problems stem from bad leadership in Washington. Good leaders take fault and search for solutions when things go wrong.

But Biden and the Democrats in Congress have lied and doubled-down as their policies bankrupt America.

That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. The insanity in DC needs to end, and it will only be stopped if hard-working people like us step up.

Will you help me take back New Jersey’s 3rd in 2022 by chipping in to my campaign?

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: We see through Biden’s lies on crime
body:
If you found yourself disappointed in Biden's State of the Union address last night, you weren’t alone...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015pBOozf-6w0ygDr2TnR0_el8tkrcdt5lhxUUhRaIWi8pOPr-2fBzGTIwj_2ngdgX-9UQn5sJwyTroPJlECdMJMOkvwCFWw_W5Y3T3uLgrbfAC4lCODZ1sd5aez65JpMTq3ewfxH8qTXQZOat32bA0Tr6uHavo2qvMb_dMx7JIUd9YEdBRVD6-KT1mwfGd4BIy5X6s-pVX4J0tuEnGS5EKpgwFZ8nKwvh&c=XGuOKhy1tFRPd7vozVzUUOfzEQaaSqdNINQoTNGvzS87kR0ExRFrDw==&ch=h7kpjFG-b2wXS_pL9T1coLrTOJjstz59PMqUfKgybtf22fVyfmqmDA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
If you found yourself disappointed in Biden's State of the Union address last night, you weren't alone...
Just 41% of folks found his speech to be "Very Positive," marking the lowest rating for the speech in 15 years.
And maybe that's because - just like with Steve Sisolak's recent tax-payer funded State of the State debacle - voters saw right through the lies.
Just like Sisolak tried to do last week, Joe Biden attempted to convince the country that he and his party were always pro-police. Apparently, he expects us to think it's just a coincidence that the 14 American cities currently experiencing an ALL TIME HIGH in homicides are all Democrat-run.
And despite Biden desperately trying to correct the record now that he's seen the poll numbers, we aren't going to forget the Democrat calls to DEFUND our police departments even as riots broke out across the country. This is NOT going to be swept under the rug by Biden and Sisolak - [we're going to remember in November!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015pBOozf-6w0ygDr2TnR0_el8tkrcdt5lhxUUhRaIWi8pOPr-2fBzGTIwj_2ngdgX-9UQn5sJwyTroPJlECdMJMOkvwCFWw_W5Y3T3uLgrbfAC4lCODZ1sd5aez65JpMTq3ewfxH8qTXQZOat32bA0Tr6uHavo2qvMb_dMx7JIUd9YEdBRVD6-KT1mwfGd4BIy5X6s-pVX4J0tuEnGS5EKpgwFZ8nKwvh&c=XGuOKhy1tFRPd7vozVzUUOfzEQaaSqdNINQoTNGvzS87kR0ExRFrDw==&ch=h7kpjFG-b2wXS_pL9T1coLrTOJjstz59PMqUfKgybtf22fVyfmqmDA==)

name: Liz Walters, Ohio Democrats
subject: How your contributions help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey there,

I just want to take a moment to say: Thank you.

I know your inboxes were full over the last week as we were up against our February end-of-month deadline. Ensuring we stay on track to hit our monthly fundraising goals is no easy task, and thanks to your generous support, we were able to reach our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal!

Your continued support is a crucial part of our plan to flip Ohio blue in 2022. With you at our side, we will continue to build the infrastructure needed to flip Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, hold onto the House majority, and elect Democrats to every level of government -- all while we continue to hold Ohio Republicans accountable to voters.

But I'll be honest, hitting our February end-of-month fundraising goal was only the beginning. We need to keep our eyes on the future. Republicans are still refusing to pass fair election maps, attacking the right to choose, and stalling progress under Joe Biden's administration. We can't stop fighting.

We're prepared to fight tooth and nail in order to protect Ohio's future. I hope we can continue to count on your support.

Thank you,

Liz

Liz Walters
Chair
Ohio Democratic Party

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/odp-march22?refcode=em22_220302_eomty_enask_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220302_eomty_enask_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Greg wins, and Jessica heads to runoff in Texas!
body:
We’re expanding our progressive bloc in Congress and we need to keep it going.
#
Peter,
It’s official: Greg Casar won his Texas primary for the U.S. House and Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff election in TX-28 against Henry Cuellar! We now have another Justice Democrat in a blue district primed to join the Squad in Congress, and more work to do to help Jessica win her primary runoff in May.
We’re expanding our progressive bloc in Congress and we need to keep it going. This is just the kind of momentum Justice Democrats needs heading into Jessica’s runoff and our other 2022 primaries.
**There’s a lot of work left to do, especially with Jessica facing off against Henry Cuellar again in May.**
[Split a $3 contribution right now to Jessica and Justice Democrats to help us keep up this momentum and lift Jessica to victory against Cuellar. We can continue rocking the political world, one primary at a time, expanding the Squad with every victory.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96913?refcode=em20220302-22223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22223%2E1203867%2EK8ka7L)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96913?refcode=em20220302-22223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22223%2E1203867%2EK8ka7L)**
Just a few years ago, no one thought we could elect Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. In 2020, no one thought we could do it again and defeat the Democratic establishment — then, we elected Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush. Now, Greg has defeated the establishment and Jessica is facing off against Cuellar once again in May.
We were with Jessica when she launched her first campaign in 2019 and we’ve been with her every step of the way. And she’s, again, up against the most conservative Democrat in the House, a 17-year incumbent with millions in his campaign coffers from corporate PACs, lobbyists and GOP mega-donors. Her continued fight is a testament to what we can do as a movement when we organize and put in the work.
[We have more work to do, upending the status quo, helping Jessica win her primary runoff election, and electing more Justice Democrats to Congress. Can you split a $3 donation to Jessica and Justice Democrats right now to keep up our momentum?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96913?refcode=em20220302-22223&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22223%2E1203867%2EK8ka7L)
We’ll have a lot more to say, and we have a lot more work to do.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. clean_body: We’re expanding our progressive bloc in Congress and we need to keep it going. Peter, It’s official: Greg Casar won his Texas primary for the U.S. House and Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff election in TX-28 against Henry Cuellar! We now have another Justice Democrat in a blue district primed to join the Squad in Congress, and more work to do to help Jessica win her primary runoff in May. We’re expanding our progressive bloc in Congress and we need to keep it going. This is just the kind of momentum Justice Democrats needs heading into Jessica’s runoff and our other 2022 primaries. There’s a lot of work left to do, especially with Jessica facing off against Henry Cuellar again in May. Just a few years ago, no one thought we could elect Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. In 2020, no one thought we could do it again and defeat the Democratic establishment — then, we elected Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush. Now, Greg has defeated the establishment and Jessica is facing off against Cuellar once again in May. We were with Jessica when she launched her first campaign in 2019 and we’ve been with her every step of the way. And she’s, again, up against the most conservative Democrat in the House, a 17-year incumbent with millions in his campaign coffers from corporate PACs, lobbyists and GOP mega-donors. Her continued fight is a testament to what we can do as a movement when we organize and put in the work. We’ll have a lot more to say, and we have a lot more work to do. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. body:
| | | Peter, last night, $15 an hour won. Medicare for All won. The PRO Act won. Reproductive rights won. Immigrant rights won. The Movement for Black lives won. LGBTQIA+ rights won. Working families won.
**And it’s all thanks to your hard work. I am so grateful. We won this race with over 60% of the vote.**[**You can watch my thank you speech here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42481039/333096506/-1835333091?refcode=03.02_email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGVkYTcyMC02MDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwuewaFKnTc3zgNP30YEkykU57t85nan0Bkdt0O4K9w=)

| [ ](https://mogop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYpnF0IhKIBgCmRyhsL8qJbyDo66vI_onSTAH-26KtHM9Tsc7Ae_aYRWzc76xIBP7zGskYuKwSYWH6n97T3OaCJPmTsQ8_SXVB1suhoGbFPNkR62va4Q6KVW_n7vW_4yLyUemU3wRAnTT0BUh5h32nWv9O5a9OgQ3_9KNmqHhk792g8murAJaH0JN2hs4WhRFzo2FOHxtLs7ny09_Er1dBv3G0bjjSl_9KLd_eBSwgWElyjNihbDCXXUKWkM51Y8IDfIy5s_1D2v1D7u5L-tsrPeJQLUyluBPC24Hxg6MnX5y3gSKVQ4WD-CilAVSq-3BWlWw6YnZuhW26QqcfnFBAqOKTuq3aA8zsc2bB3R0wyJRRq4V7yA2n8CiSVTWuZ0zH2xm-bZ44h4PMxyvMVxFwdLTJgH7aSeDvenl6sk2PqXd0ZdaPaOlkT8H84FBD-xpKi80_SClz7BxpxWhHyzWRl9H7x0qU063QhocTebahgG_7wwEUdZRs32KLxexLZR4SX84JdaiS6iuaB10JBgBNiuXNPADFkIXiFbuS6pgNyZCE-zFQgPMTuv6g_4WfCLrzMq4Qf3zpnhIy_d5s_eZgkS-c4-jIDvILNlp9NLsoHDjKZL8MYafAAoJe46LPfrj2W92voFO7AxZ0aIYaKZIGjE&e=0dfd3a06cfe3c611511abac6047b8f95&utm_source=mogop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=174208833953754077&n=1) Peter, The State of the Union under Sleepy Joe Biden is **WEAK!** _The American People are strong, but Joe Biden’s weakness is infecting our country and eroding our security._ In Afghanistan, and now in Ukraine, America’s adversaries have seized on this moment -- with a president that isn’t up to the job -- to press their advantage and put our nation on its heels. name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Jim=20Banks?=
subject: THIS is who we need in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN
body:
Jennifer-Ruth Green is the leader we need in Congress! Click or tap >> | | | | [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=34ad3ffa7c&e=683c601116)
---
| | | Peter,

You know me. I have served Hoosiers and the State of Indiana for 12 years, first in the State Senate, then in the halls of Congress. During that time, I have fought hard for conservative values – from our second amendment rights to fighting to stop the rampant inflation we’re seeing as a result of the current administration’s policies, in a slim minority the fight is harder than ever before. Frankly, conservatives in Congress need backup.

Now, one such conservative leader has emerged to take the fight to the leftists and take BACK this incredibly important seat – and with it, help usher in a new Republican majority in Congress.. I’m so proud of all the work that she has put in, and I am proud today to add my endorsement to her effort to fix Washington, DC.
---
| [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=3ebb95a57b&e=683c601116 "CHIP IN NOW >>")
---
| As an active-duty servicemember, Jennifer-Ruth serves as a Commander on the Indiana Air National Guard base right here in my own district. I am thankful for her service!

If you agree we need more conservative leaders like Jennifer-Ruth Green, [**_please chip in a few dollars right now_**](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=31ec84ed90&e=683c601116) to help her hit her fundraising goals before the upcoming deadline. It is critically important that we defeat Frank Mrvan and flip this seat RED in 2022, so that we can take back our Republican majority in Congress.

_We need your support to make this happen,__Peter_ _!_
For Indiana and America,
Congressman Jim Banks
---

name: Elana Schrager, CaraveoForCongress.com
subject: March is a critical month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42457578/333036042/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220302critmonth_esc4c_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA4YjY2ZS0zOTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2zJtPHO09yF_s8_nEPQzqSw7n-es9lCsOBSUNkjnnw=)
---
Hey Peter — Elana here, Dr. Caraveo’s campaign manager. It’s the second day of the month, which means I’d normally be sending you a simple thank you email. **Supporters like you helped us hit our February goal of $15,000 in online grassroots donations. Thank you — you’re what makes our campaign possible!** But because March is going to be the most critical month so far, I wanted to lay out for our most committed supporters what’s in store over the next few weeks, and [**why we’ll need your support more than ever.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42457583/333036049/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220302critmonth_esc4c_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA4YjY2ZS0zOTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2zJtPHO09yF_s8_nEPQzqSw7n-es9lCsOBSUNkjnnw=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42457588/333036054/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220302critmonth_esc4c_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA4YjY2ZS0zOTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2zJtPHO09yF_s8_nEPQzqSw7n-es9lCsOBSUNkjnnw=)
---
**First** , this weekend is the precinct caucuses, where voters in local precincts will gather to discuss candidates and platforms, and start the process of selecting delegates to send to the Congressional nominating assembly in April.
**Then** , the deadline for candidates to submit petition signatures to get on the ballot is March 15. We’ll be out in the community every spare moment leading up to this deadline, knocking on doors, talking to voters, and gathering support for Dr. Caraveo’s campaign.
While candidates technically only need _either_ a critical mass of support from the caucuses _or_ to collect enough signatures, our campaign is covering all the bases so that we can reach as many people as possible. **We’re leaving no stone unturned, because we know that this race is going to be incredibly close.**
**Finally** , March 31 marks the end of this year’s first quarter. As the last full quarter before the primaries, I cannot emphasize enough how absolutely crucial this fundraising deadline is. Quarterly filings are how outside observers will gauge the strength of our campaign against our competitors, and we must do everything we can to ensure that we capture the full strength of Dr. Caraveo’s grassroots support.
As you can see, there’s a lot going on, and it’s all hugely important to the success of our campaign. [**We’ll need your help to do it all — can you make a donation of any amount TODAY to help us start the month strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42457597/333036059/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220302critmonth_esc4c_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA4YjY2ZS0zOTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q2zJtPHO09yF_s8_nEPQzqSw7n-es9lCsOBSUNkjnnw=)

clean_body: | = Hey Peter — Elana here, Dr. Caraveo’s campaign manager. It’s the second day of the month, which means I’d normally be sending you a simple thank you email. Supporters like you helped us hit our February goal of $15,000 in online grassroots donations. Thank you — you’re what makes our campaign possible! But because March is going to be the most critical month so far, I wanted to lay out for our most committed supporters what’s in store over the next few weeks, and = | = First , this weekend is the precinct caucuses, where voters in local precincts will gather to discuss candidates and platforms, and start the process of selecting delegates to send to the Congressional nominating assembly in April. Then , the deadline for candidates to submit petition signatures to get on the ballot is March 15. We’ll be out in the community every spare moment leading up to this deadline, knocking on doors, talking to voters, and gathering support for Dr. Caraveo’s campaign. While candidates technically only need either a critical mass of support from the caucuses or to collect enough signatures, our campaign is covering all the bases so that we can reach as many people as possible. We’re leaving no stone unturned, because we know that this race is going to be incredibly close. Finally , March 31 marks the end of this year’s first quarter. As the last full quarter before the primaries, I cannot emphasize enough how absolutely crucial this fundraising deadline is. Quarterly filings are how outside observers will gauge the strength of our campaign against our competitors, and we must do everything we can to ensure that we capture the full strength of Dr. Caraveo’s grassroots support. As you can see, there’s a lot going on, and it’s all hugely important to the success of our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks, Elana Schrager Campaign Manager | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Peter Willis,
I want to know what you think.

It’s no secret that Joe Biden has always been prone to gaffes. The media has always brushed it off as “silly” or made jokes about it.

But after a year of watching Joe Biden destroy our country as President, a growing number of Americans have legitimate concerns about whether Biden is cognitively fit to be our Commander-in-Chief.

Let’s look at the facts:
\- He has embarrassed the United States on a global stage by falling asleep at a UN conference
\- He has fallen multiple times trying to walk up the stairs of Air Force One
\- He can barely string a sentence together without looking at notes prepared by his staff
\- He looks to be in a constant state of confusion
\- And he has snapped at reporters during press conferences
The President of the United States is supposed to be the Leader of the Free World, but Biden isn’t showcasing much strength or confidence to the American people.

That is why I want to know if you think Joe Biden is cognitively fit to serve as our Commander-in-Chief and Head of State.

clean_body: | | | | Once and for all. | Peter Willis, I want to know what you think. It’s no secret that Joe Biden has always been prone to gaffes. The media has always brushed it off as “silly” or made jokes about it. But after a year of watching Joe Biden destroy our country as President, a growing number of Americans have legitimate concerns about whether Biden is cognitively fit to be our Commander-in-Chief. Let’s look at the facts: \- He has embarrassed the United States on a global stage by falling asleep at a UN conference \- He has fallen multiple times trying to walk up the stairs of Air Force One \- He can barely string a sentence together without looking at notes prepared by his staff \- He looks to be in a constant state of confusion \- And he has snapped at reporters during press conferences The President of the United States is supposed to be the Leader of the Free World, but Biden isn’t showcasing much strength or confidence to the American people. That is why I want to know if you think Joe Biden is cognitively fit to serve as our Commander-in-Chief and Head of State. As a top supporter of my campaign, I value your opinion, Peter Willis. Make sure to take this poll within the next hour to make sure I see your response. Thank you, Lou Barletta Republican Front-Runner | | | | If you prefer to contribute by check, please mail a check to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The REAL State of our Union
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
RINOs gave Biden a standing ovation. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066201?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3fcfa7fe41&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Last night, the **illegitimate senile puppet** who calls himself the President gave his first State of the Union speech.

**__The most disgusting thing about the charade was seeing REPUBLICANS give the Fake President a STANDING OVATION!__**

_What were those RINOs clapping for?_

Was it for our soaring hyperinflation?

Was it for the gas that now costs up to $5 a gallon?

Was it for the empty shelves at the market?

Was it for pushing Russia into the arms of China and creating a deadly alliance through the malicious mismanagement of our foreign policy?

Was it for the prospect of nuclear war?

Was it for skyrocketing crime in our absolutely Third World cities?

Was it for the one million Americans killed by drug overdoses in the last 20 years?

Was it for the controlled demolition of the Dollar and our economy?

Was it for the DESTRUCTION of our Southern Border and the aiding and abetting of an INVASION of millions of criminals into our country?

Was it for the deadly COVID injections or the other tyrannical COVID mandates?

**The REAL State of our Union is horrific.**

__We are losing our country, and the Republicans who are supposed to fighting the Left for us are instead CHEERING for Biden and Pelosi, COLLABORATING with the Enemy!__

They’re all clapping and patting each other on the back, laughing at the same sick joke.

_And we’re the punchline. You and me, We the People._

**It’s time for a new Republican Party.

A REAL Republican Party.**

**You won’t EVER see me clapping for Senile Brandon. You won’t EVER see me work with the Left. The days of compromise are OVER.**

**[_Send a FIGHTER like me to D.C._

_Punish these RINO Traitors by throwing them out on their rear ends so we can finally take the gloves off and DESTROY the Left._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e8af7962b6&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e1568c3731&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=66eaad5f1a&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a378f7e77b&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

subject: WATCH: I did a FB Live on the REAL State of the SWAMP
body:

| | Peter,
---
| Whenever their corrupt agenda falls short, Washington elitists almost always fall back on attacking our basic 2nd Amendment Rights.

Radical extremists won’t stop until they have the power to take away our God-given rights and replace it with endless mandates, decrees, and socialist power grabs.
**If they can take away our 2nd Amendment Rights, all of our rights are at stake.**

It’s time we remind these out-of-touch elitists that the Right of the people to keep and bear arms _**SHALL NOT BE INFRINGED.**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: Why I’m running for State Senate
body:
Please read | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ef7403f88b&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

It’s tough to talk about this, but it needs to be said. Here is why I ended my campaign for Congress, but pivoted to running for State Senate.

This is what happened:

Every 10 years, states are required to update their legislative boundaries for both State and Federal offices based on the previous years' census.

In 2020, an amendment to the Virginia Constitution was adopted to establish a redistricting commission composed of state legislators and citizens of the commonwealth.

The commission had maps drawn and submitted to the Supreme Court of Virginia, which this year were unanimously approved and went into affect on January 1, 2022.

The State Senate district that I live in is an open seat, and instead of not staying true to my word of helping my community, I decided to run for Virginia State Senate!

With your help we can win Virginia’s 12th State Senate District.

The State Senate still has a Democrat majority and if we want to accomplish Governor Youngkin's agenda, he is going to need Proud Republicans next to him.

And I want that to be that Republican Leader.

My daughter still stands with me and I hope you do too.

Sincerely,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=2cf3899b32&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez

clean_body: Please read | | | | | Friend, It’s tough to talk about this, but it needs to be said. Here is why I ended my campaign for Congress, but pivoted to running for State Senate. This is what happened: Every 10 years, states are required to update their legislative boundaries for both State and Federal offices based on the previous years' census. In 2020, an amendment to the Virginia Constitution was adopted to establish a redistricting commission composed of state legislators and citizens of the commonwealth. The commission had maps drawn and submitted to the Supreme Court of Virginia, which this year were unanimously approved and went into affect on January 1, 2022. The State Senate district that I live in is an open seat, and instead of not staying true to my word of helping my community, I decided to run for Virginia State Senate! With your help we can win Virginia’s 12th State Senate District. The State Senate still has a Democrat majority and if we want to accomplish Governor Youngkin's agenda, he is going to need Proud Republicans next to him. And I want that to be that Republican Leader. My daughter still stands with me and I hope you do too. Sincerely, Tina Ramirez | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Ramirez for Virginia, Inc., All rights reserved. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1413%2E878179%2EkAeutq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1413%2E878179%2EkAeutq).**

name: Team Nikki
subject: watch desantis yell at high schoolers
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Watch this [https://twitter.com/EvanDonovan/status/1499086276519239680] and try not to be angry.

That’s right — a couple of hours ago, Ron DeSantis yelled at high school students for wearing masks.

This isn’t how a Governor behaves, Peter. This isn’t how any reasonable adult behaves. This is the behavior of a petulant, wannabe dictator who’s too weak to tolerate dissent from anyone — even teenagers looking out for their health and the health of their families. Shame on him.

It seems like we shouldn’t have to say this, but Florida deserves a Governor who won’t bully students. And we can promise you right now that Nikki will never yell at high schoolers (obviously).

We need a real adult in the Governor’s office, and, clearly, we don’t have one. If you’re ready for a Governor who supports our students instead of berating them, click here to chip in $20 and help us defeat DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=302desantisvid]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Join us in honoring Team Cole’s MVP’s and a fundraiser celebration hosted by the Wilson Store. This game is ours to win - are you #AboutThatAction? [Get your tickets now!](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=055f5a96db&e=339f142c50)

| Hello Team Curry! Coming to you live with a campaign update from David’s time on the trail! David has been working nonstop talking to voters all over the district about bringing our conservative Georgia values to Congress. Now more than ever, it is critical that we send a strong conservative to Congress who will listen to We The People and have our best interests. name: Chairman Stepanek
subject: Did you watch Biden's State of the Union Address lastnight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
We want your feedback...
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Ffebruary-2022-general-donation/1/0100017f4b3e2cbf-6a4a4900-88b1-4557-bb99-eac4f480ec41-000000/ZvdHMl00TWoNgMmor0Ba9qfMZww=260)

Dear Friend,

Last night President Biden gave his State of the Union, and he couldn't be more disillusioned to the struggles facing American families. Our team at The New Hampshire Republican Party is working hard to elect Republican leaders who will reverse the damage done by this Administration. Rising inflation, gas & heat prices through the roof, spiking crime rates, unstable borders, the list goes on....

President Biden may be ignoring Americans, but we know your voice is important, and want to know what you think. Tell us below by making a donation to where you think President Biden has failed Americans most severely!

Let's take our country back in 2022 --[donate today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716925:Jwhgs4EN8:m:1:3317145305:48883D58F6988FF7903B1498912CE4FF:r) and help us ensure victory!

Lauren Boebert

subject: Congressman Madison Cawthorn Endorses Phil Rizzo for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/cawthorn-endorsement?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | **Congressman Madison Cawthorn**
**Endorses Phil Rizzo for Congress** _March 2, 2022_
---
| _For Immediate Release_
Contact: joanna@theresolute.group

NEW VERNON, NJ – Phil Rizzo is pleased to have the endorsement of Congressman Madison Cawthorn of North Carolina’s 11th district, and a member of the Freedom Caucus.

“Phil Rizzo is a fighter,” said Cawthorn. “He’s not going to bow to the left or the Establishment RINOS in Congress. Far too many fake Republicans say they’ll run to change Washington and then fail on their promises. Phil is the real deal, and I need him by my side in the D.C. swamp. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Phil for Congress in New Jersey’s 7th Congressional district. He will not let us down. New Jersey, send me Phil Rizzo!”

Rizzo called Cawthorn “the right kind of fighter” in Washington and said, “I am grateful for his support and look forward to joining him in the fight to take back the people’s Congress.”
###
---

Far too many fake Republicans say they’ll run to change Washington and then fail on their promises. Phil is the real deal, and I need him by my side in the D.C. swamp. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Phil for Congress in New Jersey’s 7th Congressional district. He will not let us down. New Jersey, send me Phil Rizzo!” Rizzo called Cawthorn “the right kind of fighter” in Washington and said, “I am grateful for his support and look forward to joining him in the fight to take back the people’s Congress.” | | | PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS. | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: Phil Rizzo for Congress PO Box 162 New Vernon, NJ 07976 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: here’s where I stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
I know this is going to be a tough race. But nothing worthwhile in life comes easy.

Team, It often feels like my right-wing Republican opponents in this race are living in the past. Whether relitigating the 2020 presidential election, threatening to strip away Nevadans’ reproductive rights, or working to make it harder to vote, my opponents want to drag Nevada backward. **But let’s be clear, Friends: This election is about the present — all we’ve accomplished together to get to this point — and where we go in the future.** The last thing our nine MAGA opponents want to do is acknowledge Nevada’s progress over the past three years, all while going through the worst pandemic in a century. **Here are some accomplishments we’ve made together that my opponents don’t want to talk about:**
* **Increased access to affordable health care** for Nevadans
* **Increased funding for public education** , so every child can succeed
* **Increased state government support for small businesses** to help them through the pandemic
* **Expanded access to reproductive freedom** by eliminating barriers and investing in comprehensive family planning services
* **Increased voting accessibility** by expanding automatic voter registration and making voting by mail or in-person easier than ever
* **Raised Nevada’s minimum wage** to lift Nevada’s hardworking families
* **Increased pay for Nevada’s state workers**

I know our opponents’ strategy depends on painting the darkest picture possible of how things are going in Nevada. Truthfully, I find it sad that any good news about how things are going seems to scare them. Here’s what else I know: **Election experts rank Nevada as one state most at risk to flip red.** That’s why Republicans and their dark money special interest groups are already dumping millions into this race. **[So, team, we could lose the progress we’re making in a heartbeat. I’m asking for your help to continue building a stronger Nevada and keep our battleground state blue. Can I count on you to chip in $15 for my re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42483557/333110957/-1382373466?refcode=email_030222_whereistand&amount=15&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODUzOTE5My02OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5GCOc3qsR3yC3aYc53SDysAAwUGORs3E35W-XDSU38=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42483558/333110958/-1382373466?refcode=email_030222_whereistand&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODUzOTE5My02OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5GCOc3qsR3yC3aYc53SDysAAwUGORs3E35W-XDSU38=)

subject: Will you help make sure that Texans see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Help us keep this ad in front of Texans.
#
It’s official:
After yesterday’s primary night victory, Beto will be facing off against Greg Abbott in November.
**So to mark the start of the general election, we just launched a brand-new ad** as Beto kicks off his statewide “People of Texas Campaign.” Beto will be back on the road connecting with thousands of Texans across the state to bring people together around his positive, popular, and unifying vision for Texas.
**[Will you watch our brand new ad and then chip in $3 to help make sure that we’re able to get it in front of as many Texans as possible this week?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53626?refcode=ema20220302-178595&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178595%2E444211%2EBWHG8S)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Brnovich?=
subject: MARCH Newsletter — Mark Brnovich Defends Public Charge Rule before the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
Brno Brigade on the March in Arizona | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/march-2022?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| I want to begin by acknowledging the tragedy in Ukraine. My family traces our roots to Eastern Europe, and it hits home to see our neighbors embroiled in conflict. We fled to America in order to escape the political violence of Communism. I extend my solidarity to the Ukrainian people and my prayers are with them.
February was a busy month in the Attorney General’s office and on the campaign trail. Last Wednesday, I had the privilege to defend the Public Charge Rule in oral arguments before the Supreme Court of the United States. While other candidates posture for attention, I am the only one fighting back against the Biden administration’s destructive agenda head first.
In February, I fought for [veterans rights](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=caec1e4377&e=6dcd2506d1), fought to strike down the [Biden administration’s illegal minimum wage hike](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=012282a313&e=6dcd2506d1), and most recently argued before the SCOTUS to defend a sound, internationally normal, century-long immigration policy that requires non-citizens to be able to support themselves without being a burden on public resources designed to protect Americans in need. See my Op-Ed on this argument [HERE](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=309a21a19a&e=6dcd2506d1).
As your Attorney General and a lifelong Arizonan, I’m committed to protecting YOU. The United States is a land full of opportunity because we remain steadfast in our commitment to the rule of law. Lawlessness has overwhelmed our Southern border and has put our way of life at risk. In January alone, Customs and Border Patrol saw “[a substantial increase of fentanyl interdictions](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=d580cfe52c&e=6dcd2506d1)” and 154,000 illegal migrants were encountered at our Southern border (almost twice as many as January of last year). Every month, the Left sends Washington out of control and Biden turns a blind eye as narcotics and human smuggling flood across our border. I’m running for the Senate on the same philosophy I live by every day at the AG’s office: uphold the rule of law, protect Arizonans, and secure American opportunity.

To qualify for the ballot I need to collect 7,387 signatures and we are just four weeks away from the deadline. It's free and only takes a minute. Would you send this [online nominating petition link](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=13d38824ca&e=6dcd2506d1) to at least one family member or friend?
---
|
---
| Mark Brnovich
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: Brno Brigade on the March in Arizona | | | | | | | | | | | | I want to begin by acknowledging the tragedy in Ukraine. My family traces our roots to Eastern Europe, and it hits home to see our neighbors embroiled in conflict. We fled to America in order to escape the political violence of Communism. I extend my solidarity to the Ukrainian people and my prayers are with them. February was a busy month in the Attorney General’s office and on the campaign trail. Last Wednesday, I had the privilege to defend the Public Charge Rule in oral arguments before the Supreme Court of the United States. While other candidates posture for attention, I am the only one fighting back against the Biden administration’s destructive agenda head first. In February, I fought for , fought to strike down the , and most recently argued before the SCOTUS to defend a sound, internationally normal, century-long immigration policy that requires non-citizens to be able to support themselves without being a burden on public resources designed to protect Americans in need. See my Op-Ed on this argument . As your Attorney General and a lifelong Arizonan, I’m committed to protecting YOU. The United States is a land full of opportunity because we remain steadfast in our commitment to the rule of law. Lawlessness has overwhelmed our Southern border and has put our way of life at risk. In January alone, Customs and Border Patrol saw “” and 154,000 illegal migrants were encountered at our Southern border (almost twice as many as January of last year). Every month, the Left sends Washington out of control and Biden turns a blind eye as narcotics and human smuggling flood across our border. I’m running for the Senate on the same philosophy I live by every day at the AG’s office: uphold the rule of law, protect Arizonans, and secure American opportunity. To qualify for the ballot I need to collect 7,387 signatures and we are just four weeks away from the deadline. It's free and only takes a minute. Would you send this to at least one family member or friend? | | Mark Brnovich | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | 1. 2. 3. 4. | | | | | Connect with us: | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE. | Copyright © 2022 Brnovich for Senate, All rights reserved. name: Mike Waltz
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
I want to personally thank you for all your support during our end of month push. Peter, I want to personally thank you for all your support during our end of month push. Thanks to you, we were able to meet our goal and get _one step closer_ to taking back the House with a strong, Republican majority.
Between the war in Ukraine and the supply chain crisis plaguing our country, we can’t trust our President to lead us.
_That’s why conservative leadership is more important than EVER._
Together, we can make America strong again - but with Election Day getting closer by the minute, we need to act quickly if we’re going to finish this fight.
[**Pitch in TODAY to take back the House with strong, conservative leaders who will MAKE AMERICA STRONG body:
February was a HUGE month for our campaign, but with your help, we crushed it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484036/333113412/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220302EOMTY_EOM_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNhMzViOS02YjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKnOrPVH20EpU3ImbjeVvXjDkvUJuAc2Kp0z6D6rUNo=)
Friend, we did it. Together, we beat our February fundraising goal!
Thanks to you, we surpassed what we thought was possible for February – this could not have happened without you! I am very grateful for your sacrifices to get us here.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484037/333113413/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220302EOMTY_EOM_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNhMzViOS02YjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKnOrPVH20EpU3ImbjeVvXjDkvUJuAc2Kp0z6D6rUNo=)
**I will continue to fight for our democracy because our government only works when it is open, honest, and accountable to the people it serves. But I'm so glad you’re committed, right along with me, to protecting our fundamental right to vote and keeping New Mexico elections clean, fair, safe, and accessible.**
As we continue to move New Mexico forward, I’m glad to know that I’ve got you by my side.
With gratitude,
Maggie Toulouse Oliver
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484039/333113414/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220302EOMTY_EOM_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNhMzViOS02YjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKnOrPVH20EpU3ImbjeVvXjDkvUJuAc2Kp0z6D6rUNo=)
[**P.S. - Let’s kick March off to a great start! Can you help us keep moving our campaign forward by chipping in a quick $10 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484040/333113415/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220302EOMTY_EOM_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNhMzViOS02YjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKnOrPVH20EpU3ImbjeVvXjDkvUJuAc2Kp0z6D6rUNo=)
