clean_body: February was a HUGE month for our campaign, but with your help, we crushed it. = Friend, we did it. Together, we beat our February fundraising goal! Thanks to you, we surpassed what we thought was possible for February – this could not have happened without you! I am very grateful for your sacrifices to get us here. = I will continue to fight for our democracy because our government only works when it is open, honest, and accountable to the people it serves. But I'm so glad you’re committed, right along with me, to protecting our fundamental right to vote and keeping New Mexico elections clean, fair, safe, and accessible. As we continue to move New Mexico forward, I’m glad to know that I’ve got you by my side. With gratitude, Maggie Toulouse Oliver = = Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> _____= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I’m formally endorsing Brittany Pettersen for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484174/333113724/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDNhMzViOS02YjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qLZPVVJ08zBqQrirZb0Y0wf69Rx7thsjj3kXyWLMi0=)
Folks, For nearly a decade, Brittany Pettersen has fought for Colorado in our state legislature — first in the State House and then in the State Senate. She understands the obstacles facing Colorado families from accessible public education to affordable child care, and now she’s running to represent Colorado’s 7th Congressional District in the U.S. House. You will be hard-pressed to find someone who cares more and works harder than Brittany. She brings experience and perspectives that we desperately need in Washington, so I hope you’ll join me in supporting her in this race. Plus — Brittany worked for me on my very first election and helped me win a tough race for U.S. Senate. The National GOP has already set its sights on Colorado, so Brittany is facing a tough race. name: Team Sullivan Highlights
subject: 🚨 Two MAJOR events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
If you missed these, we’ve got you covered with the top highlights. | |
---
Team,

Last week we had two majorly successful campaign events with the announcement of our Safe Streets Leadership Council and our Save Illinois kickoff rally. With big milestones like these, saving Illinois feels closer than ever.

[🚨](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=c19b6cc1550c42e49a398535d7732564&_e=TqaznPc8i9xxYzvBUrw9Aj8_9g9RirSoozkYSE_viPSaay2yG9Yn91F_-xQ1fQLnLvQXgw1SOi9Y8QoAeIiIYvBLIMqweaw0CxI10uyWvt5GQCMaqfQQKR0ggUM0q9I2ZSdR4oM6GECjM0b9kcFThILT7Jr963J6ayxaXxfKgE7xPirzadxegYUnRx3Yq-K6EzW6yJt3XQwYTJcfZCrVr3nbsrlbMloMTCV8u518rcCgCRZsVi9Vzzzha7OMf_WEdk7cRyC_CCfbXe0jAB2nhXg012PdFLMPMw8rbLcIuVJZl6WVGaB-UK8FA9abKO-Jh_Vh8aPhXOhOLgtVoTJ-rzS1pK6oh_JfXWkAeTaOj1784DkVyKC_AtvIMScVWwb-_TIwJu1pJyosvrKShWoZy8qi25lAivI_FAiBmMxEZSYFB6NkZ2-KIkhhrZIj-3g8S-npDRvNzTVAlkoRiwzx-fmppB2prxPWX3gZfsUmM5U%3D)**ANNOUNCING THE SAFE STREETS LEADERSHIP COUNCIL**

We are so grateful to have bipartisan support from 20 excellent leaders - including 13 active sheriffs - from all across Illinois, who are committed to helping us restore public safety and accountability in our state. The **[Safe Streets Leadership Council](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=c19b6cc1550c42e49a398535d7732564&_e=TqaznPc8i9xxYzvBUrw9Ag2Fsx69a9nZE0R3e4-Ko-_8OcBTSnXDgfxt5VfFpKBC0fAFNoBcLCmLQdjk0R9Pw9ncH0M5_5w9cjs7YxfIz4TSjWuK3sWnSdqxluIQYXuyutXDTA549Yqt2f6Y799_BhNWeXBEjlL_8rYyYW8lkcw0c6c8Yd1k44rcQRt23GqVZStbEMyldImv4EDfWQwqYtTu3CrtA4HOlC0gYkbwSDR0fHxoJhFt953OCP9nMDt0BgTD8edA97EaH1VlmmkP6l6Ls5aKUluI2FjsOO4KJJdT7c7ZDm-qyAMboxWh_kboJMmb_YH4-pira68qJjF1rwIT5MInpgBxUpd2z6Imyv3NNA5FrdjHdudOaLI8u5NZxDhbhssg_0m0K6IkXcT5Haet6gSoZczK2NCqrCEKYlLHwCAOn7W4WWqXA9_VlWn7KTZARgXX2XhJ1Uh-GZmd9q8QIwmEstWANGUBQllvDeiwY03Heo9KMUw8T0tW_nZN)** stands as the strongest coalition of active law enforcement of any candidate in the governor’s race to date.

We all deserve to feel safe in our home, and making that a reality will be Jesse Sullivan’s top priority as governor.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=c19b6cc1550c42e49a398535d7732564&_e=TqaznPc8i9xxYzvBUrw9Ag2Fsx69a9nZE0R3e4-Ko-_8OcBTSnXDgfxt5VfFpKBC0fAFNoBcLCmLQdjk0R9Pw9ncH0M5_5w9cjs7YxfIz4TSjWuK3sWnSdqxluIQYXuyutXDTA549Yqt2f6Y799_BhNWeXBEjlL_8rYyYW8lkcw0c6c8Yd1k44rcQRt23GqVZStbEMyldImv4EDfWQwqYtTu3CrtA4HOlC0gYkbwSDR0fHxoJhFt953OCP9nMDt0BgTD8edA97EaH1VlmmkP6l6Ls5aKUluI2FjsOO4KJJcl5S5luVrEpKMy5K9D6-fabWmS9VvuyUzXaQgLgdJkhjB8cgl1S1auuGAGAbxoNaKLiFk07YNiVlmi6IbVjO8tNrOu9xu4N0uOMQnrC0eP3hidKm3F47F60_QsSFLonVBqd5Vrk8-56t4k0owXU6L3Xct1FK61aOhb7Bt3xvkhHVErr9mtNL-ymVT0b_iRLtYqdDn8G7C74a--Vv4DgMu4)
[**LEARN MORE ABOUT THE LEADERSHIP COUNCIL**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=c19b6cc1550c42e49a398535d7732564&_e=TqaznPc8i9xxYzvBUrw9Ag2Fsx69a9nZE0R3e4-Ko-_8OcBTSnXDgfxt5VfFpKBC0fAFNoBcLCmLQdjk0R9Pw9ncH0M5_5w9cjs7YxfIz4TSjWuK3sWnSdqxluIQYXuyutXDTA549Yqt2f6Y799_BhNWeXBEjlL_8rYyYW8lkcw0c6c8Yd1k44rcQRt23GqVZStbEMyldImv4EDfWQwqYtTu3CrtA4HOlC0gYkbwSDR0fHxoJhFt953OCP9nMDt0BgTD8edA97EaH1VlmmkP6l6Ls5aKUluI2FjsOO4KJJcBhotxWyuje490n3JIKOFt9bkoJADqM7z4YPq9SO5pQr6Uuw7s3G2a42DpGpGXt5F3vCWHBDoh57Fs7C5rT06K72f0hBVLYvJsFUwTcZWZoTu4hfHGRMgT99UlxZyhhXv5Sk4VBXF1R2_FH_4sCst1MPPKPIMM2arkf22b-KGXOlJ1PjTnN98ybAW_IiumcNM19iGWCsneuYNXROE3Y6AX)
**🤝 ON THE TRAIL**

clean_body: If you missed these, we’ve got you covered with the top highlights. | | Team, Last week we had two majorly successful campaign events with the announcement of our Safe Streets Leadership Council and our Save Illinois kickoff rally. With big milestones like these, saving Illinois feels closer than ever. THE SAFE STREETS LEADERSHIP COUNCIL We are so grateful to have bipartisan support from 20 excellent leaders - including 13 active sheriffs - from all across Illinois, who are committed to helping us restore public safety and accountability in our state. The stands as the strongest coalition of active law enforcement of any candidate in the governor’s race to date. We all deserve to feel safe in our home, and making that a reality will be Jesse Sullivan’s top priority as governor. 🤝 ON THE TRAIL Our Save Illinois campaign kickoff rally was a huge success. Thanks to everyone who came out and packed the room - the excitement was palpable. The energy and enthusiasm for Team Sullivan is higher than ever. If you weren't able to make it to the rally, 🚨 PAIN AT THE PUMP On Day 1 of the Sullivan/Murphy administration, Jesse will support legislation to fully and permanently repeal J.B. Pritzker’s gas tax hike. Putin’s invasion of Ukraine means gas prices are going up. We need to protect families at the pump by repealing the gas tax. 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK Illinois taxes are the highest in the nation, eating up nearly 17% of your income. J.B. Pritzker has added to the problem, passing 24 tax or fee hikes. 🙏🏻 STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE As we begin the season of Lent on Ash Wednesday, we are kicking off our Strength in Faith challenge. Our first challenge: a prayer request for Ukraine. The unprovoked aggression we are witnessing by Putin and Russia threatens peace and democracy, and will have far-reaching consequences. Please join us in praying for Ukraine, and Ukrainian people everywhere, including right here in Illinois. 🇺🇦 If you’re interested in joining, click to sign up. Thanks for your ongoing support. We’ll be in touch. Team Sullivan | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Here in Missouri, Republican leaders and candidates are determined to spread the same kind of hate. Republican Senate primary candidate Vicky Hartzler attacked Lia Thomas, a Trans college student, in her latest campaign ad. Targeting LGBTQ kids in order to gain notoriety is despicable and completely unacceptable in our politics.

name: American Truckers Freedom Fund
subject: A political earthquake is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
It’s got 18 wheels and 5 axles
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn8v3am2mdc6rcilp0k6n7cuvmbrov3s5660pfbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkc2oj8c5gmsqn3cb7muqm9djl68rj2ttim1rr6o5kclq6ecr6e9p31db7cpineduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj66jibbcj0e9rmccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmkjdga1k035iioa5irurl6i8hr869fvtjep7i08_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

A grassroots movement like we've never seen before is sweeping across our country as you read this email. Since we put out the call for the American Truckers Freedom Convoy, thousands of truckers have signed up on our website, and tens of thousands more are organizing with our state captains.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5c1siovao3dibb369eo7fnhenp2m68fo1rok7p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Why are we trucking across the country in protest? **_Simply put, we 've had enough, and we're betting you have, too._**

Tyranny has been sweeping across our country for the past two years; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same tyranny swept across Canada too...and our brave brothers and sisters in the Freedom Convoy _lit a spark that 's going to ignite the light of liberty in the hearts of every freedom loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z72djj7mleope6lq97ou9icnu0lcffdnjn8eu1n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That's why we're trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it's time the government gives up their "emergency powers" and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjjkpva6bji1omv3uukhkchdg4ri952vnes3j7ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
**Free people don 't have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don't act now, **_we 'll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that's why we're reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history. **_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4rnhmo1ill771r5vnsp84diiovvroplhbkoh398_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1fe8ec1ps6hihknu2j85qkh8qel3sojqmaf0dp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znfsact2g51lmfmpr3nmgsikoprr4ppdo32k63kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znqtj6h03daq3e4lr57rrdp25m8o1vjqc59acaa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zt84245vs5q2lrajmec530q3sogik04oa9ardlso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmhjbg2qjrq6ri5c4ffkl2ike8m0j8qrb5cclpp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zju5h8t47scdm4h107cfuvoqepo3j7fehs7qcc38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z449agfntdooauf8a6ulfm5j8unuh0v2qfplnaso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we're asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2jesk6bckvgtkn2vh0qugvggpv0nk5p26cf0u0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We 're not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free, [but we can't do it alone.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zutf45b4mddm485jqevq5geeo51u66lfbjrlm64g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "but we can’t do it alone.")_**

**[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuo8fuaokg8dnoitpbqs7uu6s4j9q9o3oe6p022o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9im2pr7cth2bs "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-BTRN_CXIoGg)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry."**
Through**"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.********You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-IbwZzJcli2Cj8wpQ)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDYxLTE4ZDhiOWI4NTcxMjRiN2Y4MTlmNTY2MWUzYmQ3MTBjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/lE6kMxLtGoeLankhw6F7iQ) to unsubscribe.

One of President Biden’s first acts as President was halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

This critical piece of energy infrastructure would have allowed the United States to become more energy independent and less reliant on global supply systems.

With the Russian invasion of Ukraine, energy prices are already surging, and experts predict the cost of gasoline could skyrocket over the next few weeks.

American energy independence is a critical national security issue. We cannot wait another second to act.

name: Amanda Makki
subject: What's real vs. what Biden thinks is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
With rising crime, rising prices, Americans' have rising doubt in their leaders' abilities. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=712636996385411092bab9b675b3a570&_e=RbEpfkqXJCFBPgTCs1Rk4B9bJtn6eLj-2zW9KNDMdGx9k_sWFWXknj04tKkGsis-XQb8NSOwKLHwETNavbH1W6eIAWZ5hTUYvbpdI6FMiPXWQRB-HBhD6GsxmGZ1Vdzul5V9XPlzEFXRq5xylsw97D2LTTwYk_4OyjnpTu3KdtFBV4uo-uAhHNQNwk4mReTfiN8_dVA8Tqv0mh8RAkdehP0esATGw1jnHkJe_YsE4tkdPUA3He6IEa8eT251JLOOGA14M7IgmejvxVe4WLw4y0Xy3z-nOoJ-pbtVGr64qMbdjXqwD0g74ZQJNQeNmtRPJTbkcHfHyyEugMUkXKJ_S8UQTrBjgj0RxyNnhPRKJ-h1Yba9IxAnd1bc0gJMw2LEdK0FfrCdeivfkqxa_oIL5DmLK-TKvLCGGUs9i0xak6o%3D)
---
Peter -

**We have:**
* An open border
* Rampant crime nationwide
* A staggering economy
* Failing small businesses
* Students who are suffering the consequences of arbitrary mandates
* An international disaster worsening daily in Ukraine

**But last night Joe Biden gave our nation lip service and stumbled through his first State of the Union.**

He said he's going to lower costs by... lowering costs.

He said he would bring manufacturing back to America and then gave a long list of policy ideas that would make that considerably less likely.

**Best yet, he called the men and women of Ukraine _“Iranians!”_**

After last night, it's evident that the future of our nation is at stake. **With rising crime, rising prices, Americans' have rising doubt in their leaders' abilities.**

name: Tim
subject: not going to sugarcoat it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2573%2E3611125%2EetQmWL ][IMG]

We came up short, folks.

I wish I was emailing you with better news—but the truth is, we failed to
hit February’s end-of-month fundraising goal.

It was already a challenge to keep up with my billionaire-backed GOP
opponents. But now that we’ve missed our goal, it’ll be nearly impossible
to win this race unless we see a surge of grassroots energy in the next 24
hours.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8355?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2573%2E3611125%2EetQmWL ]I have to ask, folks: Will you chip in $25 to help us hit our
emergency $10,000 goal in the next 24 hours? This is the only way we’ll be
able to get back on track and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

Peter, In case you missed it, I participated in our first Republican US Senate debate on Saturday, along with two of my opponents. A Carolina Journal online poll showed that I won the debate with 74% of the vote. **_It wasn’t even close! Pat McCrory and Marjorie Eastman didn’t crack 15%, and Ted Budd didn’t bother to show up._** I am so honored, especially since this victory comes from everyday voters, NOT establishment elites. This HUGE WIN proves our campaign is gaining momentum, and I urgently need your help to double down. **Will you please chip in a generous grassroots donation right now?**

Mark Walker

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We have no choice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
March is a critical month for our campaign. The most important so far.
#

Friends —
March is a critical month for our campaign. The most important so far.
As you might remember, we started running our first TV ads last month. That’s the good news. But ads are expensive. And the bad news is we missed our February fundraising goal, putting us in a bit of danger. What’s even tougher is this is an OFFICIAL FEC deadline month. When it ends, we’re legally required to report what we raise and how many donations we’ve received.
On top of that, our opponents are attacking Mark Kelly daily, corporate special interest groups have spent millions attacking us, and CNN says this is one of the seats most likely to flip in 2022.
So, we’re setting a simply audacious goal this month — 150,000 individual donations. It’s a number we haven’t hit this campaign. To be honest, we haven’t come close. But it’s a number we must hit to get back on track.
Almost one million people have donated to Mark Kelly since he first announced he was running for Senate in February 2019. It’s amazing. But we’re going to need you to join them this month if Mark is going to win.
What do you say?
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly reach his goal of 150,000 individual donations before our FEC deadline ends and we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers?[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220302-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
**** | **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
**** | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
**** | **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220302-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2246_6688874_N2MYOH&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH)**
---
****
The thermometer above will track our progress all month. It’s real. It’s live. Save it. Share it. Check back on it. We must reach this goal. We have no choice. And as always — thank you. Your support really does fuel this campaign. Team Kelly
Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=2246%2E6688874%2EN2MYOH). Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Team Demings
subject: Val Demings is falling dangerously short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Val Demings is falling dangerously short of her midnight fundraising goal as of 4 p.m. ET, and she's reaching out with an urgent request:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485416/333119104/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2516-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjQ4MGE5YS03MDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xhWCT88HucuoaTwcwkFzTOx5pfCqNzKBnSlK71j8dw=)
Falling short of tonight's goal would jeopardize Rep. Demings' chances of defeating Marco Rubio – even with CNN reporting that Florida's Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip. Without the resources to go toe to toe with Rubio and his Republican dark-money allies, Val Demings cannot compete and win for Florida and the country.

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Standing up for SC women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
SC women face serious issues every day, and they need a serious leader in the Governor’s mansion. | |
---
**Content warning:** this email addresses statistics and stories concerning domestic violence, physical and sexual assault, and partner abuse. For resources regarding reporting and intervention, please visit _[https://www.sccadvasa.org/get-help/](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPX0teozvIDcfqFnxAhVdtHzotxFEwxy2VJxIpyEiCSlLfRcwn7mW9HNUgzr_Rca9f6PwKCHnBBhw0ws0OL7XBJCcshOe7qTZDali5LhMT5zxNe0mK1dMRnJstyuyoTKSA-ywHFRVTWN95H3awoMkYiTeZPicpjHQ6WViMvwJFdaR2OEPQbnwbz3GRnNgRakPirda9oC862Cr0sffSLWo2Meh0hiJFIox2TDTbWHtTwxx1PqKnyrpRzMPcwpwB38qQ/3k0/vQU5zbuoSca0A5yPgVt-GA/h0/3QznYso31jzFC0WO4Yr9RxKQYn2W6gPMtkzj7dtJ8xI)_.
---
Dear Friend -
---
This week marks the beginning of Women's History Month, a celebration of the vital role that women have played in American History. We not only recognize the women who are mentioned few and far between in our history textbooks, but also the women- our mothers, grandmothers, sisters- the matriarchs whose untold stories have been the guiding force of our state and nation.
---
**Unfortunately, the women of South Carolina are continuously failed and neglected by good-ole-boy politicians who only look out for themselves and their special interests. It 's been this way my whole life. **
---
When I graduated from law school, our state ranked first in the country for the number of women murdered by men in intimate partner relationships. The awful reality is that we all know domestic abuse survivors- we've heard their stories and felt the residual suffering of the violence inflicted on our communities. Sadly, we've also heard stories like that of my cousin who was violently murdered by her ex-fiance. All of these stories are too often the stories of South Carolina women.
---
From my role as the first Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) Director to serving as a State Senator, I've fought the domestic violence crisis head-on. Now, I am committed to taking that fight to the Governor's office so that all the women and survivors of domestic violence in our state have a champion who will finally prioritize this issue and so many more that the women of South Carolina face.
---
I have always been committed to ensuring women's issues are at the forefront and that women have a place at the table, and I'm honored to have your support as I take that fight to the Governor's Office.
---
In solidarity,
---
Mia
---

clean_body: SC women face serious issues every day, and they need a serious leader in the Governor’s mansion. | | Content warning: this email addresses statistics and stories concerning domestic violence, physical and sexual assault, and partner abuse. For resources regarding reporting and intervention, please visit . Dear Friend - This week marks the beginning of Women's History Month, a celebration of the vital role that women have played in American History. We not only recognize the women who are mentioned few and far between in our history textbooks, but also the women- our mothers, grandmothers, sisters- the matriarchs whose untold stories have been the guiding force of our state and nation. Unfortunately, the women of South Carolina are continuously failed and neglected by good-ole-boy politicians who only look out for themselves and their special interests. It 's been this way my whole life. When I graduated from law school, our state ranked first in the country for the number of women murdered by men in intimate partner relationships. The awful reality is that we all know domestic abuse survivors- we've heard their stories and felt the residual suffering of the violence inflicted on our communities. Sadly, we've also heard stories like that of my cousin who was violently murdered by her ex-fiance. All of these stories are too often the stories of South Carolina women. From my role as the first Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) Director to serving as a State Senator, I've fought the domestic violence crisis head-on. Now, I am committed to taking that fight to the Governor's office so that all the women and survivors of domestic violence in our state have a champion who will finally prioritize this issue and so many more that the women of South Carolina face. I have always been committed to ensuring women's issues are at the forefront and that women have a place at the table, and I'm honored to have your support as I take that fight to the Governor's Office. In solidarity, Mia If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA | | Sent via . Peter,
Over 30 Democrats have now announced their retirement from Congress. They know that the Biden administration is a disaster, saw the writing on the wall, know the terrible poll numbers, and have heard from people across this great country that they are going to lose. We thought Liz Cheney would have joined her Democrat counterparts and retire, but she has decided otherwise. Over the course of a year, Cheney went from being the third most powerful Republican in the House to an outcast. However, yesterday, she announced that she is running again. This is a big day, Peter. Her team will flamboyantly announce that they had “hundreds of donations” from people across the country showing support. It’s time to fight back! Let’s show how POWERFUL our movement is to elect Harriet Hageman and unseat Cheney! [_Donate $10, $25, $50, $100 or more to show the STRENGTH in our campaign before 11:59 PM TONIGHT! clean_body: | | | | Cheney announces she is running for re-election. | Peter, Over 30 Democrats have now announced their retirement from Congress. They know that the Biden administration is a disaster, saw the writing on the wall, know the terrible poll numbers, and have heard from people across this great country that they are going to lose. We thought Liz Cheney would have joined her Democrat counterparts and retire, but she has decided otherwise. Over the course of a year, Cheney went from being the third most powerful Republican in the House to an outcast. However, yesterday, she announced that she is running again. This is a big day, Peter. Her team will flamboyantly announce that they had “hundreds of donations” from people across the country showing support. It’s time to fight back! Let’s show how POWERFUL our movement is to elect Harriet Hageman and unseat Cheney! President Trump, Republican leader Kevin McCarthy, and the only other woman to defeat Cheney, Elise Stefanik, have all done their part and endorsed Harriet Hageman for Congress. Now it’s your turn to help Harriet! Thank you! Team Hageman | | | |

clean_body: I just wanted to take a moment to reach out and personally express my gratitude. | = | Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to reach out and personally express my gratitude. My team just let me know that we not only met our February fundraising goal, we surpassed it! It’s clear that we’re building a strong campaign to revitalize the economy in Upstate New York and restore opportunity for working class neighborhoods like the one I grew up in. I’m thankful for everything you’ve done since we launched our campaign – and with your help, I know we can flip this seat blue. Each subscriber makes an impact as we grow this people-powered campaign. I look forward to what we will accomplish together! Despite Republicans' petty refusal, the historic Bipartisan Infrastructure Law is already paying huge dividends, creating good-paying jobs for workers in Ohio, providing much-needed funding to help fix crumbling roads and bridges, and ensuring clean water for communities across the country.

Democrats' commitment to people over politics has been instrumental in our nation's economic recovery, helping families get back on their feet and start fresh. Under President Joe Biden's leadership, our country has seen **_the strongest year of job creation in American history,_** and we're only just getting started.

Now that we’ve heard President Biden's plan for our future, we must work together to deliver results. Continuing our historic growth means we need strong leaders, Peter!

[**_The primary will be here before you know it, and with a tough primary ahead, we need grassroots donors like you to help back us up. Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us kickstart our March fundraising?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42486571/333124754/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220302SOTU_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYxYzUyZi03NjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t292H9dUWW4psqKUrAbL7WBETsq8stz9dVjFgflSwis=)

Shontel Brown
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. body:
| | |

Peter, last night during the State of the Union address, Marjorie Taylor Greene and her buddies were chanting, making disrespectful remarks, and constantly interrupting the President. Marjorie has painted herself as the face of GOP extremism, a hero to white nationalists, and a bully in the Halls of Congress – so her disrespect comes as no surprise. But it is still an embarrassment to our communities here in Northwest Georgia. As President Biden was mentioning historic and comprehensive plans that would directly impact you, me, and our neighbors, Marjorie Taylor Greene was making faces and screaming out unfounded responses. As President Biden mentioned burn pits for the first time in any SOTU, veterans care, cancer, and the death of his son Beau, Lauren Boebert screamed out and Marjorie Taylor Greene heckled him. ****
---
---
Regardless of partisanship, agreements, and beliefs our elected officials should not be disrespecting the President during talks about his son’s death. Their extremism has pushed the bounds and is continuing to divide our country and disregard human decency. Extremism has no place in Congress. When I am elected I will not bully my colleagues or the President, I will not attend white nationalist events, and I will not put publicity and party over my neighbors. This campaign was not founded with the sole purpose of unseating Marjorie Taylor Greene. This campaign is focused on uplifting the voices of the forgotten and taking OUR issues to Congress. **[Rush $15 today if you’re sick of extremism and disrespect.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42486702/333125287/-804235033?refcode=em0302&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmY2YzY0Yy03NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6ghhFXZswZN7NYooRqhdzTVhdjogdN2Ced8qJHcO3s=)** Let’s win this, together. Go Get ‘Em!Holly.

body:
While serving as your Congressman, I’ve had the opportunity to view many State of the Union addresses. Watching Joe Biden give his address last night, Friend, While serving as your Congressman, I’ve had the opportunity to view many State of the Union addresses. Watching Joe Biden give his address last night, I couldn’t be more frustrated with the state of our nation: ❌ Historic inflation... **costing Ohio families**** _more._** ❌ Crime rates in major cities across the U.S... **_at an all time high._** ❌Our national security... **_in jeopardy._** ❌The southern border...** _lawless and unsecure._** We are the greatest country in the world, but Joe Biden is a case study in weak leadership and failed, far-left policies. I have one question for you, friend. Do you believe the state of our union is a disaster under Joe Biden’s leadership? name: Derek Kilmer
subject: President Biden's Unity Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Last night, President Biden addressed the nation for the first State of the Union of his presidency. He talked about how much we've accomplished in the past year, from passing the American Rescue Plan to the bipartisan infrastructure bill, and the work we have ahead to build a stronger nation for all of us.

There's been substantial progress in getting our economy back on track, but more needs to be done. I support President Biden's plan to strengthen our supply chains and make things here in America. We also need to reduce costs for American families -- from health care and housing, to child care, and everyday goods -- to truly recover.

President Biden also offered a bipartisan Unity Agenda for our nation. One where we work together across the aisle to beat the opioid epidemic, take on the mental health crisis, support our veterans, and more.

Right here in Washington State, I've seen people from our community come together to foster dialogue, defuse and address sources of conflict, and bridge differences. That's why I joined eight of my Democratic colleagues and nine of my Republican colleagues to introduce the Building Civic Bridges Act to help empower our communities to reduce polarization and build relationships across lines of difference.

As President Biden said, "As hard as these times have been, I am more optimistic about America today than I have been my whole life." **By addressing toxic polarization, we can find ways to work together to fight for progress.**

[**I 'm ready to get back to work on behalf of the American people, and I believe the Building Civic Bridges Act is a strong step forward. In the spirit of President Biden's State of the Union Address, add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor. It's time to support bringing communities together across our differences to solve the major issues facing our nation >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/ILPysla7h7oXbomJhKbPURjW2WOlkZylfO3yLFw6qe8=/uGmAoTx0lbBdlDHsR99c410nJdHZMRBNePW3Ur-D7ak=?ms=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ILPysla7h7oXbomJhKbPURjW2WOlkZylfO3yLFw6qe8=/uMs7o0BLuvHqqrI6bIdaZH8hn8VrnpmZD2dFLuMy_Q0=?refcode=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220302_SOTU_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

subject: About Biden’s Speech…

body:
Last night, Joe Biden gave his first State of the Union address before Congress, an address that came much later than the January/February address we’ Peter, Last night, Joe Biden gave his first State of the Union address before Congress, an address that came much later than the January/February address we’ve been accustomed to. My best guess is that Biden needed some extra time to think of some accomplishments... Because from where I stand, they’ve been few and far between. For states like ours especially, Biden has left us to fend for ourselves against a flood of illegal immigration and the drugs and crime flowing in from our southern border. He’s made life more expensive for New Mexicans, from higher gas to costlier groceries and goods, thanks to his inflationary policies.
**New Mexicans have had enough. We don’t believe Biden when he says the state of our Union is strong. In fact, many of us believe it’s deteriorating.****DO name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2ai2g4anv2too0g0ad16jittrl507mt9741f70o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb1c4p33dr2egpbachjeloe0tj1mdi7fcrhehp7appl6lin3d9gchr32tthmdgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5lm5jr4s366jhb6ob7m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgsb18bcqsaanbcrf5uqbqdae0pvrhc69adt7fmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme six years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvmf1gpjvead3faj3ubinb8k2tcb2ubp6jmu45b0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3q3rh45r1qrsddg6ecdmhrouht4t99j1keou7so_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdcfsse0ftv2nauuuftv6q9q275qlinp5gh7he2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zia4f1lmn79oo10eltf821kb7oioak736puspkj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr7gjvu78un1rcgsmuol0ssse92j227atgvp057g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2p6grria03qegln4qahs9e3fctouffhafjq27mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c9hm0oj6c9h2bs) God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is big news! The votes have been counted and because of the small margin — we’re headed to a runoff election against Henry Cuellar on May 24th. This is a crucial moment, so we just set a goal to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours to jump-start our campaign to defeat Cuellar in the runoff. This fight was about South Texans proving that our dreams could take on their corporate money and that a daughter of immigrants could bring working class leadership back to the community that raised her. We proved just how powerful our movement is and are ready to keep fighting for the future we deserve. Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people. We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but we need a major influx of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and the Koch Network. And remember, Henry Cuellar is under FBI investigation. The people of South Texas deserve a representative who will fight for their interests every step of the way. Thank you so much for your support, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

body:
Jessica Cisneros needs our help to finish the job. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s0yT09LY41NzDdESmJDe5zDggdtBPA_knnNxktb1ndFr7XKwjB7G59rI9MTrtx2SRzFKawgBgXJ0FGAg0kza5cGmJFjAHfjS4YTyEo7y8BwkuEtIn09fgcpNrtfgbKjhbm-zWd9ALA3smZYIGfUQvpPiJLuKyhB07gnL3JJHus0_-j5vEf-5ErxgJ57zj6eLtKTNbzbP9MG59V_X6ZBfSrHl-buw2A3MJIrAFTiaN9xwp6U2-qGm0b3z2hS-gfWN_g/3k0/gI0sstmjQnCQI2nTtYLjcA/h0/69cNrEZ2d8FvvjCSd2JoyiVBLc8hjrmxD5outKB9El4) Team, After last night’s elections, there is no doubt, Democratic voters are ready for a new generation of leadership. In TX-35, my Justice Democrats slate-mate Greg Casar won in a landslide, and in TX-28, a majority of voters said no to their corporate, corrupt, and conservative incumbent and demanded a Democratic party that actually represents them. **But, my Justice Democrats sister Jessica Cisneros needs our help in TX-28.** In Texas, the law requires a runoff for any election in which nobody reaches 50%, and since there were 2 progressives in the race, Jessica was a few thousand votes short of hitting the threshold. **Make no mistake, the voters in TX-28 are ready to choose Jessica in the runoff in May.** [**Can you rush a split donation of $15 to Jessica and I, and help make sure that this spring we prove that voters are ready to replace every corporate establishment holdout in Congress?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESzS_H-Lt9_O1O44ZjQMo4kPSmcLPwhF66gIDGBD-f47idL52LAX_Ved8SpUclrks_nfeVCsRAgnp7T2AnvHqHg7fN5m50ylHXMB2IURHQR9GM7SxIk8NO3unbD-8d_X_phCtfvNJGnMyxaIEhHu78f8hi7dNh7KlC3F3ldVH2Q5_DOz37373LZtOYi8qofbHXW5344GZKkFyMzTF4WjiW9z8uWXumuKcELoNpKDfRAzbZJdF30hF11C-IJxlfn-StfcMyuNlMGhAHu0ciTLY2rnlXS7FAJgcqUt67m0KxbP9Yo3ISTfqDRMEmnvHXxPEF/3k0/gI0sstmjQnCQI2nTtYLjcA/h1/ON06Ob7Mdiz0T7P3ZhlJJJKe4MHeX57W04PkuV5r2mA) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESzS_H-Lt9_O1O44ZjQMo4kJx8smuWXS4oygmQhVc-KzkWWXLNKa5bI57sCZS6I1Jrz6Sipos7Nu01q3ZBw3jIPE7WxsdponWxoX7cntbfWMQdR-FIQNfYmuUqDVnnVi9cMBG-UmTb3OTdJUnCxdsN0QuB5ibwd-CUducLH7S5yMRC0sHapnLMrMGiX9wJ5e9Rm9zO3a2LpSWr3ANN9DOBsticzd4r44WyoeUSCkKobZswhzim_FPyTCS-M75qzZTF9UGsYPkjaDJky8tLiOHEqJgV3Hlh8enkmKn3Uyyca8s2jnXcNu9-dWTLgriEHOF1/3k0/gI0sstmjQnCQI2nTtYLjcA/h2/Q57ZEjT2XnMpBHRp7oPzVURiPpMfCS7WcMuJMVGu2Yc) When you decide to run for Congress, people show up from every corner telling you that the only way to win is to compromise on your values. In TX-35, Greg Casar beat his closest opponent by almost 46%. clean_body: Jessica Cisneros needs our help to finish the job. | | | Team, After last night’s elections, there is no doubt, Democratic voters are ready for a new generation of leadership. In TX-35, my Justice Democrats slate-mate Greg Casar won in a landslide, and in TX-28, a majority of voters said no to their corporate, corrupt, and conservative incumbent and demanded a Democratic party that actually represents them. But, my Justice Democrats sister Jessica Cisneros needs our help in TX-28. In Texas, the law requires a runoff for any election in which nobody reaches 50%, and since there were 2 progressives in the race, Jessica was a few thousand votes short of hitting the threshold. Make no mistake, the voters in TX-28 are ready to choose Jessica in the runoff in May. When you decide to run for Congress, people show up from every corner telling you that the only way to win is to compromise on your values. In TX-35, Greg Casar beat his closest opponent by almost 46%. He didn’t compromise, he demanded a district that “respects the right to vote, the right to reproductive care, the right to be safe in your neighborhood, and the right to live free from discrimination.” Team, the people are with us. We are on the right side of history, and we are winning. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law will help improve our water infrastructure and fix our roads -- while creating jobs and jump-starting our economy.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487777/333130259/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.02_b1_sotu_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.02_b1_SOTU_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjdkNTA3Ny03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trgN_7c09K91nRzukdOMvbMFCyafc5K_GDG6tkD-R6Y=)

Friends,

Did you catch President Biden’s State of the Union address last night?

His comments about infrastructure caught our attention: “America used to have the best roads, bridges, and airports on Earth. **Now our infrastructure is ranked 13th in the world...We won’t be able to compete for the jobs of the 21st Century if we don’t fix that.** ”

Our President recognizes what we in western Wisconsin know is true. Our infrastructure is failing us. We need investment to address these issues.

Thankfully, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law will help improve our roads and bridges -- while creating jobs and jump-starting our economy.

Please, help us show support for much-needed infrastructure improvements. **[Thank President Biden for fighting for infrastructure below>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487778/333130260/-1857565203?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.02_b1_SOTU_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.02_b1_sotu_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.02_b1_SOTU_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjdkNTA3Ny03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trgN_7c09K91nRzukdOMvbMFCyafc5K_GDG6tkD-R6Y=&emci=ad59df97-5f9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3b7d5077-7c9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)** | [ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487779/333130261/-1857565203?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.02_b1_SOTU_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.02_b1_sotu_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.02_b1_SOTU_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjdkNTA3Ny03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trgN_7c09K91nRzukdOMvbMFCyafc5K_GDG6tkD-R6Y=&emci=ad59df97-5f9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3b7d5077-7c9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)

Peter,

Last night, President Joe Biden delivered his first State of the Union address.

The State of the Union was a reminder of the many serious challenges that faced our nation when President Biden took office and the significant progress we have made under his leadership in the last 13 months with a rebounding economy, millions of Americans vaccinated, and children back in classrooms. But with inflation, Russia’s unprovoked invasion of Ukraine, and the COVID-19 pandemic, there is still much work ahead of us.

Kim is committed to working with the Biden Administration to lower the cost of prescription drugs, rebuild our nation's infrastructure, bring down the costs of everyday goods like gas and groceries, and turn the corner on the pandemic. But she also wants to hear from you about what issues you would like to see the White House and Congress prioritize this year.

Peter,

I’m writing today to invite you to become a founding donor of the Iowa Senate Democrats’ 2022 campaign.

Recently, I emailed you and told you we have to shake things up to flip Iowa from red to blue. And it is critical that we do that as fast as possible. Iowa Senate Republicans are some of, if not the most, extreme legislators in the country.

Just this past session, Republicans advanced a constitutional amendment to ban abortion without any exceptions. They passed new laws that strip away local control from school boards and parents, prohibit local governments and health officials from protecting communities against COVID, and place some of the most severe restrictions on your right to vote.

_**[I’m asking you to make a contribution of any amount today— even $1 helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42478176/333082791/1257036861?refcode=blu-isd-ra-ia-3&header=Chip%20in%20%241%20or%20more%20right%20away%20to%20become%20a%20founding%20donor%20of%20the%20Iowa%20Senate%20Democrats%20and%20help%20us%20take%20back%20the%20Senate%20majority&amount=1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY0ZmUxOS01NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lBBDgpqC-Y-4XoakJfInUb3pJUeEGeW30cPVHjbw6s=)**_ When you donate today, you’ll be helping us build a strong foundation that will allow us to fight back and flip crucial Iowa Senate seats in 2022.

clean_body: I know that we can defeat key Republicans in the Iowa Senate. | | | Hello! We’re checking in because it’s been a while since we’ve heard from you. Are you still interested in hearing about the work we’re doing at the Senate Majority Fund to elect Democrats to the Iowa Senate?= Then, check out the update below from our leader, Sen. Zach Wahls. | = If you’re no longer interested in hearing about our work to elect Democrats, you can = | = Peter, I’m writing today to invite you to become a founding donor of the Iowa Senate Democrats’ 2022 campaign. Recently, I emailed you and told you we have to shake things up to flip Iowa from red to blue. And it is critical that we do that as fast as possible. Iowa Senate Republicans are some of, if not the most, extreme legislators in the country. Just this past session, Republicans advanced a constitutional amendment to ban abortion without any exceptions. They passed new laws that strip away local control from school boards and parents, prohibit local governments and health officials from protecting communities against COVID, and place some of the most severe restrictions on your right to vote. = When you donate today, you’ll be helping us build a strong foundation that will allow us to fight back and flip crucial Iowa Senate seats in 2022. We plan to target strategic seats to fight back against Republican control of the Iowa legislature — but we need the resources to do this effectively. = | = | = | = With your support, Peter, I know that we can defeat key Republicans in the Iowa Senate and create a legislature that’s truly committed to fighting for Iowans. Thank you, Zach Wahls Iowa Senate Democratic Leader P.S. If you can’t donate today, you can still support us by following us on or to stay up to date with our campaign. | | | * | | = Paid for by Iowa Democratic Party - Senate Majority Fund Iowa Senate Majority Fund 5661 Fleur Drive Des Moines, IA 50321 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: As President Biden said last night, we can’t let giant corporations and the wealthy continue to get away with paying less in taxes than teachers and firefighters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Here’s the way I see it. It’s an honor to watch the State of the Union from inside the House chamber. But last night, I kept thinking about how families across the country... | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42488884/333133856/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3T_SOT_E_20220302_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzQyNTNkMy03ZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nzxog1im1mzai2K6jAoqDLET0zDlyzHHN6WAVX51W2g=&emci=2f186975-7e9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=dc4253d3-7e9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s an honor to watch the State of the Union from inside the House chamber. But last night, I kept thinking about how families across the country — and the world — were taking in President Biden’s words, in their own homes or wherever they might be taking refuge. I thought about the Ukrainian people, who’ve shown so much courage, and how they could see that the American government was on their side. One small symbol: I was glad to wear a hand-crocheted sunflower, given to me by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, to show my support for Ukraine. And I’m going to keep standing with President Biden as he rallies our allies and partners against Putin’s aggression. I thought about parents who are getting crushed by the cost of child care — and women who’ve been knocked out of the workforce because of it — when President Biden spoke from the heart about his years as a single dad and his commitment to make sure every family can afford quality care. I thought about people like the man I met in Nevada who are forced to ration insulin — a drug that’s been around for over 100 years — when President Biden once again shared his resolve to bring down the price of lifesaving medications. I thought about everyone who needs a government on their side, and how we need to fight to make Washington work for everyone — not just the rich and powerful. As President Biden said last night, we can’t let giant corporations and the wealthy continue to get away with paying less in taxes than teachers and firefighters. And we can’t let big corporate monopolies continue to choke off their competitors and contribute to inflation by jacking up prices just because they can. I’m staying in these fights — and a whole lot more, like canceling student debt — all the way. And I’m grateful to fight by your side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

clean_body: Here’s the way I see it. It’s an honor to watch the State of the Union from inside the House chamber. But last night, I kept thinking about how families across the country... | | | It’s an honor to watch the State of the Union from inside the House chamber. But last night, I kept thinking about how families across the country — and the world — were taking in President Biden’s words, in their own homes or wherever they might be taking refuge. I thought about the Ukrainian people, who’ve shown so much courage, and how they could see that the American government was on their side. One small symbol: I was glad to wear a hand-crocheted sunflower, given to me by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, to show my support for Ukraine. And I’m going to keep standing with President Biden as he rallies our allies and partners against Putin’s aggression. I thought about parents who are getting crushed by the cost of child care — and women who’ve been knocked out of the workforce because of it — when President Biden spoke from the heart about his years as a single dad and his commitment to make sure every family can afford quality care. I thought about people like the man I met in Nevada who are forced to ration insulin — a drug that’s been around for over 100 years — when President Biden once again shared his resolve to bring down the price of lifesaving medications. I thought about everyone who needs a government on their side, and how we need to fight to make Washington work for everyone — not just the rich and powerful. As President Biden said last night, we can’t let giant corporations and the wealthy continue to get away with paying less in taxes than teachers and firefighters. And we can’t let big corporate monopolies continue to choke off their competitors and contribute to inflation by jacking up prices just because they can. I’m staying in these fights — and a whole lot more, like canceling student debt — all the way. And I’m grateful to fight by your side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:

---
Peter, First we want to thank Morris Township, Hanover, Rockaway, Florham Park, Pequannock, Morris Plains, Denville, and Dover for hosting such amazing events the past few weeks and allowing Toby the opportunity to speak to the community. As each event passed, we could feel the support for this campaign growing and now our momentum can't be stopped! If you were unable to attend any of these stellar events, you can watch the footage for [Parsippany,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/ce9c9f0c37aea929/c77633db1c52cb5cc3d6b838967d376c/38863) [Hanover,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/ce9c9f0c37aea929/d7c781f0c6f52ecac3d6b838967d376c/38863) and [Morris ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/ce9c9f0c37aea929/4fedfe592dba0d9dc3d6b838967d376c/38863)Township here. Toby recently released [his thoughts](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/ce9c9f0c37aea929/78dec94d84617728c3d6b838967d376c/38863) on Ukraine. If you missed the article you can read it [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/ce9c9f0c37aea929/8d8a43457b2f1e7fc3d6b838967d376c/38863). Team Toby is looking forward to the Morris County Convention this Friday and we are very optimistic about the predicted outcome. To ensure this outcome, Toby needs your help! Please attend the Convention this Friday, March 4th starting at 6 PM located at Birchwood Manor, 111 North Jefferson Road, Whippany, NJ 07981 and vote for Toby! If you have any questions or would like to reach out to Toby and our team, you can contact us at [toby@tobyforcongress.com](mailto:toby@tobyforcongress.com "mailto:toby@tobyforcongress.com") or by calling at 973-500-8025. We hope to see you Friday! Team Toby

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: This is happening exactly as Sen. Grassley planned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
His lifelong mission to overturn Roe and restrict our reproductive rights ...
| | |
---
Peter – today, I'm more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and expand our Senate majority.
You see, Sen. Grassley and the rest of McConnell's far-right allies just _**blocked**_ a crucial piece of legislation that would have essentially codified Roe v. Wade into law – protecting the right to choose no matter what extremist legislators and federal courts do. This is just another instance of **Sen. Grassley's lifelong mission to overturn Roe and restrict our reproductive rights.**
People like Sen. Grassley, who've tried to control women's health care decisions for decades, have no place in the Senate. **We can defeat him, expand our Democratic majority _and_ send a pro-choice woman to the Senate. [I need your help to do it. Please, will you donate $5 or more right now before our midnight deadline to defend our right to choose, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42489056/333134542/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk729-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmQzZGFmNy03ZjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PrJa0TPl7vMQ4dAz13evOmI1j4klegDlPYv2H_zYt4=)**
During Sen. Grassley's very first Senate term – nearly four decades ago – he voted in favor of a constitutional amendment to overturn Roe v. Wade, making it clear he believes that "a right to abortion is not secured by this Constitution." He's been on that crusade against our right to choose ever since: pushing for nationwide abortion bans after 20 weeks, criminal penalties on doctors and multiple attempts to defund Planned Parenthood. He even voted to let employers refuse to cover contraception on employer-sponsored health plans.
It doesn't stop there. As chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley was _instrumental_ in scheming with Mitch McConnell to steal a Supreme Court seat from President Obama and ramming through anti-choice ideologues like Brett Kavanaugh. **Now, Roe v. Wade hangs on by a thread as the conservative-majority court is set to rule on abortion bans.**
The difference between us is stark: I’ve consistently fought to protect women’s reproductive rights. Back in 2018, Republicans in Iowa were pushing a ban that would have prohibited women across our state from being able to access abortions after just 6 weeks of pregnancy. I fought tooth and nail to block that ban, as well as their ruthless attempts to defund Iowa’s Planned Parenthood.

My opponent, on the other hand, has made it perfectly clear that he will pick his extremist ideologies over our autonomy, our reproductive rights and our health every single time. Unlike him, I will always defend the right to choose: I've done it in the Iowa State House, I've done it in Congress and I'll do it in the Senate.
With Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings with Iowa voters, NOW is our greatest opportunity to send him packing. **[So please, if you're with me to defend the right to choose, can you donate $5 or more before our midnight deadline so we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42489061/333134548/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk729-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmQzZGFmNy03ZjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PrJa0TPl7vMQ4dAz13evOmI1j4klegDlPYv2H_zYt4=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42489064/333134552/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk729-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmQzZGFmNy03ZjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PrJa0TPl7vMQ4dAz13evOmI1j4klegDlPYv2H_zYt4=)

My opponent, on the other hand, has made it perfectly clear that he will pick his extremist ideologies over our autonomy, our reproductive rights and our health every single time. Unlike him, I will always defend the right to choose: I've done it in the Iowa State House, I've done it in Congress and I'll do it in the Senate. With Sen. Grassley facing record-low approval ratings with Iowa voters, NOW is our greatest opportunity to send him packing. = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: American Trucker Freedom Fund
subject: Free people don't have to protest for Freedom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r)
---
| | |
Peter,

A grassroots movement like we've never seen before is sweeping across our country as you read this email. Since we put out the call for the American Truckers Freedom Convoy, thousands of truckers have signed up on our website, and tens of thousands more are organizing with our state captains.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Why are we trucking across the country in protest? **_Simply put, we 've had enough, and we're betting you have, too._**

Tyranny has been sweeping across our country for the past two years; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same tyranny swept across Canada too...and our brave brothers and sisters in the Freedom Convoy _lit a spark that 's going to ignite the light of liberty in the hearts of every freedom loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That's why we're trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it's time the government gives up their "emergency powers" and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[FILL A FREEDOM CONVOY GAS TANK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "FILL A FREEDOM
CONVOY GAS TANK")_**
**Free people don 't have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don't act now, **_we 'll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that's why we're reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
;**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716038:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716039:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$30 = 20
Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716040:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716041:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716042:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$375 = 250
Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716043:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716044:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716045:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "$5,000 = FULL
TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we're asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We 're not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free, [but we can't do it alone.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "but we
can’t do it alone.")_**

**[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59716037:6kgYr4EbN:m:1:3253819041:456FC9F861516F873B2ECF0A95D16A05:r "Help fuel our
convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, we have some bad news: Republican Super PACs just launched online attack ads aimed at our Democratic Secretaries! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
They’re doing everything they can to take down our defenders of democracy – rush $20 right now to fight back! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
The far-right knows that Democratic Secretaries like Jena Griswold, Jocelyn Benson, and Katie Hobbs are the last line of defense for democracy in critical swing states.
That’s why they’re going all-in to defeat our Secretaries now. So in 2024, Trump’s hand-picked candidates can be ready to overturn the will of the voters if they don’t like the result! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
And to make matters worse, these must-win races are being FLOODED with far-right cash – our opponents at the RSLC announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of $33 MILLION last year!
We can’t let these far-right radicals destroy our democracy – rush $20 right now to fight back against their attacks on our Democratic Secretaries! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
Can we count on you to rush $20 ASAP to fight back against the RSLC’s vast fundraising haul and protect our Democratic Secretaries? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030222_B3_AC_30D]
