name: Primary Sinema
subject: Biden outlined his priorities last night. Will Sinema obstruct them?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It’s the big question right now. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpFjfmQWI8bf4VmwdVeMtEFu/3k0/U67x6fEHTtiP3AFBB8b80w/h0/sLTj6k80gp1BOdDkWIXjGCyh21pQWSyVY2ljEFh8byg)
Peter, Last night, President Biden outlined a number of his top priorities during his first-ever State of the Union address. Those included: → Lowering prescription drug costs
→ Cutting costs to families through climate resilience + affordable child care
→ Higher taxes on corporations and the ultra-wealthy But the midterm elections are only eight months away, and our window to translate these priorities into legislation is shrinking. The big question now is: **Will Sinema continue to obstruct her fellow Democrats?** **[Can you please chip in $5 or more to put pressure on Sinema to do her job? The threat of an unbeatable primary challenge is the best leverage we have.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLNIp4TjtmkxiDC2LrA7M_4USBbtNoDYh8JJ5GgDZX8v4C9TDXdAEAu4ExetL0A_s/3k0/U67x6fEHTtiP3AFBB8b80w/h1/sw1ikQODmdO2eBitQwSOnzw02gUVwK0yT6rXu1_yv6g)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLNIp4TjtmkxiDC2LrA7M_4USBbtNoDYh8JJ5GgDZX8syJK2s4xF1DZY18PCsnlLc/3k0/U67x6fEHTtiP3AFBB8b80w/h2/-Es3d9NPoc0MrmEWbHk3qbDhBwhfrnvrrZfdHuRIsVI)** Many of the agenda items that Biden outlined in his speech are policies he (and all Democrats) should have been able to already claim victory on. But thanks to Sinema (and Manchin) gutting the Build Back Better package last year on behalf of their corporate backers, working families have yet to receive any help on drug prices or child care. And billionaires still aren’t paying their fair share. **Remember, Peter: If the Senate doesn’t make progress before November, voters could punish vulnerable Democratic Senators at the ballot box** — including Sinema’s fellow Arizona Sen. Mark Kelly — _and the GOP could even regain Senate control_. There’s no time to waste. We need to show Kyrsten Sinema that if she continues to obstruct Biden’s agenda, we WILL replace her with a real Democrat. **[Can you make a donation to the Primary Sinema Project to put pressure on Sinema now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLNIp4TjtmkxiDC2LrA7M_4USBbtNoDYh8JJ5GgDZX8ukbIpmdyZJzYaOMfS4FTGU/3k0/U67x6fEHTtiP3AFBB8b80w/h3/we7fs404PoXXlhuoS1CkRyRebqd1QZwD_jBrsD0VWkg)** Thank you, Primary Sinema

* * *
[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLNIp4TjtmkxiDC2LrA7M_7KF1Xk4z7jfJJOHUznUmhvNQLbyRSTf6ILEqf8v0guT/3k0/U67x6fEHTtiP3AFBB8b80w/h4/gNn0p1ZhxO4pZTjQTKBifp-3RpXgm7xSe5QB83Mjopc) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: Historic Win for Progressives in Texas
body:
Last night, the voters of Texas proved... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/historic-win-for-progressives-in-texas?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | -

Last night, the voters of Texas proved that progressive Latinos are the future of our political leadership.

Greg Casar’s historic win in TX-35 will usher in a new era of progressive politics in Texas. Casar’s work on the Austin City Council, including [fighting against encampment bans](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=9b1c79f2b4&e=b8f90417f9) in the city, made him a prominent figure in Austin politics and a favorite amongst the voters. He won the Democratic primary by [nearly 60% of the votes](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=6a84405dd9&e=b8f90417f9).

Nuestro PAC was honored to support Casar’s campaign by putting out a [‘Get Out The Vote’ ad](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=9b22f49c73&e=b8f90417f9) in Spanish. By connecting with the Latino communities living in TX-35, Nuestro PAC knows that Texans will be getting the best representation in Greg Casar.

We look forward to continuing to support Greg Casar and electing him as TX-35’s next U.S. Representative.

[Will you join us in continuing to fight for TX-35's next U.S. Representative?](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=a11927af90&e=b8f90417f9)

---
| Thank you for your support.

-Nuestro PAC

name: Susie Lee
subject: Re: President Biden’s State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42489901/333139054/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjJhYzRkYy04NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giP13D9esfslwIbselVABOVIeCPPh-y-T01m4LQP5M8=)

| | Below is a personal message from Congresswoman Susie Lee on President Biden’s State of the Union Address. Susie Lee is the Democrat running in one of the GOP’s top-targeted districts. [**Will you chip in now to help Susie keep Nevada blue and pass President Biden’s agenda? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42489902/333139055/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220302_FR_SOTU_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjJhYzRkYy04NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giP13D9esfslwIbselVABOVIeCPPh-y-T01m4LQP5M8=)
* * *
Folks, watching President Biden speak last night was a testament to why we should have hope for our future as a nation. He called on Congress to pass legislation that ends gun violence, lowers the cost of insulin, raises the minimum wage, and protects the LGBTQ+ community from discrimination. It may seem like a lot, but I’m confident that our Democratic Majority can get it done. President Biden also unveiled a Unity Agenda for our country, four big-picture things that we have to get done: beat the opioid crisis, implement better mental health care, support our veterans, and end cancer as we know it. I agree with President Biden – our House Democratic Majority must continue to work to pass his agenda, and I’m determined to do just that. **But, in top-targeted races like mine, Republicans see flipping my district red as key to taking control of the House.** The only way we can move forward with President Biden’s agenda is if we keep control of the House. name: John Cranley
subject: Ohio’s best days AREN’T behind us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| Thanks from all of us on Team Cranley-Fedor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479723/333090469/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFiM2RmMS01YTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUVKiB16cYeEYysI9Hi_B7pfxucbslTrn7NFvJ5ipks=) Hey friend, I just wanted to reach out and say thanks, from all of us on Team Cranley-Fedor, for helping us reach our monthly fundraising target in February. When I first set out to run for Governor, I knew there was only one way to do it: **community support.** Team Cranley-Fedor is, and will always be, a community-led movement. The biggest reason for that? One of the core pillars of this campaign is anti-corruption — a sweeping cleanup of the bribery and back-scratching that has polluted Columbus politics for _years._ Thanks to you, our campaign is well on its way to achieving that. YOU are the lifeblood of our movement to kickstart Ohio’s comeback, and we’re immensely grateful for your constant support. Look, we’re getting there, friend — the latest poll has us _tied_ with our primary competitor. If I can count on you to stick with us these last few weeks of the campaign, I promise that Ohio will see brighter days ahead. Our state’s best days _aren’t_ behind us, and this is the campaign that will prove that to be true. Thanks again, John
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479724/333090470/817536172?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFiM2RmMS01YTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUVKiB16cYeEYysI9Hi_B7pfxucbslTrn7NFvJ5ipks=)** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479725/333090472/817536172?recurring=true&refcode=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFiM2RmMS01YTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUVKiB16cYeEYysI9Hi_B7pfxucbslTrn7NFvJ5ipks=)**
---
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42479726/333090473/-1406512299?refcode=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.7b1b3df1-5a9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjFiM2RmMS01YTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUVKiB16cYeEYysI9Hi_B7pfxucbslTrn7NFvJ5ipks=)

name: VoteVets
subject: LAST CHANCE: Get your “I need ammunition, not a ride” sticker before we donate to CARE's Ukraine Crisis Fund tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
body:
Looking for a way to help and show your love and support for the courageous Ukrainians standing up to the Russian invasion?
#
**[**LAST CHANCE: Vet Voice Foundation will make their first donation to CARE's Ukraine Crisis Fund tomorrow. So make a donation of any amount you can afford, help Ukrainians struggling through the Russian invasion, and get your sticker soon.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c3-ukr?refcode=em220302-1-tb2-c1&t=1&refcode2=4415_3013755_HhOXnE&akid=4415%2E3013755%2EHhOXnE)**
* * *
Derek -
When the U.S. offered to evacuate Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, his response was “I need ammunition, not a ride.”
What bravery.
Donald Trump mobilized an attack on our nation’s capital. President Zelensky stayed to defend his. In Afghanistan, President Ghani left in a helicopter while our troops gave everything to get people out of the country. In Ukraine, President Zelensky stayed. Finally a leader worthy of people’s sacrifice.
So if you’re looking for a way to help and show your love and support for the courageous Ukrainians standing up to the Russian invasion, Make a donation of ANY AMOUNT and we’ll send you this “I need ammunition, not a ride” sticker.
All proceeds will go to CARE’s Ukraine Crisis fund, aiming to reach 4 million with immediate aid, food, water, hygiene kits, psychological support and more.
[**CONTRIBUTE $3 TO OR ANYTHING YOU CAN TO VET VOICE FOUNDATION AND WE’LL SEND YOU THIS STICKER AND DONATE EVERYTHING WE RAISE TO CARE’S UKRAINE CRISIS FUND.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c3-ukr?refcode=em220302-1-tb2-c1&t=2&refcode2=4415_3013755_HhOXnE&akid=4415%2E3013755%2EHhOXnE)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c3-ukr?refcode=em220302-1-tb2-c1&t=3&refcode2=4415_3013755_HhOXnE&akid=4415%2E3013755%2EHhOXnE)
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-c3-ukr?refcode=em220302-1-tb2-c1&t=4&refcode2=4415_3013755_HhOXnE&akid=4415%2E3013755%2EHhOXnE)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets
P.S. Your contribution to Vet Voice Foundation, our charitable organization, is tax deductible.

PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4415%2E3013755%2EHhOXnE).

name: Kevin Hern
subject: What Oklahomans and Americans really needed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
President Biden let down the American people last night. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ffdf1f8e8c79bb45/0f25d5502409869bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, **The single most important thing that Oklahomans and all Americans needed to hear last night, during President Biden’s State of the Union, was the president committing to energy independence.**
---
[**DONATE $20.22 TO STOP BIDEN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ffdf1f8e8c79bb45/71f01de7764d27ffc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
President Biden should have announced the relaunching of the Keystone Pipeline and the reversal of job-killing energy policies he put in place on Day 1 of his presidency, but instead he barely mentioned U.S. energy production at all! Instead, he doubled down on every bad policy that his administration has implemented in the past 13 months. Instead of committing to a stronger America, Biden committed to spending even more federal tax dollars, increasing our deficits, and causing further inflationary pressure on American families. Oklahomans deserve better. Hardworking men and women just trying to take care of their families are crying out for help, and their Democrat-led government is ignoring them. I AM committed to Oklahomans and Americans, and I will continue the fight every single day in Washington to helping them. We need to reopen the Keystone Pipeline, and continue to grow energy production in the United States. If you agree, please chip in what you can now to help me keep fighting for you.
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ffdf1f8e8c79bb45/6baa8ecd148fefd0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
President Biden’s approval ratings are BAD for a reason. He is completely out of touch with the American people, and his policies are hurting families across the nation. [**It’s time for real leadership in D.C. Please support my fight by chipping in what you can right now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/ffdf1f8e8c79bb45/ed11bab81870e522c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Thanks,
Kevin Hern

clean_body: President Biden let down the American people last night. Read more >>> | | | Peter, The single most important thing that Oklahomans and all Americans needed to hear last night, during President Biden’s State of the Union, was the president committing to energy independence. President Biden should have announced the relaunching of the Keystone Pipeline and the reversal of job-killing energy policies he put in place on Day 1 of his presidency, but instead he barely mentioned U.S. energy production at all! Instead, he doubled down on every bad policy that his administration has implemented in the past 13 months. Instead of committing to a stronger America, Biden committed to spending even more federal tax dollars, increasing our deficits, and causing further inflationary pressure on American families. Oklahomans deserve better. Hardworking men and women just trying to take care of their families are crying out for help, and their Democrat-led government is ignoring them. I AM committed to Oklahomans and Americans, and I will continue the fight every single day in Washington to helping them. We need to reopen the Keystone Pipeline, and continue to grow energy production in the United States. If you agree, please chip in what you can now to help me keep fighting for you. President Biden’s approval ratings are BAD for a reason. He is completely out of touch with the American people, and his policies are hurting families across the nation. Thanks, Kevin Hern id:2022-03-02-13:57:42:245t | | ---|--- | | Paid For By Hern For Congress | |

name: Team Tom
subject: What did you think of President Biden last night?
body:
Team, we're curious about your thoughts >>
#

Did you watch President Biden's first State of the Union last night, team?

**He did exactly what we elected him to do – he _united_ Washington's bitterly divided parties to present a strong front to the world, saying:**

_"Now is the hour, our moment of responsibility, our test of resolve and conscience, of history itself. It is in this moment that our character is formed. Our purpose is found. Our future is forged. Well, I know this nation. We will meet the test... and we**will** save democracy."_

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Brandon’s Got 99 Problems and Reality is DEFINITELY 1
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FvBpLHRyXFVx1UdAQAtZbu1SsieNU3Y8GPwCzVbEqwm1qgYsfqSAy7VolbMyqLMqcw0A6GxJCMVG6zhztComsNtAbJeFou1K1lj32AJV915gonrJlpSXaLYZ8iQ9n6VKbZIVxwFMd6Zp8XmC0yoMBc3csb8_BkDtysQZvgcOwdkQMZ-oB45UQ1m6GJJRKOUdg4jegr39lAWUpfd_01c7l4TWsQ84AMn4&c=svRnRkD-dhbeCWlV7nlAWf9hCw7uhTXEfW1XlqeNYVUqCSGVp3umEQ==&ch=cbAhuXU5YC9ZG6hcrXcNa2jvB_ZeXzYyCvp4yReLh7NaYHBXIElFBg==)
---
| Peter,
Joe Biden's State of the Union address was full of lies, omissions, and delusions. He didn't mention the worst border crisis in our country's history - a direct result of his failed policies - or 13 American service members losing their lives due to his blundering policies. He took zero responsibility for the worst inflation in forty years due to his reckless spending. Americans are getting crushed with soaring prices at the pump and in the grocery store, and Biden's solution is to keep spending OUR money! And as Russia continues its invasion of Ukraine, Biden is still buying oil from Russia to help fund their assault while stopping American energy independence. Now, thanks to his slumping poll numbers, Biden is advocating for every COVID policy I implemented two years ago in Florida and acting like these are novel and breakthrough ideas. This, from a guy who called Republican governors, "Neanderthals," and told me to "get out of the way" for employing the very same policies in Florida he is now adopting. He never apologized for cutting our supply of monoclonal antibodies and depriving Floridians of access to life-saving treatment, and he said we need to stop looking at COVID as a "partisan dividing line." Biden's speech made no mention of the skyrocketing homicides and violent crime we're seeing in Democrat-run cities across the country, and he said that we need to "hold law enforcement accountable." Meanwhile, the only people he DOESN'T seem to want to hold accountable are the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors and the criminals he portrays as victims. Make no mistake, these are not just Joe Biden's policies. These are the policies of the radical left-wing socialists who now own the Democrat Party. But as Florida's governor, I will never allow this president to erode our freedom, destroy our economy, cripple our businesses, or tolerate violent criminals as he shames the men and women who keep us safe. I am standing in the way of these woke leftists that have put our country and your family at risk. In Florida, we will always stand for freedom and liberty. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Ron DeSantis
---

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: Democrats are fighting for real change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

Last night, President Biden gave his first State of the Union address.

In it, he proved that, no matter how much the GOP tries to tell us otherwise, the issues affecting Americans aren’t partisan. Creating jobs, boosting our economy, keeping our nation safe — these aren’t partisan issues.

But, the GOP has twisted our political system into something unrecognizable. They’ve attacked our right to vote, undermined our democracy, and focused more energy on sowing hatred than solving problems.

That means, if we want to see real change on the issues that matter to our community, we need to protect our majority, keep the GOP out of power, and elect Democrats who know how to win when it counts. Can you chip in $10 to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=302sotu]

A President standing before our nation and laying out real, tangible policies to help the American people shouldn’t be a source of vitriol. It should be a source of hope.

I’m ready to stand with our President and deliver results for our community. As your next Congressman, I’ll fight GOP obstruction. I’ll protect our democracy. And I’ll deliver change for those who need it most.

But, first, I need your help to win this race. If you’re ready to elect a representative who will support President Biden’s agenda, promote policies that make a difference for our community, and deliver for FL-10, click here to chip in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=302sotu]

With gratitude,
Randolph Bracy

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker’s Water Policy Conversation is Tuesday, March 8th at 7pm!
body:
Water Issues in Oregon's District 4 is the topic of the fifth session of our weekly series of Policy Conversations with John Selker, Oregon District 4 candidate for US House of Representatives.

This week's conversation (Tuesday March 8th at 7 pm on Zoom) will be kicked off by Dr. Todd Jarvis.

Todd works at the Institute for Water & Watersheds at Oregon State University, one of the 54 USGS-funded Water Resources Research Institutes distributed across the United States and US territories. Todd is also an instructor in the Conflict Resolution Program in the College of Law at the University of Oregon.

Todd will briefly introduce the topic as it relates to Oregon's District 4. John will take a few minutes to explain his policy ideas and then they will open the floor for Zoom participants to share their thoughts and ask questions.
REGISTRATION LINK: [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJMtduGvqj4sHdxVOJDCztRpRr5gnxFMU0ek](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJMtduGvqj4sHdxVOJDCztRpRr5gnxFMU0ek)

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Biden's State of the Union
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
After President Biden’s State of the Union address, it’s more obvious that ever America is in trouble. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/348a6817abd9f4f6/91377313da236ae0c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, _Did you catch President Biden’s State of the Union address? _ It was really something, especially considering that he has not kept his promises from last year’s address to “Build Back Better.” Covid is still here, along with draconian policies that have affected a generation of children, closed countless businesses, and ushered in an era of medical tyranny the likes of which we’ve never seen before in America. Our foreign policy is weak, and Americans and our allies are still stranded in Afghanistan after our botched withdrawal in 2021. Inflation is off the charts, making fuel, food, and other necessities less affordable. If you can even find the things you need on the bare shelves caused by needless interruptions to the supply chain. **If you want change, then I need your help to take back the House and get rid of the Washington elites! We must drain the swamp, and I’m ready to lead the charge. ** Please chip in what you can right now to help me fight for the heart and soul of America!

---
We need to elect a new conservative majority who will go to bat for everyday Americans who are suffering under failing Democrat policies. After three decades in the U.S. Army, and proudly serving as President Trump’s Assistant Secretary of the Army, I know what it’s going to take to reverse course in America. I’m willing to fight for our country. Are you, Peter? Please [**rush a donation**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/348a6817abd9f4f6/2ed0887603428cbbc3d6b838967d376c/36963) now to help take back America. Thanks,

name: Team Benson
subject: Ensuring that democracy prevails
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

We’re in the midst of an unprecedented, multifront war for the battle of democracy that President Joe Biden acknowledged in his State of the Union Address Tuesday night. In case you weren’t listening, here is what he said:
“In the battle between democracy and autocracy, democracies are rising to the moment, and the world is clearly choosing the side of peace and security”

There is no denying that courageous, pro-democracy activists are fighting with everything they’ve got to keep a democratic Ukraine from falling into the hands of an authoritarian dictator.

Here are home Jocelyn is like those activists abroad. She is working tirelessly to combat extremists to ensure that our elections remain transparent and secure because transparent and secure elections are at the heart of our democracy.

Here’s the truth: for democracy to continue to prevail, we’re going to need an even larger coalition of people who are willing to fight for it.Democracy is rising to the moment, friend. Will you declare today that you are willing to keep up the hard work and ensure that democracy prevails in the end? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zigpFuN-BkGB1PEGKKvvqg2]

https://secure.ngpvan.com/zigpFuN-BkGB1PEGKKvvqg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zigpFuN-BkGB1PEGKKvvqg2]Thank you for rising to the moment with us, friend.

clean_body: Friend, We’re in the midst of an unprecedented, multifront war for the battle of democracy that President Joe Biden acknowledged in his State of the Union Address Tuesday night. In case you weren’t listening, here is what he said: “In the battle between democracy and autocracy, democracies are rising to the moment, and the world is clearly choosing the side of peace and security” There is no denying that courageous, pro-democracy activists are fighting with everything they’ve got to keep a democratic Ukraine from falling into the hands of an authoritarian dictator. Here are home Jocelyn is like those activists abroad. She is working tirelessly to combat extremists to ensure that our elections remain transparent and secure because transparent and secure elections are at the heart of our democracy. Here’s the truth: for democracy to continue to prevail, we’re going to need an even larger coalition of people who are willing to fight for it.Democracy is rising to the moment, friend. Will you declare today that you are willing to keep up the hard work and ensure that democracy prevails in the end? [] [ you for rising to the moment with us, friend. Team Benson [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Fellow patriot,

Americans all over the country are finally standing up to radical and abusive government, and it’s happening even in the most unlikely places.

* In **San Francisco** , school board members were recalled for failing to fully reopen schools and pushing a woke racially charged agenda.

* In **Los Angeles** , liberal District Attorney George Gascón is facing a very serious recall threat for his blatant soft-on-crime and anti-law enforcement policies.

* **All over the country** , governments, school boards and private companies are lifting mask and vaccine mandates due to pressure from the public.

I started **Elder for America PAC** to continue the fight we began last year to get radical leftist ideas out of our schools, enhance public safety, and restore personal & economic freedom.

**We’re continuing this fight because America needs saving.**

Our movement is growing, _but we still have a long way to go._ Victories against the radical Left on the local level are huge, but we also need to win back Republican majorities in this year’s midterms to end the failed and destructive policies that are coming out of Washington.

**I simply can’t do this without your personal support, fellow patriot.** I know you to be a patriot, and if you don’t support our fight, _then who will?_

[**Will you let me know you’re with us in our fight to save America from the radical Left by chipping in $25 in the next 24 hours?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=99aec8b92ffd4684ac184d403df57021&_e=DZ0pffxH5u2JEBzxSd6fHqOCwRZ7CuLykcViCnHAXevmuP6dVPo0y0r5UrZ8mNK5HGP1E370CL80RT9muCWXNgGLjQTHXBSmCQNBUxVX08rHOYXm9va1MwRGbh67ExwIIFSxt9pn15cJGPG_hqGIi6s_jJRFos5nri2flTTZFHXk90V-Yr-BDIzFN7kfPrISFNcKVr_On1KE6uAc_fHv0mAqmu3hYY37kwjOSmWFHuSujCGsSDLmh74VKDdLa2Fkrh_58lZklresx-2kr1AFHqH3Nb6GDIn2zTF0BDaeoanfJJV4xdjqfHRz0maztTVUa-Z8OFSzeWNvY_piPAXRatz5U-aae9inglAZiLnRf9aC8hjrNU7B_JA2wxSs3sYhS39ucg-ZXQIDblZz--Pb-c0y44CWo29tf8UuRLguWyrdNrJ-VodBq_xlIjX7IH02)

During the first State of the Union address of his administration, President Biden shared all of the historic progress that we've delivered for the American people so far and outlined his top priorities to lower everyday costs for working families. But as he works to keep moving our country forward with his bold agenda, Republicans are attacking him every step of the way.

In his first State of the Union address to the nation last night, he highlighted the bold progress that we've made so far for the American people – including the American Rescue Plan, historic investments in infrastructure, millions of new jobs, and more.
But he also outlined the crucial progress we have yet to make – **progress that Mitch McConnell says he's 100% focused on obstructing**. With everything from voting rights protections and reproductive freedom to a Supreme Court seat on the line, we cannot allow McConnell and the GOP to succeed in blocking the Democratic agenda.
**That's why it's critical for grassroots Democrats to show that we are standing with President Biden and won't let the GOP stop us. But we just checked our records, and we're still missing your response to our live poll. Please, before it expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, tell us:**

clean_body: | | | I wanted to follow up, friend: Earlier today, my team sent out an urgent new poll to gauge where grassroots Democrats stand – but I just took a look at the responses, and we're still 27 short. During the first State of the Union address of his administration, President Biden shared all of the historic progress that we've delivered for the American people so far and outlined his top priorities to lower everyday costs for working families. But as he works to keep moving our country forward with his bold agenda, Republicans are attacking him every step of the way. The only way to fight back is with folks like you, but our poll expires at midnight tonight , and your answer is still pending. Please, tell me right now: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | Thank you so much for taking the time to lend your voice, Jacky \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: State of the Union Poll Date: Wed, Mar 2, 2022 Subject: Do you approve of President Biden? [your response missing] | | | The latest polls show that the MAJORITY of Democrats approve of President Biden. But after his first State of the Union address last night, we need to update our data – and your response is missing, friend: TELL US NOW: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | 11:59 p.m. deadline | Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com | Friend: President Biden has delivered the steady leadership our country desperately needed following the Trump administration. In his first State of the Union address to the nation last night, he highlighted the bold progress that we've made so far for the American people – including the American Rescue Plan, historic investments in infrastructure, millions of new jobs, and more. But he also outlined the crucial progress we have yet to make – progress that Mitch McConnell says he's 100% focused on obstructing. With everything from voting rights protections and reproductive freedom to a Supreme Court seat on the line, we cannot allow McConnell and the GOP to succeed in blocking the Democratic agenda. That's why it's critical for grassroots Democrats to show that we are standing with President Biden and won't let the GOP stop us. But we just checked our records, and we're still missing your response to our live poll. Please, before it expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, tell us: TELL US NOW: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter,
Did you catch Josh on Fox News last night? He talked to Jesse Watters about what he was expecting from Joe Biden's State of the Union (Spoiler alert— Josh was right!). Watch the clip below, or read the transcript.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aba904ec4e5c45759b1f31e08af62889&_e=2lhKTPn5erdzOlcehtfMxXjqrnIn7ETsV1zmxBEcsb88VnM6Vjtlrk3HKzzljITKMKy7zPJ8u4cTPA_X2R8xaLH1rXIXHY8FtOixL3nU9jD9TD-tKYBAC7YAH0assIYHVOS6okIJUpI5OutwKSrT5kPjmtJSzFTdbmcUN9pn31uTTWbsRG1IWyqxIaUVBby6ERnJUQDvt-7Hi8-xiec8sUp6_QvjfG_AKw0OgAAw90GuwBe5JzVhXWn-0UukdYeYLwbv1qXxHfJn53qebZvEiMUc5f2UUH7qZHLA_KbeUTfNNah1vMWpIxVJMJhWzlhyZ2Klc8Vzx66DKKjl-cCsinc8TOiQ9nNScjE6MB_LvAsF_j8Bj2kbhwv1m7BqtRWtPWAJimMOWVuBDKkgzbw1rQ%3D%3D)
**Jesse Watters:** Joining me now, Missouri Senator Josh Hawley. Are you going to be there Senator?

**Josh Hawley** : No, I'm going to be watching from home, Jesse, like the rest of America, and I imagine it's going to be quite the piece of theater as he tries to explain his terrible record.

**Jesse Watters:** So what do you think is going to happen tonight— is he going to address anything on how to reduce gas prices?Is he going to hammer the Russian energy sector? What do you expect him to say?

**Josh Hawley** : What I expect is a lot of smoke and mirrors taking credit for things he's had nothing to do with while trying to distract attention from his dumpster fire of a presidency. I mean listen, what he should be saying is we need to open up American energy production full throttle, we need to be the energy dominant nation in the world and we're not, and the reason we're not is Joe Biden. The reason we have runaway inflation is Joe Biden. The reason we have a shipping crisis, a supply chain crisis at this stage, is Joe Biden. So if he wants to assign blame, all he needs is a mirror, and he can look in it because he's the source of most of these problems, and the solutions he's offering are either non-existent or totally fake.

**Jesse Watters: **Well you know your colleagues pretty well. Are they going to stand up and give him a round of applause when he talks about, you know, forming this coalition to take on Putin and rallying the free world, or are they going to sit on their hands?

**Josh Hawley** : You know I don't know why this administration is breaking its arm patting itself on the back for an invasion that it didn't prevent. The goal should have been to deter Vladimir Putin from invading a sovereign nation. He utterly failed in that regard. We have an invasion on our hands and part of the big reason for that is Joe Biden gave energy dominance to Vladimir Putin. He shut down our pipeline and he opened up Russia's pipeline. That's the Biden legacy. That's what he's done. So now it's time to change course. If the president wants to be serious, he'll admit that his policies have been wrong, that his policies have been weak, that his policies have endangered this nation and the world, and he'll tell us how he's going to change course.

**Jesse Watters: **All right. I don't expect that, but I will be watching anyway. Thank you so much, Senator Hawley.

**Josh Hawley** : Thank you.

name: Donna Imam
subject: Thank you.
body:
I am writing to let you know what we accomplished together and how grateful I am for your support throughout this campaign. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42481669/333101476/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1NTU1Ny02MzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHpzEZjIM_IhjNOXMSXaw-fgz6UlUBhWO0IT_CRTbTI=)
Friend, While yesterday’s results didn’t go the way we wanted it to, I am humbled by the many months of immense hard work of our campaign, our field organizers, our amazing volunteers, and the grassroots support from thousands of you. Thank you. I am truly grateful. **Our work is not over. We must keep working to engage voters in a diverse Texas where working families still need healthcare coverage and debt-free education. I believe we need to do the hard work on the ground and that’s exactly what we did. **
* **Our campaign reached over 60,000 voters _at their door_.** Our field organizers worked tirelessly to ensure voters were aware of redistricting, the outcome of the 2020 Census, and what’s at stake for Texans in 2022. We were able to do this important work because of _your support_.

It has always been difficult for grassroots candidates to fundraise, to gain support of major organizations, and attract media coverage. Every grassroots campaign faces these structural hurdles. **I’m committed to continue finding solutions to overcome these challenges.** **What’s next? ** We started this campaign with the goal of increasing Democratic voter turnout to win statewide Texas races. Winning statewide races is the only way we can get healthcare coverage, protect women’s healthcare, and reverse voting restrictions in Texas. **To win statewide races, we need high Democratic voter turnout in deep blue districts in Texas in November so we can deliver for Texans. That’s what I am committed to.** With sincere gratitude,
Donna Imam

---

name: Lou Barletta
subject: This is important 📎
body:
| | | | Not asking for money
---
[](www.loubarletta.com)
---
Hey Peter Willis,

The liberal Pennsylvania Supreme Court shortened the time to collect petition signatures to qualify to get on the ballot, and _**I need your help**_. I’m reaching out to let you know about some upcoming Team Barletta grassroots events. It is CRUCIAL that we push as many supporters as possible to these events to make sure we have enough petition signatures to get my name on the ballot for Governor.

Can I count on you to make it out to one of these events? Feel free to forward these invites to anyone you know in these counties. We will have petitions for these counties and surrounding counties at each event.

Check it out ⬇️
---

clean_body: | | | | Not asking for money www.loubarletta.com Hey Peter Willis, The liberal Pennsylvania Supreme Court shortened the time to collect petition signatures to qualify to get on the ballot, and I need your help. I’m reaching out to let you know about some upcoming Team Barletta grassroots events. It is CRUCIAL that we push as many supporters as possible to these events to make sure we have enough petition signatures to get my name on the ballot for Governor. Can I count on you to make it out to one of these events? Feel free to forward these invites to anyone you know in these counties. We will have petitions for these counties and surrounding counties at each event. Check it out ⬇️ DELAWARE (March 3rd): | LACKAWANNA (March 4th): | LUZERNE (March 4th): | COLUMBIA (March 5th): | BUTLER (March 7th): | WESTMORELAND (March 7th): | CARBON (March 8th): | I hope to see you there! Lou Barletta Republican Front Runner Governor of Pennsylvania www.loubarletta.com | | | | ==

name: Team Slotkin
subject: ICYMI: Elissa on Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congress[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/ElissaSlotkin_bigLogo.png]
Friend,
Over the last few days, the world has watched the heartbreaking scenes out of Ukraine. We’ve seen the actions of one man cause indefensible chaos on a global scale, seen the international community rally to respond, and most importantly, we’ve seen the determination and resolve of the Ukrainian people.
Elissa has been monitoring the situation closely as events develop on the ground and working with her colleagues as the U.S. continues to respond. We wanted to make sure you heard from her directly, so we’ve collected some clips from the past week. You can view them below:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xXAsGzH-4LU [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xXAsGzH-4LU]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tLowxvs2T0Q [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tLowxvs2T0Q]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8kjaXz2V-po [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8kjaXz2V-po]
Thank you for reading,
Team Slotkin

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congress[] Friend, Over the last few days, the world has watched the heartbreaking scenes out of Ukraine. We’ve seen the actions of one man cause indefensible chaos on a global scale, seen the international community rally to respond, and most importantly, we’ve seen the determination and resolve of the Ukrainian people. Elissa has been monitoring the situation closely as events develop on the ground and working with her colleagues as the U.S. continues to respond. We wanted to make sure you heard from her directly, so we’ve collected some clips from the past week. You can view them below: [] [] [] Thank you for reading, Team Slotkin [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Fossil-fueled fascists like Vladimir Putin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Our response to President Biden's State of the Union.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-congress-climate-investments/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&t=2&akid=12948%2E53494%2En7kAc-) Friend, Fossil fuels help prop up petrostate dictators like Vladimir Putin. The modern Russian state is built on fossil fuel extraction––in fact, in recent years, the industry provided more than half of the country's federal budget revenue and over 30% of its GDP. _Yes, really._ Let's take a step back: Last night, in his first State of the Union address, President Biden committed to confronting Russia's unprovoked violence, protecting consumers from high energy prices, and taking bold climate action. The path forward is clear: Biden must address these three interconnected crises with both legislative _and_ executive action. Congress and the president have a historic opportunity to cut energy costs for working families in the U.S., reduce carbon pollution, and undermine the power of fossil-fueled fascists like Vladimir Putin. There's no doubt: We must invest in a clean energy future. And that means the Senate must pass the $555 million in climate investments outlined in the Build Back Better Act. [**_After President Biden's big speech last night, will you help keep up our climate momentum and call on your senators to pass these vital climate and clean energy investments? (It just takes a minute, and as always, we have a script ready for you!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-congress-climate-investments/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&t=3&akid=12948%2E53494%2En7kAc-) | [CALL YOUR SENATORS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-congress-climate-investments/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&t=4&akid=12948%2E53494%2En7kAc-)
---
It's time for Congress to deliver bold investments for clean energy and climate action. Under Biden's leadership, the U.S. can lead the world away from fossil fuels toward a clean energy future––all while addressing the climate crisis, saving Americans money, and weakening the power of petrostates like Russia.
[**_The best way you can help is by calling your senators today and urging them to pass the vital climate investments in Build Back Better._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-congress-climate-investments/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&t=5&akid=12948%2E53494%2En7kAc-)
Thanks for picking up your phone and taking action today,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
P.S. For folks in D.C. committed to taking climate action today: We stand with you for D.C. statehood and encourage you to forward this email to friends and family who can make a call to their senators on your behalf today.
[MAKE A CALL](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-congress-climate-investments/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&source=ema_2022-03-02_sotu_response_call_congress_&t=6&akid=12948%2E53494%2En7kAc-)
---

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=99c5570fa88849168a693b03964625aa&_e=ZLHNBdeACL2mSzBm2MHaenpiR1AlTrnxAEexJU8Qe0w-A6IkoJIy5cizsjlMlqpbfbUGJZo5xNr8a8DmZKGQLFVLkI7j0sBbHi5VFNGp_wxDoz-rr8RKvTXugKkQxMc_k2GhWWAuJKYKGCiDYP1Uyd1cFN3jWKLsnEjUkFdryXB26NC9FNWjSUOMNQ9F_x6xhY6OKi5kL-etH3RO7XTSoG2-NCgpz1akYtiDeHGQVDJswE7CSaALv34itqwulXCBfqjNmW7DqBVoj-Zg84kaDxtYtEpqNKaLscMMjTkwRQJOtH7bCVK3ECRjhi8BrpO4pmuDaLXyqsJ6Zhn1ul_CFunZ8rCqYF579O_igV0OQOSEVfeJOquw089wyj6waRc9chXf48kM9_zsN1l_mOouz0S9a2dfgE4sJ_0x6SPXa7LN5KQj2AGMJG8YC587DDbTw3gc0S-0PGLzQASMhfGia4kjYyyJSn8Iy29V0x7SCjM%3D)

I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won’t be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=99c5570fa88849168a693b03964625aa&_e=ZLHNBdeACL2mSzBm2MHaenpiR1AlTrnxAEexJU8Qe0w-A6IkoJIy5cizsjlMlqpbfbUGJZo5xNr8a8DmZKGQLFVLkI7j0sBbHi5VFNGp_wxDoz-rr8RKvTXugKkQxMc_k2GhWWAuJKYKGCiDYP1Uyd1cFN3jWKLsnEjUkFdryXB26NC9FNWjSUOMNQ9F_x6xhY6OKi5kL-etH3RO7XTSoG2-NCgpz1akYtiDeHGQVDJswE7CSaALv34itqwulXCBfqjNmW7DqBVoj-Zg84kaD8BJ18KA3xEq4_jY6F7e-tr0GdXh2a5xdMqT-4Kib8d8Hgr7n30M97ritUMQQS8xDIe6NF6j5sIW9TkTpwfQz6AH8S8bZHivwjDUCP10BN7dx4rlPn6M6ot9DInC_Ih4QfoMU5DpMy1iKTI_Vj-bFr4fzWCSwKGXUFkLIv6dBE55_8-NpjC4vFLxKChaHJMd4E9SjvzB9lDJ3Akd-rUU57I%3D)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $15,000 before March 15th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=99c5570fa88849168a693b03964625aa&_e=ZLHNBdeACL2mSzBm2MHaenpiR1AlTrnxAEexJU8Qe0w-A6IkoJIy5cizsjlMlqpbfbUGJZo5xNr8a8DmZKGQLFVLkI7j0sBbHi5VFNGp_wxDoz-rr8RKvTXugKkQxMc_k2GhWWAuJKYKGCiDYP1Uyd1cFN3jWKLsnEjUkFdryXB26NC9FNWjSUOMNQ9F_x6xhY6OKi5kL-etH3RO7XTSoG2-NCgpz1akYtiDeHGQVDJswE7CSaALv34itqwulXCBfqjNmW7DqBVoj-Zg84kaD-o0jT4qFvqaWK3XrcVMMttGc9Q6K0D9mZSYhJC2hasHET2cY__BPgI2KTw7UVGe4Id6f65cnW7cpWA9OcfgjIKF9005soykmnNOcKZKChkfygMjO41_mVb891uGPr7q_RRBRtlgGjoKvjpNxV0cgeSBxir1wJ9OeE1HUF_a-r_PQUE8tJL7DC7NUXQjuiFxQ-gJsCkE2Iey_B3Ywgh2bD8%3D)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=99c5570fa88849168a693b03964625aa&_e=ZLHNBdeACL2mSzBm2MHaenpiR1AlTrnxAEexJU8Qe0w-A6IkoJIy5cizsjlMlqpbfbUGJZo5xNr8a8DmZKGQLFVLkI7j0sBbHi5VFNGp_wxDoz-rr8RKvTXugKkQxMc_k2GhWWAuJKYKGCiDYP1Uyd1cFN3jWKLsnEjUkFdryXB26NC9FNWjSUOMNQ9F_x6xhY6OKi5kL-etH3RO7XTSoG2-NCgpz1akYtiDeHGQVDJswE7CSaALv34itqwulXCBfqjNmW7DqBVoj-Zg84kaDz7Mezq2kD1EjWAzZVr5ptfPvdqSeOp7rNqypkdJBgECHN9RytmFFM13CqMAoSK6tIc1sCGfVfI42Pe5YcaZmCItcqZRlI-hckVK1ZXH-lNuYd66__vEOF5Zb6TeIwuupjfIA3ghV8-9-uAp8FMLK413Q6GLoOyxUIPJ4RpaAUtzc2sYtawXT6YzPIPEDD9yZgRShL__UtCqokEbvLTZlfY%3D)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

subject: RED WAVE APPROACHING!
body:
Biden just demonstrated why we can elect a GOP governor this fall. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d93663e4764d/red-wave-approaching?e=7e91be8cad)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=214eed939e&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=f22ee7963e&e=7e91be8cad)

| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=f0cc3be9bf&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Did you see Biden's State of the Union address last night? In it, **he demonstrated exactly why this year is the best opportunity we've had in decades to finally elect a Republican governor in the State of Oregon!** With out-of-control inflation, reckless Democratic spending, rising violent crime, and unconstitutional mandates, it's clear that _Americans are fed up with the direction of our country -- and Oregonians are fed up with the direction of our state._

But if we want to take advantage of this opportunity, we must nominate a Republican candidate who can actually win the general election. **As a tech CEO and small business owner, I know what it takes to get our economy back on track. As a former homeless teen, I understand the intricacies of how to get the unsheltered off the streets. And as a mom, I will fight for your kids and their right to a quality education unobstructed by politics just as hard as I will fight for my own.**

Before we get there, we have to make it through this packed Republican primary. _**In honor of this year's impending Red Wave, will you donate $20.22 to ensure Oregon doesn't miss out?**_

---
| [Donate $20.22!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=8e8aca876a&e=7e91be8cad "Donate $20.22!")
---
| [Donate Other Amount](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=2d35675c51&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Other Amount")
---
| This won't be easy, but I know that with your support, we can win this primary and defeat the Democrats this November. Will you help us get there?

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

| | | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=c2891af5f3&e=7e91be8cad)

name: Team McGrath
subject: Reproductive choice is a fundamental right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Deb will defend reproductive rights in Congress.

| **ATTENTION WISCONSIN: GOP legislators are trying to take away abortion access in our state.

[Deb will stand with Democrats in Congress to codify the right to abortion care everywhere. Rush a donation to elect her >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482200/333104790/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.640aae4f-649a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.640aae4f-649a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBhYWU0Zi02NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFOAIdqcwm3D4ULP3kB4abvnkKULw6EFCzieYeIbEZA=)**
* * *
Peter,

Politicians have no right to make deeply personal medical decisions for us.

Yet right-wing lawmakers here in Wisconsin and across the country are set to deny women the right to determine their own life paths and timing of family.

**Right now, Republicans are pushing through legislation to ban abortion in Wisconsin after six weeks. This is before most women even know they are pregnant. It’s a model we have seen cause immeasurable harm in Texas and other states.**

Peter, with Roe v. Wade under threat from the Supreme Court and reproductive rights under attack everywhere, it’s never been more important to elect strong advocates for the right to choose. Deb will always defend reproductive rights in Congress, but she needs your help to get there.

**[Donate today to stand with Deb and Democrats who know that protecting the right to choose is essential>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482202/333104792/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.640aae4f-649a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.640aae4f-649a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDBhYWU0Zi02NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFOAIdqcwm3D4ULP3kB4abvnkKULw6EFCzieYeIbEZA=)** clean_body: Deb will defend reproductive rights in Congress. | ATTENTION WISCONSIN: GOP legislators are trying to take away abortion access in our state. = Peter, Politicians have no right to make deeply personal medical decisions for us. Yet right-wing lawmakers here in Wisconsin and across the country are set to deny women the right to determine their own life paths and timing of family. Right now, Republicans are pushing through legislation to ban abortion in Wisconsin after six weeks. This is before most women even know they are pregnant. It’s a model we have seen cause immeasurable harm in Texas and other states. Peter, with Roe v. Wade under threat from the Supreme Court and reproductive rights under attack everywhere, it’s never been more important to elect strong advocates for the right to choose. Deb will always defend reproductive rights in Congress, but she needs your help to get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with women across the nation, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. name: Patty Murray
subject: Sign on now: support our plans to lower families’ costs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, President Biden delivered the State of the Union address and here are some big takeaways on what we accomplished in the last year and Democrats’ plans to lower costs for families:
1. We accomplished a lot in the last year, from the American Rescue Plan that got shots in arms, helped reopen schools safely, and kept small businesses afloat to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law that means more good jobs upgrading our roads, bridges, ferries, and ports.
2. There is more to do–because it’s not fair that as huge corporations are seeing record profits coming out of the pandemic, people here in Washington state and nationwide who pump their own gas and get their own groceries are seeing their money not go as far as it used to.
3. And that’s why Democrats have plans to strengthen supply chains here at home and help ease prices directly, but also keep fighting on other big costs families see in their budgets: Child care. Health care coverage. Prescription drugs. Education. The things you know I’m always thinking about. All paid for, by the way, by making those huge corporations who are doing just fine finally pay their fair share.

Peter, I was really disappointed to see some Republicans actually booing these plans last night–even though the only plans they’ve put forward are tax breaks for the wealthiest and tax hikes on seniors and retirees.
**[Will you stand with me and sign the petition to deliver a message today to Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans: get on board, or get out of the way?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42491334/333164611/-802168288?ms=pm_em_220302_1&refcode=pm_em_220302_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzMTcxNy04ZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT5DTmY-xPSxJiE7OeJIUXoNE0kLalWZnaU7SBQtCDI=&emci=37179ab0-799a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=97331717-8e9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**
Thanks for all you do,
Patty

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42491335/333164613/-802168288?ms=pm_em_220302_1&refcode=pm_em_220302_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzMzMTcxNy04ZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT5DTmY-xPSxJiE7OeJIUXoNE0kLalWZnaU7SBQtCDI=&emci=37179ab0-799a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=97331717-8e9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

In 2018, Beto's historic Senate campaign helped turn out Democratic voters all across the state - _enough to**FLIP** two House seats and secure our HISTORIC House Majority!!_

And now, as Beto fights to become Texas' next governor, we have an **INCREDIBLE** opportunity to replicate that momentum and **SAVE** our House Majority once and for all.

Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5c499cc14e464101b48a79c2a128d4c6&_e=ZhZ_6Ivp-xXMt04Bnf8i_1nSDOHBX9FKgJOlghRXJ76E-6Uigj8I7Q2tJulZbfdQd6xJuKDrHoAEw7IkXh7teLkCBQqDL8cTDWa6m7rZPrmcS-PWoMDzNo2My6cngh6j5aOxpZKWtXlabttvcBsIqbJwdeZN-FAxhfdsWzgCQNnFmGrXZpzLhJ4i0sZr-k3pmutaOSpH3aLnC5gh6zLlqOz_hcY54TM7rASj-9JzbJhnZoRPJFMmZ2YIa0BTmUDZEBfp-IF_wmnmRqdeys4mMNpvuOE4ZZcSPA1f8EzHeM4sS7gVDK5o8qIgSbrBBglxM499lDIN4RZq5idsayjYhuGR2TW3zFS_xPjNBl1zr_pffjO8hE8UUl-PiN5oeqZs1jCC27G_MEBl24gmJsqmoDlt5IJDnPNlJwBmb04QtvkImBZ2brjYk0UDS4jmcONnpQ4-kqTRHOXZEU25AGpV-REn6kQ90150z7H_Vxzht_l3SE_IxexE3BQ-AtGl4LADd8kKePrmAeUTy7anHTGR7ae3m2PDI1-2_YU6m1kwMJXvxwt74u6Ui2wQEUt0S_aR)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5c499cc14e464101b48a79c2a128d4c6&_e=ZhZ_6Ivp-xXMt04Bnf8i_1nSDOHBX9FKgJOlghRXJ76E-6Uigj8I7Q2tJulZbfdQd6xJuKDrHoAEw7IkXh7teLkCBQqDL8cTDWa6m7rZPrmcS-PWoMDzNo2My6cngh6j5aOxpZKWtXlabttvcBsIqbJwdeZN-FAxhfdsWzgCQNnFmGrXZpzLhJ4i0sZr-k3pmutaOSpH3aLnC5gh6zLlqOz_hcY54TM7rASj-9JzbJhnZoRPJFMmZ2YIa0BTmUDZEBfp-IF_wmnmRqdeys4mMNpvuOE4ZZcSPA1f8EzHeM4sS7gVDK5o8qIgSbrBBglxM499lDIN4RZq5idsayjYhuGR2TW3zFS_xPjNBl1zr_qreCqV9Rwr_EGstdPdWGlJZUFsmPYeM41LBDi23BjRGRuY86NkcDWrMvfNBPw6LfsH61BBw9TUM2V5ZtU8WOOOBeMIQ0IVIY1aHn21ECDu4F42GOgSnZCV5TjRpfpRFZuIqZZ0PPDwcMngco__ZCZX9wY7nngb7hyKDsma9d_8N70P7uzuXDa6P1L4_fOpLo94cdAUtQ6EHp7ojv-nve0X)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: John Lewis and Miss Pearl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea for Ohio Chelsea For Ohio
body:
We must fight for our rights.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482384/333105899/1967714237?refcode=trumpem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDI4NjMzNi02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvEcd8aAV71fD0Bqy2KVTWGslFEAB8I-NUbmMWez2pg=)
---
| | Hi Friend, In 2020, while I was working at a local polling location in Hamilton County, I started a conversation with a woman named Miss Pearl. She told me about how over fifty years ago, she was an activist, fighting for the rights that would become the Voting Rights Act of 1965. So I asked her, how do you think access to the ballot box now is compared to then? She told me, "It makes me sick. I am so frustrated." Because nothing has changed. We look at the activists whose shoulders we stand on and the work that they put in, the sacrifices they've made, and the lives lost in a fight for something that is fundamentally our right. It is unconscionable to have the lack of easy access to voting in our state. It's a system that has been intentionally broken and miscommunicated to sow chaos and reduce people's faith in our government.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482385/333105900/1967714237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDI4NjMzNi02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvEcd8aAV71fD0Bqy2KVTWGslFEAB8I-NUbmMWez2pg=)
---
Over the weekend I went back to my hometown of Lima where I was the keynote speaker at the 2nd Annual John Lewis Celebration. While I was honored to be there I couldn’t help thinking about Miss Pearl and how much work we still have to do. If you can file your taxes online there is no reason why you shouldn’t be able to file for an absentee ballot online. All that is missing is the desire to see more people voting. We know that there are people who have permanent disabilities that will prevent them from making it to the polls. There is no reason why we cannot maintain a permanent absentee voter list. An 18 year old can show up at a recruiter’s office and join the military in an afternoon. That same young person should be able to show up and vote that same day! I have the fight in me. I hope you will join me.
---
---
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482386/333105901/1967714237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDI4NjMzNi02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvEcd8aAV71fD0Bqy2KVTWGslFEAB8I-NUbmMWez2pg=)
---
We will do this together, Chelsea
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482388/333105903/1967714237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDI4NjMzNi02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvEcd8aAV71fD0Bqy2KVTWGslFEAB8I-NUbmMWez2pg=)
---
Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.
---
**Donate**
---

clean_body: We must fight for our rights.| | | = | | Hi Friend, In 2020, while I was working at a local polling location in Hamilton County, I started a conversation with a woman named Miss Pearl. She told me about how over fifty years ago, she was an activist, fighting for the rights that would become the Voting Rights Act of 1965. So I asked her, how do you think access to the ballot box now is compared to then? She told me, "It makes me sick. I am so frustrated." Because nothing has changed. We look at the activists whose shoulders we stand on and the work that they put in, the sacrifices they've made, and the lives lost in a fight for something that is fundamentally our right. It is unconscionable to have the lack of easy access to voting in our state. It's a system that has been intentionally broken and miscommunicated to sow chaos and reduce people's faith in our government. = Over the weekend I went back to my hometown of Lima where I was the keynote speaker at the 2nd Annual John Lewis Celebration. While I was honored to be there I couldn’t help thinking about Miss Pearl and how much work we still have to do. If you can file your taxes online there is no reason why you shouldn’t be able to file for an absentee ballot online. All that is missing is the desire to see more people voting. We know that there are people who have permanent disabilities that will prevent them from making it to the polls. There is no reason why we cannot maintain a permanent absentee voter list. An 18 year old can show up at a recruiter’s office and join the military in an afternoon. That same young person should be able to show up and vote that same day! I have the fight in me. I hope you will join me. = We will do this together, Chelsea | = Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. Donate | | | | | | mailto:info@chelseaforohio.com ---|---|--- Paid for by Chelsea for Ohio Chelsea For Ohio 5004 Staas Road Cleves, OH 45002 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I’m sincerely asking...

|

| | [**_I’m sincerely asking: will you add your name to endorse my campaign to flip this seat blue? If 1,000 supporters sign on, I’ll show everyone that I have the momentum to win this important race for Democrats. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to get my campaign off the ground. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482588/333106540/958816626?source=20220302_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5YjNkNy02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL6Q0ewgIl2dfOinTfAkthRdeVBBaRR1NGKFcjI5yvk=&emci=2e17f2fb-8599-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=8fe9b3d7-659a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19927889) I made it through my first public fundraising deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482589/333106541/958816626?source=20220302_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5YjNkNy02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL6Q0ewgIl2dfOinTfAkthRdeVBBaRR1NGKFcjI5yvk=&emci=2e17f2fb-8599-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=8fe9b3d7-659a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. I need 1,000 endorsements today to prove I have the support of voters, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482590/333106542/958816626?source=20220302_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5YjNkNy02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL6Q0ewgIl2dfOinTfAkthRdeVBBaRR1NGKFcjI5yvk=&emci=2e17f2fb-8599-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=8fe9b3d7-659a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19927889) | | [Endorse Tony!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42482591/333106543/958816626?source=20220302_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU5YjNkNy02NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL6Q0ewgIl2dfOinTfAkthRdeVBBaRR1NGKFcjI5yvk=&emci=2e17f2fb-8599-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=8fe9b3d7-659a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=19927889)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

clean_body: I’m sincerely asking... | | | I made it through my first public fundraising deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. | | I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got. Endorsements like yours will help me get a running start to lift my grassroots campaign off the ground. I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Congress. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. name: Giffords
subject: Please sign Giffords’ petition in support of President Biden’s call to pass background checks, ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines, and repeal immunity for gun manufacturers.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
On this issue, there is NO division among the American people watching at home.
#

[**PLEASE ADD YOUR NAME AS A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF JOE BIDEN’S CALL TO PASS BACKGROUND CHECKS, BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS, AND REPEAL IMMUNITY FOR GUN MANUFACTURERS.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220302-1-15&refcode2=1645.3935704.yQzgyE&t=1&akid=1645%2E3935704%2EyQzgyE)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220302-1-15&refcode2=1645.3935704.yQzgyE&t=2&akid=1645%2E3935704%2EyQzgyE)
Friends - last night, President Biden made an impassioned plea to Congress that it’s long past time to take meaningful action that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
It was, at times, a divided night in the chamber. Oftentimes members of one party stood while members of the other remained seated.
But on this issue, there is far less division among the American people watching at home than the political pundits would have you believe.
The vast majority of Americans want action—action that will save lives.
Today, especially today, we want to send a message to Congress:
[**Please sign Giffords’ petition in support of President Biden’s call to pass background checks, ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines, and repeal immunity for gun manufacturers.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/biden_sotu_petition/?source=em220302-1-15&refcode2=1645.3935704.yQzgyE&t=3&akid=1645%2E3935704%2EyQzgyE)
The President didn’t have to speak as long as he did on this issue. We know stopping gun violence is a personal priority for him. Now let’s make sure Congress knows it's a priority of yours as well.
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1645%2E3935704%2EyQzgyE) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
