name: Lizzie for Congress
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220302?refcode=lpfe220302_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220302?refcode=lpfe220302_m]
Primary Day is over and we are excited to move forward to the November election with Lizzie as the Democratic Nominee for TX-07 .
We have a lot of work to do from here to November, but yesterday made clear how important it is that we work together until then to make sure we put our community and country on the right course forward.
Seeing the elections in Texas made clear the difference between candidates like Lizzie who have a hopeful and unifying message and those who seek to divide people across the state and the country.
Watching last night’s State of the Union address reinforced that message — and reinforced how important it is to elect people who will lead us in these difficult times.
Last night, President Biden rallied the world to stand up for democracy against Russian aggression, and for democracy here at home. He outlined his vision to grow the economy from the bottom up and middle out and lower costs for American families. It’s worth noting that this year we have had the fastest economic growth in nearly 40 years. But we know there is more to do to lower costs for American families — and Democrats are working to do just that. Of course, President Biden reminded us of the progress we have made fighting COVID-19 because of investments President Biden and Congressional Democrats have made. He also highlighted the need to defend our rights, protect our communities, and to unite as Americans around issues we agree on.
Just think of what we might have heard if House Democrats were not in the majority. We saw how important it is to hold the House.
So, we now focus our efforts and energy on the general election, and we hope we can count on your continued engagement. We’ll be in touch soon with more ways you can get involved and support our campaign ahead of November.
Thank you for being a part of our team,
Team Lizze
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220302?refcode=lpfe220302_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/92d5b3b6-7999-ec11-a507-281878b80eda/90bb5b32-919a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGJiNWIzMi05MTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WebG01NTFB-5_iLq0AeMV463CS9ztgHkh8fz2f_ox6c=&id=136196035 .

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: A note about reproductive health legislation failing in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friend —
On Monday, Senate Republicans blocked a vote on the Women’s Health Protection Act, legislation that, if passed, would have codified _Roe v. Wade_ at the federal level.
**Let’s be clear: abortion is healthcare, and the right to an abortion is under attack.**
In recent months, we’ve seen Republican legislators in states like Texas and Georgia pass restrictive legislation making it very difficult to access abortion services. And the conservative-majority Supreme Court is likely to formally overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in the coming months. Of course, people of color and economically disadvantaged individuals will be disproportionately hurt by these dangerous policies.
This is a dire situation, and Democrats must act quickly and decisively to protect access to abortion services on a federal level.
**That starts with abolishing the filibuster so that the Women’s Health Protection Act can get a fair vote in the Senate, and expanding the Supreme Court to restore ideological balance.**
Reproductive healthcare is an issue that’s personally important to me. I challenged former State Senator Jeff Klein in 2018 because I was frustrated by his and the IDC’s attempts to block the passage of progressive legislation, including legislation codifying the right to a legal abortion.
In 2019, after the IDC was brought down, I joined other Democrats in the New York legislature to _finally_ pass a bill codifying the right to an abortion. But abortion being legal doesn’t mean it’s accessible to all, so I introduced legislation that would allow New Yorkers to make a gift to a statewide abortion fund via their tax forms.
Now, it’s time for Democrats in Congress to follow our state’s lead by doing everything in their power to pass legislation legalizing abortion.
For too long, members of our party have prioritized playing it safe over actually getting things done for everyday Americans — while Republicans have shown over and over again that they’ll do anything to get their agenda passed.
**I won’t rest until we abolish the filibuster, expand the Supreme Court, and make abortion legal, safe, and accessible for all.**
– Alessandra
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220302-1-30&refcode2=532_59515_cnP3zp&akid=532%2E59515%2EcnP3zp)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=532%2E59515%2EcnP3zp).

AG James has spent the last four years fighting tirelessly to defend New Yorkers from the influence of the corrupt and powerful – but this might be her hardest fight yet. **That’s why we URGENTLY need your help to reach our goal of raising $20,000 before midnight tomorrow, but we’re still $9,550 short.**

**[So please, can we count on you to rush $5 or more to Attorney General James’ re-election campaign to defend New York and defeat her GOP opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42483116/333109165/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk389-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjJjMjA4OC02NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWbHOrJ4zgzXzIij2nfoZBhe14EnRedh8ngSxe5NrN4=)**

**But that isn’t the truth.** The truth is that Attorney General James has fought every single day to hold the dark and powerful forces of New York accountable. The truth is that she has taken up the fight against some of the most wealthy and influential organizations, companies, and people in our country in order to defend the voiceless and vulnerable. **The truth is that Letitia James is the fierce defender that New York deserves.

name: Rick Scott
subject: There are TWO genders
body:
Peter,
**Men are men, women are women, and unborn babies are babies. **

Facts are facts, the earth is round, the sun is hot, there are two genders, and abortion stops a beating heart. To say otherwise is to deny science.

In America, we should believe in science, but the radical Left wants to make their own facts and _destroy_ the basic tenants of life and gender.

This liberal agenda is destroying our society, and if we’re going to save America, we have to teach the next generation the truth.

**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and believing in SCIENCE is a top part of our plan.**

It’s time to show the radical Left that Americans won’t stand for their agenda, so I put together a survey for every patriot to show that they KNOW the truth about gender and life.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Nothing short of extraordinary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last night, President Biden put forward a record of accomplishment and a vision for the country that we can all be immensely proud of. But I need you in the fight to help us continue this progress.
#
Peter,
Last night, President Biden put forward a record of accomplishment and a vision for the country that we can all be immensely proud of.
Amid a global pandemic, economic recession, and the immense task of rebuilding from the Trump years, the progress the President and our Democratic majority have made in the past year is nothing short of extraordinary.
In a minute, I'm going to break down those accomplishments in a longer email than usual, as well as the work that lies ahead to put working families first. But first, I have to ask: [**Can you contribute $3 or any amount to our campaign today to help us power the necessary organizing for our progressive agenda, to protect our Democratic majority, and to elect more strong progressives to Congress this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1071&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=1071_420207_ehEdFc&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1071&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=1071_420207_ehEdFc&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)**
What does the progress that President Biden touted last night look like?
* The American Rescue Plan, which led to the biggest yearly job growth in history, creating more than six million jobs
* Higher wages and the lowest unemployment rate since 1969
* The only advanced economy with its GDP at pre-pandemic levels
* 4.2 million more people with health insurance than last year
* The child tax credit lowering hunger across the country by 32 percent and cutting child poverty in half
* Taking on big corporate monopolies that are increasing costs and killing small businesses
* Restoring many of our foreign alliances

**But as you and I both know, Peter — now comes the work to continue this progress.** The challenges that families faced before the pandemic are still with us, and Congress must make real strides in the promises we made to the American people.
We must pass legislation to lower the costs of pre-K, health care, home-based care, housing, and child care — _all by finally making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share._ And we can't wait any longer to take meaningful action to address the climate crisis and deliver a roadmap to citizenship for immigrant communities.
President Biden has significant power to effect immediate, meaningful change for people across America, and he should use it aggressively. Through executive authority, he can bring down the costs of prescription drugs, decrease carbon emissions to fight the climate crisis, cancel student debt, protect workers' rights, raise wages, provide immigration relief, and rebuild our refugee system.
And as President Biden said, "capitalism without competition is exploitation" — now more than ever, we must continue to take on corporate profiteering and monopolistic abuse with every tool we have if we're going to make progress on all these important issues.
It's crystal clear: Democrats in the White House and Congress have shown how much we can accomplish in a year. **And I believe if we remain committed to providing relief our communities need, lowering costs, and making life easier for working people — _we can deliver._**
[**If you're still with me in this fight, contribute $3 or any amount to our campaign today. We've come too far to let up now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1071&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=1071_420207_ehEdFc&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)
It's an honor to know you're fighting alongside me. Thank you, Peter.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220302-1071-footer&t=22&refcode2=1071_420207_ehEdFc&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1071%2E420207%2EehEdFc)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: One Step Forward!
body:
We have a long way to go to November 8 | |
---
| | |
---
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kathleentx13
| I'm humbled and excited by the primary victory last night. It's a great honor to receive so much support and so many votes. It's the most by a Democratic candidate in the primary in this district for some time.

But we have a long way to go to November 8. My opponent is entrenched and receiving copious amounts of money from special interest groups.

I know we have the momentum, and I will keep fighting for every last vote. Our democracy depends on it.

Last night, we also went over 1,000 individual donations.

Please help me keep the momentum going by taking a few minutes to donate now.

Thank you!

name: Team Demings
subject: Fwd: [You've been selected to represent your area] Biden Approval Poll >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Show your support for the President at this key moment
| | |
---
After President Biden's State of the Union address last night, we called on grassroots Democrats to rally around our commander-in-chief like never before, friend! **But we still need ONE more supporter from ****your area to****respond to our time-sensitive poll.**
Despite President Biden's strong leadership, Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are doing whatever they can to rally their extremist base to stall the Biden agenda. That's why it's imperative that top Democrats like _you_ show your support for the President at this key moment.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden Bread Lines
body:
The Swamp is taking advantage of conflict in Ukraine to push their agenda.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A) The Swamp is taking advantage of conflict in Ukraine to push their agenda.

My RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Dan Webster, reacted by jumping on the bandwagon and co-sponsored legislation last week to bolster America's energy independence - which is ABSOLUTELY needed but not related to Ukraine. However, it is directly related to Joe Biden shutting down the KeystoneXL Pipeline.

Russia exports only 10% of the world's crude oil, and the vast majority of that is piped to Europe and China. Only 3% of American oil imports come from Russia. But if you're watching the Fake News Media and listening to Establishment politicians drone on about Russia, you would think that all of our oil comes from Russia. What they aren't talking about, and **what will be DRAMATICALLY affected by Russian aggression against Ukraine is our food supply.** Since 2018, Russia has been the leading global exporter of wheat. Ukraine is the fifth largest exporter of wheat!

With inflation and food prices already skyrocketing, the Biden Regime has no solution to the disaster that is headed our way - and RINO's in Congress are too busy jockeying for attention that they don't take the time to research all of the real threats related to this conflict.

[**Help me replace Do-Nothing Dan by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A)

**If you think grocery shelves are bare now, give it a month and look for the Biden Bread Lines.**

Washington is devoid of leadership, and in the case of my RINO opponent, Dan Webster is rarely ever present to vote. His recent flurry of legislative activity is ONLY because I've been breathing down his neck, calling him out for his historic absenteeism - **and when I get to Congress, I 'll be breathing down the necks of all "Do-Nothing" members of Congress**.

[**All I need is for you to help me get there.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A)

**Early voting for my Republican Primary where I face Do-Nothing Dan begins in just FOUR months.**

[**I need every dime raised and committed before then**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A), so March will be the most important fundraising month I have - **and the last month of the first quarter of 2022!**

I have to raise $108,000 this month to stay on track and win.

[**Please help me kick off the month strong by pitching in as generously as you can by donating here.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/WD5gNoXqSLikxPMB8hWdvw/MD763yWjYNjCjetNcyRsmo763A)

Thank you for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | | Hi there, [**My average donation since launching this campaign is $23.63. Because I don’t take any corporate money, I’m relying on grassroots donors like you. Please chip in whatever you can to help me win this race. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42491934/333170460/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTllZjNjOC05NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UtxeBF6MJX1fGGrHW9r0sCDucCOJgiljuuOSK8GgRrY=) After watching the State of the Union address last night, I have a few reactions. First, the dire possibility of nuclear war with Russia should have been front and center, along with diplomatic solutions to avert it. Second, I agree we should beat the opioid epidemic. However, doing so would require enacting Medicare for All and putting Biden’s pharma donors out of business. Third, the cost of insulin is indeed too high, but it shouldn’t be $35 — it should be $0. Fourth, the economy hasn't roared back for the 1 in 5 kids who are hungry, the 1 in 2 Americans who are poor/low-income, or the millions who can't afford their rent or mortgage. Fifth, where’s the plan to house the 600,000 people who are homeless in this country? name: Jessica Katzenmeyer
subject: Reflecting on Biden's SOTU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin
body:
Peter , did you listen to President Biden’s State of the Union speech last night? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42491922/333170444/-366912648?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjllZjNjOC05NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEHA8qopQpv2z3BKMO1CndAWrXyLluS0bh0o5GvwDOI=)
Peter, Did you listen to President Biden’s State of the Union speech last night? Biden's unifying speech received praise from people on both sides of the aisle and highlights why people voted for him in 2020. Biden’s vision of investing in America and supporting hardworking families are also core beliefs of my campaign for Congress. Raising the minimum wage to $15/hr.
Expanding the child tax credit.
Passing the PRO Act.
Capping insulin at $35 a month.
Empowering Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug costs.
People earning less than $400,000/year NOT paying an additional penny in new taxes. These promises and more are what this campaign is all about. subject: Have you heard? Jay Block Won the Pre-Primary Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Republicans know I have what it takes | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6883253?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=8091912ba0&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for your continued support. Thanks to your dedication to this Conservative campaign to save New Mexico from the radical Left, I have won the New Mexico Pre-Primary Convention on Saturday!

More than 1,000 patriots met in Ruidoso to select candidates to appear on the Republican Primary Ballot, and **my campaign obtained the most votes out of all 5 candidates** to be your next Governor! See the full story [here](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=749bd16676&e=102b599530).
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=bf96fdc6e7&e=102b599530)
---
| **We cannot stop now! Let’s keep up the momentum!**
Our movement to end failed leadership in New Mexico is boosting with support, and if we stand strong, we have the opportunity to replace MLG with a tried and tested Conservative fighter who is ready to prioritize New Mexicans over the failed extremist agenda.

Creating a safe New Mexico is my top priority, and my Law and Order campaign still has work to do. _I’d be honored if you could support my campaign for Governor._ Chipping in just $25 today will go a long way to bringing in a common sense, Conservative New Mexico.

name: Mark Warner
subject: An update on the war in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Over the past week, the world has watched in horror as Vladimir Putin has ordered Russia’s unprovoked illegal invasion of Ukraine.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42492046/333170916/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEzYjM5Yi05NTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFMFi4AJtoaiMKt7mHPRlEN3tXbymJ_0ERv5klCALbk=&emci=cf2e295e-929a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a8a3b39b-959a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Over the past week, the world has watched in horror as Vladimir Putin has ordered Russia’s unprovoked illegal invasion of Ukraine. I wanted to share with you this brief update on what I am doing to support the people and government of Ukraine as they defend against this act of aggression. In the days before the invasion, I was in Europe meeting with parliamentarians and other counterparts from our NATO allies. Even then, it was clear the United States and the world would need to be resolute and unified in standing up to Putin. And I am pleased to see that we have been. Reaction to the invasion of Ukraine has been swift and decisive. The global community is moving as one against Russia. The sanctions and other measures put in place have imposed serious costs on the Russian government and economy, and they have sent a message that America and its European allies stand united with Ukraine. We also know that modern warfare is not restricted only to the battlefield. Russia has a long history of information warfare and cyberattacks against the United States and our allies. Last week I sent a letter to the CEOs of major technology companies urging them to take every possible measure to prevent the spread of Russian misinformation and propaganda online. YouTube, Google, Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, and so many more have begun to heed the call and are taking measures to ensure only the truth of this war is seen. It is also imperative that the United States and its allies protect against possible cyber attacks from Russia. Such attacks have thankfully been limited thus far, but we know Russia has the capacity to do more, and a major cyber attack could further escalate this crisis. I’m working hard in the Senate to spearhead conversations that will provide clarity on how we respond to such actions. Derek, as this crisis continues to unfold in the coming weeks and months more is likely to be needed from all of us. I will be sure to keep you updated on what my office is doing, and how you may be able to help. We will continue to stand with our partners and friends in Ukraine in the fight for the cause of democracy. Thank you, Mark Warner

* * *
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

#

**Friend, we have breaking news:_a primary challenger has entered the race to unseat Mondaire._**
Since Mondaire took office last year, he’s held the line to build a brighter future for NY-17, and we can’t afford to lose his leadership in Washington.
Mondaire has worked day in and day out to secure over $23 billion in funding for New York under the _American Rescue Plan_ , successfully fought for a state-run mass vaccination site in Rockland County, and passed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to bring millions of good-paying, union jobs to our communities.
He’s shown what is possible when our elected officials prioritize people over profits, and we can’t allow a conservative Democratic opponent to unseat Mondaire and undermine the progress we've made.

clean_body: Friend, we have breaking news:a primary challenger has entered the race to unseat Mondaire. Since Mondaire took office last year, he’s held the line to build a brighter future for NY-17, and we can’t afford to lose his leadership in Washington. Mondaire has worked day in and day out to secure over $23 billion in funding for New York under the American Rescue Plan , successfully fought for a state-run mass vaccination site in Rockland County, and passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to bring millions of good-paying, union jobs to our communities. He’s shown what is possible when our elected officials prioritize people over profits, and we can’t allow a conservative Democratic opponent to unseat Mondaire and undermine the progress we've made. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Having a challenger with conservative values jump into the race in our newly-expanded district could be bad news. Mondaire is running in counties where Donald Trump won big in 2020, so we must fight harder to reach voters, prepare to overcome negative attack ads, and help voters make the most informed decision. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Mondaire is working on the frontlines to defend our democracy and stand up to special interests, so we need this grassroots movement working together to help him fight against this latest opponent. Thank you, Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. I could never have made it this far without the help of my family, all those who endorsed us, and of course, the grassroots voters like you who supported me since day one. Friend, Joe Biden refused to admit during his State of the Union Address last night the failure that is his “woke” progressive presidency. Biden and the Democrats have ravaged our economy, made us look weak on the world stage, and worst of all, put Americans LAST at every turn. name: =?utf-8?Q?Abel=20Mulugheta?=
subject: Thank You!
body:
I love Dallas and have a deep passion to serve—nothing will ever change that. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/abelfortexas.com/thank-you?e=2dc92facb0)
---
[](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=ea155e28fd&e=2dc92facb0)
# THANK YOU!
Nearly five months ago, I began a journey that would change my life. After seven years of serving my community as a legislative staffer, I made the decision to announce my bid for the United States Congress.

This past week, during the final day of Early Voting, my parents joined me at the polls to cast our ballots.
| | | | | | [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=79fbd021c9&e=2dc92facb0)
---
As a kid, my parents would bring me to the Skyline Branch Library in Dallas to check out books and use the internet.

In 2000, I would accompany my mom to this very library 3 days a week to study for her citizenship test. She passed with flying colors and voted in her first election the following year!

Fast forward 22 years—last Friday, my parents were able to see our family name on the ballot.

Every child deserves to live out their dreams. Every parent does too. And that’s why I decided to run for Congress.
|
---
While I hoped for a different result, my neighbors in District 30 have spoken and I respect their decision.

I want to thank my family, friends, and everyone who supported our campaign by investing their time, energy, and resources into something that was bigger than any one person. Your encouragement is what sustained me over the past five months and provided me the confidence to step into the arena and launch this campaign.

Although our campaign may have ended, I’ll never stop fighting to increase opportunities and create better outcomes for everyone in Dallas County. I’ve committed my entire adult life to a community that gave me so much. I love Dallas and have a deep passion to serve—nothing will ever change that.

Thank you!
|
---
| | | | [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=bc609449df&e=2dc92facb0)| [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=8f63878aa3&e=2dc92facb0)| [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=7237acf2f2&e=2dc92facb0)| [](mailto:info@abelfortexas.com)| [](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=7756032fef&e=2dc92facb0)

subject: Greg Casar is headed to Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Generations PAC
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9DpbTiLHpaz7hkAH3mOqckMGA/3k0/bqW2VqJZQlyxzQL7LEY2ow/h0/UwQtPpj76KCB8l9SrSJ1G8zXK-d7ElK4ClL1v0DXtkA)
---
Peter -- Future Generations kicked off the 2022 US election season with a huge progressive congressional primary win in Texas! Last night Greg Casar won his TX-35 U.S. House race in a landslide victory against a favorite corporate democrat. The lesson? When we organize, we can win big! Greg Casar will be heading to Congress in November and will join our progressive members in the House to continue the fight for universal healthcare, a living wage, and worker's rights. Greg's devotion to his community was evident in the incredible grassroots campaign he and his team ran.**Listening to his victory speech it is clear that these wins don't always come easy. Labor, an army of volunteers, and a coalition of progressive organizations, like Future Generations, Justice Democrats and Working Families Party, all came together to make tens of thousands of calls and knock on doors late into the night.** As a young organization we want to continue to multiply our organizing and coalition-building efforts to help more candidates finish strong. **Will you help us grow our organizing efforts? Your contribution will go to equip our volunteers with****phone-banking tools, organizing software, and help us expand our recruiting and training operations across 11 states to meet the needs of our candidates.****Any amount helps.**
---
[ **Support Future Generations** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOKdrn31ztUqXS7qpyqZqmvDPUYdDmIo1ioq57wRMywl84rW_UGluVBXiwgGV6Y07U/3k0/bqW2VqJZQlyxzQL7LEY2ow/h1/ehaiWsZzv2sYrP3zES3R4iaglu4cvyYSQKiixsWiEVM)
---
Not every one of our races in Texas were won. Lorenzo Sanchez, running in Texas House District 70, missed the opportunity to represent his community and fight for voting and reproductive rights at the state legislature. In this crowded race, only 102 votes separated the top vote getter from Lorenzo, and 29 votes kept us from heading to the May runoff. We sent out over 5,000 texts and postcards but there is always the lingering feeling that we could've and should've done more for such an important race. **We cannot be here again.** Every single one of our candidates goes through a rigorous endorsement process and we know they will deliver for the people if we can get them elected. Please visit our website to learn more about the 22 amazing candidates running for City Council seats, state legislature, and US Congress whose work we support. **I hope you 'll be a part of our fight for the future because your partnership and support is what makes this work.** In solidarity, Roza Calderon **Executive Director, Future Generations **
---
[ **Support Future Generations** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOKdrn31ztUqXS7qpyqZqmvFlOdTebhS_YbAJcSZsOa4EP-ha72BcRABuGBxdk1gHC/3k0/bqW2VqJZQlyxzQL7LEY2ow/h2/I8WW-UHF4nhEws8jGx89YbMYys_V4DNkBoPH_ZDdhR8)

In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

name: CRITICAL RESPONSE TEAM (via VPP)
subject: President Biden needs to know…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Do you stand with the President?
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A)
---
Team: Republican attacks on President Biden’s State Of The Union address are starting to TANK public opinion of President Biden! **_NO!!!_**

**_So we’re coming to you with our most urgent petition yet!_** | [50,000 REAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: TELL REPUBLICANS YOU SEE THROUGH THEIR LIES AND _STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN_ »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?refcode=VPP_20220302_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A)
---
**FIRST:** President Biden saved our economy from the brink of collapse!

**THEN:** He put our country on the path to recovery from the deadliest pandemic in years!

**_NOW:_** _He’s leading on the global stage, standing up to Russian aggression, and averting disaster in Ukraine!_ **BUT REPUBLICANS ARE STILL LYING TO THE AMERICAN PEOPLE ABOUT HIS HISTORIC ACCOMPLISHMENTS!**

[That’s why we need 50,000 Democrats to have Joe Biden’s back NOW! Don’t wait: Sign to STAND with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?refcode=VPP_20220302_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A) | [50,000 REAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: TELL REPUBLICANS YOU SEE THROUGH THEIR LIES AND _STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN_ »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?refcode=VPP_20220302_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A)
---
**DEADLINE:_MIDNIGHT_ || GOAL: _50,000 SIGNATURES_**
Team, if Republicans are able to control the narrative in an election year, we’re finished:
**Our Democratic Majority?_DESTROYED!_
Our Democratic Agenda? _ERASED!_
Our democracy? _IN SHAMBLES!_**
They know that if we can’t deliver on President Biden’s agenda, **we’ll be POWERLESS to stop a Republican takeover of Congress this year.**

But as of late, we’ve seen a dizzying lack of support from Democrats we used to count as our **ELITE** supporters. **__Why did you abandon us?__**

All of our bad fortune can be reversed in an instant if **50,000 Democrats sign** our petition to stand behind President Biden **by MIDNIGHT tonight.**
[ YOUR PRESIDENT NEEDS YOU: SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION RIGHT NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?refcode=VPP_20220302_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A)
[50,000 REAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: TELL REPUBLICANS YOU SEE THROUGH THEIR LIES AND _STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN_ »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?refcode=VPP_20220302_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A)
---
Thank you,

_\--VPP_

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1414%2E878179%2EwBdm6A) to request fewer emails. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: What a difference two years makes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
It was refreshing to once again see a president address the nation and talk about our core values.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484769/333116215/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=16ea52b4-6d9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=TLDOPkl2HHjtotNGPDcnzEIJOgDHuWBg9F0/HgEalU+h9ZI2SrEf/g7ECBDPWZW1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNTJiNC02ZDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8pjeso-FCFGHd5TDATydqPw1_vaoXmHJyPGBGk20au0=)
Team -
What a difference two years makes.
Joe Biden was sworn into office as a nation in disarray watched on, shocked by the attacks on our democracy, bruised by the COVID-19 pandemic and the ensuing economic harm.
Last night, America watched a President deliver a message that all Americans needed to hear: “This is not about division, it’s about unity.” “We’re going to be ok.” “We can do this.” And that this is “our moment to meet and overcome the challenges of our time.”
Putin’s unprovoked attack is a direct assault on so much that we took for granted – but the global response to this moment is a rallying cry to reclaim our common purpose and values – at home and abroad.
Yes, we must continue to fight to lower everyday costs for the things that matter most: health care, elder care, child care, drugs costs, and energy.
Yes, we must take on the opioid epidemic ravaging communities in Maryland and across the country.
Yes, we must have the courage to stand up to the gun lobby and end the tragic daily loss of life in our communities from the scourge of gun violence.
Yes, we must address the needs of families still struggling to make ends meet, even if it means reducing the giant profit margins of big corporate interests.
And yes, we must stand strong with our allies and the Ukrainian people in the face of the Kremlin’s assault against a peaceful neighbor.
The work before us is as consequential as ever – and our future, and our children’s future, will be shaped by the actions and decisions we take today — and for the next six years — but I cannot do it alone. I need you with me. So what do you say?
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign today? This is an FEC fundraising deadline month, so when it ends we’re legally required to report how much we raise.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484770/333116216/-149995803?refcode=em220302-1-a&refcode2=16ea52b4-6d9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=TLDOPkl2HHjtotNGPDcnzEIJOgDHuWBg9F0/HgEalU+h9ZI2SrEf/g7ECBDPWZW1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNTJiNC02ZDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8pjeso-FCFGHd5TDATydqPw1_vaoXmHJyPGBGk20au0=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42484771/333116217/-149995803?refcode=em220302-1-a&refcode2=16ea52b4-6d9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=TLDOPkl2HHjtotNGPDcnzEIJOgDHuWBg9F0/HgEalU+h9ZI2SrEf/g7ECBDPWZW1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNTJiNC02ZDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8pjeso-FCFGHd5TDATydqPw1_vaoXmHJyPGBGk20au0=)**
It was refreshing to once again see a president address the nation and talk about our core values. That’s what elections can achieve!
I’m so glad we are in this fight for progress together. Thank you for all that you do.
Onwards,
Chris

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/12ea52b4-6d9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/16ea52b4-6d9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmVhNTJiNC02ZDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8pjeso-FCFGHd5TDATydqPw1_vaoXmHJyPGBGk20au0=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Van=20Taylor?=
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Today I am announcing I will not continue my campaign to seek re-election to Congress.

About a year ago, I made a horrible mistake that has caused deep hurt and pain among those I love most in this world. I had an affair, it was wrong, and it was the greatest failure of my life.

I want to apologize for the pain I have caused with my indiscretion, most of all to my wife Anne and our three daughters. For months, Anne and I have been working to repair the scars left by my actions. I am unworthy, but eternally thankful for her love and forgiveness. Now, over the last few days I have started those same conversations with my three daughters who are the light of my life and deserve so much better.

I know the hurt does not stop there. I have let down so many other family members, friends, colleagues, supporters, and the people of the 3rd Congressional District whom I have had the great honor and privilege to represent. I am truly sorry, and I hope in time I can earn their forgiveness.

I appreciate your understanding that this is a personal matter between me and my family.

I have talked with Keith Self to let him know of my decision, and I wish him the best as he seeks to become the next congressman for this district.

Sincerely,
Van Taylor

---
| | Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
---

name: =?utf-8?b?QW50aG9ueSwgROKAmUFycmlnbyBmb3IgQ29uZ3Jlc3M=?=
subject: A look at the critical month ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8PuhCs_Otwo-3BrEVMPQjtA/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h0/HhtqgTPcVI11uzpgos1b-24qRU71zNmfPsF98f_X1C4)
---
Hey Peter Willis — Anthony here, Melanie’s campaign manager.
With less than four months until the primary, March is going to be the most critical month of this campaign so far. I wanted to lay out what’s in store over the next few weeks, and **[why we’ll need your support more than ever](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8EcCTFelUlBM_jo6gO7QEAg/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h1/nXDwguJWBm0uyqNWcfYh_TSnB6aXGAg3zL13lx-ta88)**.
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8To8C8Bw9eGE4dSUFOH5fUw/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h2/2VKdUvf_JRmhs4pMQQ68K_AJxZffOwzWTEz_mowEnzY)
---
**First and foremost** , we’re spending almost every spare moment getting out into the communities of NY-03. From Long Island to Queens to the Bronx to Westchester, we’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and having real conversations with voters. We're making sure every person in NY-03 knows that they have the power to break the status quo and elect a true champion for working families in the June 28 primary.
**[If you can join us for canvassing, door-knocking, or a phone bank, sign up to volunteer here and we’ll get in touch](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm2aubZsOG1Rmd5t9zAQxlPRFJlX3s97m2lGmWDEJruhR-5VB5zwIxsphZt4emNHRE/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h3/JuJfC9w8si8Z-dfTIvK-hECAyAYRY2kIq_TvBEH0NT8).** No commitment is too small — even just a couple hours on a Saturday can make a big difference.
[Volunteer](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm2aubZsOG1Rmd5t9zAQxlPRFJlX3s97m2lGmWDEJruhZzN3Ic72zmQYJRGXmmivao/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h4/pRNyykNyD-NZSuX44uxBcSnq5iJ5fNlX_VfgSEz1g9s)
---
**But that’s not all** — March 31 marks the end of this year’s first financial quarter. As the last full quarter before the primaries, _I cannot emphasize enough how absolutely crucial this fundraising deadline is_. Quarterly filings are how outside observers gauge the strength of our campaign against our competitors, based on things like total dollars raised, number of grassroots donors, average donation amount, and other metrics. We must do everything we can to ensure that we capture the full strength of Melanie’s grassroots support by the end of March.
There’s a lot going on this month, and it’s all hugely important to the success of our campaign for working families. **[We’ll need your help to do it all — so can you make a donation of any amount TODAY to help us start the month off strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8wDohu2o7qjU0DWIJWEAk6g/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h5/Vplqz8DQMxqHEl7gw3_pjaZpYTOoEBbgMm-0_8oGB7E)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| [Donate $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8M4BFkkIsjVy8eIvemoYH_bD6CUCMqz4n7VPfaxMZpHKbHIfXiLmR7MtiREQpSvNE/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h6/BEOE8S93H_ZwlaOPDcK_Z2-i9BBaow8m_Ap__NRkkDg)

---
| [Donate $50](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8SLm-MHzM35iE6dAnqvVR9thMRdL-cDpVqsc-cd2MtiCV1koNf70NmUfw29CicFf8/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h8/Kbnl0H8c4wCSXguFK6X4TTKqrwa6Rk6g__KiwOdKiIU)

| [Other Amount](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8bDJVoh-3OQkAUk2Cud3NwD4e6scxLIEunW1G2Fn--CY/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h9/e8cG977gg43WUd9y2Uxnl7ZGfaLqDQmxsE1NME4aB10)

Thanks,
Anthony Pavone
Campaign Manager

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. **[Chip in $10 or more to our campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6HglOXxZZ_F3VVrv8RsfNJ8NshxBs1GAkrvNsD1xBIDJhp2lArWEPFGv2WfhjjB1JI/3k0/vmThfNlLT2C3IMzf37QVEA/h10/LqX-d-OrsCs_UhRHtRPvrnpbDZOPO4lpkwv73pZy2hE)**

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: NEWSWEEK: Biden's War on Affordable Energy
body:
| |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0394b5fc13f84d00a2b45dee10cb62c3&_e=uiw1JgczfetrRdUYKEvRg7cx48BsUYZwK1CDXt84qGUKnNcAnp6rYqj_eAo9prBphif7HOAzaHtWpb1itTiPr_Zn-AtfK2vslWcj1oHe3f2nxIaUNIJ9oEPl-bje0doTRnbxKoAUTrseyQ6S2zT5uChK5JACZdGmahYQDZwoxWORIUnetB2Tey4mzHP_9Z-1tdMVh0kcioUhGcT5PebWo4626a127rDKnb2bb1HguU9E39IYxX4K18jkwtKhVHIHLc_RkZa0Q79T7gvr3zGAmg%3D%3D)
**Biden's War on Affordable Energy**
By Bobby Jindal
President Joe Biden's spokeswoman defends rising gasoline costs as the cost Americans must pay for standing up for our values. It is a neat trick to cite Russian sanctions for price increases that predate the sanctions. Democrats blame Russian strongman Vladimir Putin for Hillary Clinton's loss in 2016 and record-breaking inflation rates, but Hillary was a flawed candidate and Biden has long been waging war on affordable energy.

Biden's first actions as president included re-entering the Paris Climate Accord, canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline, halting a leasing program in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge (ANWR), issuing a 60-day halt on new oil and gas leases and drilling permits on federal lands and waters (which account for nearly 25% of U.S. production), directing federal agencies to eliminate fossil fuel "subsidies," imposing tougher regulations on oil and gas methane emissions (which were first promulgated under President Barack Obama and had been eased under President Donald Trump), and hiring SEC regulators to prepare climate and ESG disclosure mandates.

The Keystone pipeline's cancelation denies America cheaper and environmentally safer access to Canadian oil for Gulf Coast refineries. Biden's other policies will do even more damage, make America weaker and more dependent on foreign countries, and drive up energy prices. Even New Mexico's Democratic governor criticized Biden's suspension of oil and gas leases, asked for an exemption to protect her economy and education funding, and argued that shifting production elsewhere would increase carbon emissions.

Biden's Interior Department has proposed policies to increase the cost of domestically produced energy. Secretary Debra Haaland has recommended that we hike the federal royalty rate for oil and gas drilling on federal lands, consider raising the bond payments companies must set aside for future cleanups, and focus leasing in areas close to existing oil and gas infrastructure. House Democrats would like to go even further and ban drilling in ANWR and along the Atlantic and Pacific coasts.
_Finish Reading _** [HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=0394b5fc13f84d00a2b45dee10cb62c3&_e=uiw1JgczfetrRdUYKEvRg7sbT5eiJCi5vJwIwmKgPAS4ymBkp0NAqW3tsccPNUovO8X7VQ62yKTWYhd8ECv5a1RiFuRazjUfbIsCrw4UfHqKtObsALtoDlpyAl6SznIhksQ6_UGTRUvA9VK5fEgKaWvuz-A8BTYzmGGkGgS4DB0UHApQTb_5wn-dq4UDa0E0X3rjWC7Tvs7nJ3O8ZPpwbyYwPE6dI9hnlsUchDtFWMngFSf5s82hiUB7pJF0miG9r-DoOV3pVaeOfWC5VQOP7G_ISIAcmog5JRppR6PQ3XLC8kPP_lSG37r3qSRKtAvf)**.

name: Peter Welch
subject: re: President Biden’s State of the Union speech
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
President Biden laid out his agenda last night. Are you with us?

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=121%2E61531%2EEI79mb)
Hello,
In his State of the Union address last night, President Biden gave a unifying speech laying out his agenda to deliver for Americans.
We’ve faced unprecedented challenges over the past two years with the COVID-19 pandemic. We’ve made strides to get the country on a path to recovery, and I’m proud of the agenda the president laid out last night. I’m ready to get to work, continuing to build a stronger and safer Vermont and country.
[**TAKE ACTION NOW: Add your name to say you’re with President Biden and the agenda he laid out.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-biden-agenda?source=em_20220302_p_p_sotu&t=3&akid=121%2E61531%2EEI79mb)
We’ve seen what happens when we come together to get things done. I was proud to vote for both the American Rescue Plan and the much-needed Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill — legislation that helped ease some suffering. But there’s still much more work we need to do if we’re going to provide long-term relief for Vermonters and folks across the country.
That means Congress must act in order to help people who are still hurting. No one in America should have to ration insulin or miss a bill payment to afford life-saving medication. No one working full-time should be unable to find affordable housing. We must do more now.
When I listen to Vermonters, these are the issues that come up the most: lowering the price of prescription drugs, creating more affordable housing, and tackling the climate crisis. We know how to solve all these problems, we just need the political will to make it happen.
[**The agenda laid out by President Biden last night will help all of us. If you’re with us, add your name right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-support-biden-agenda?source=em_20220302_p_p_sotu&t=4&akid=121%2E61531%2EEI79mb)
I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, and am ready to roll up my sleeves to continue fighting for what’s right for Vermonters.
Together, we can get it done.
Thanks,
Peter

---

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Barrett Brigade weekly update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D621fb05608d5f679efbb0aab%26ss_email_id%3D621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2%26ss_campaign_name%3DBarrett%2BBrigade%2Bweekly%2Bupdate%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-02T21%253A45%253A47Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=dTyluIo8v47_ZW9eKADu9SGeZ9Y%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Named NRCC “Young Gun”**
The National Republican Campaign Committee announced that I am a “Young Gun” for the 2022 election cycle, affirming the importance of my race to winning the Republican majority. Led by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, the NRCC identifies top tier Republican candidates running in battleground seats across the country, equipping them with the tools needed to win on Election Day.The NRCC knows that all roads to a Republican majority run through Michigan’s 7th District, and I am excited to work with them to deliver results to the people of Michigan.[See the post and share.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F398236452110767&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=R4f8s83qJYoktDGQotPjyB696TY%3D)
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F398236452110767%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=o6jaaE7bh-2fm64yuQjhTpALDns%3D)
---
#### **Unleash American Energy**
Last week, Vladimir Putin and Russia’s military invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine. Sadly, their generation’s long history of suffering continues and it is imperative that we stand with our partners by exemplifying American strength.Democrat politicians like Elissa Slotkin have made America weaker on the global stage. They handcuffed America’s energy sector by shutting down the Keystone XL and Line 5 pipelines - while allowing Russia to expand and develop their own pipeline. The world is safer when we put American interests first. We need to end our reliance on fossil fuels from foreign adversaries and unleash the power of American energy. See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F398373665430379&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=Zp58N6JQD2lLPOkFTzMIW_YcZjs%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=621fe5690289dd49d30b81b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F398373665430379&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=Zp58N6JQD2lLPOkFTzMIW_YcZjs%3D)
---
#### **Help Get Tom on the Ballot!**
Michigan requires congressional candidates get 1,000 petition signatures from registered voters in the new 7th District in order to get on the ballot.**We need your help!** We are approaching our final month to gather signatures and we need you to help us meet our goal! Email [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) if you are interested in collecting signatures for the Barrett Brigade.
---
---
|
---

name: Michele Rayner
subject: I’m thrilled to receive EMILY’s List’s endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida
body:
Peter, I’m thrilled to share this exciting development with you:

EMILY’s List — the nation’s leading organization dedicated to electing pro-choice women to office across the country — has endorsed of my campaign for Congress!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_rayner_q12022_df [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_rayner_q12022_df]

For decades, EMILY’s List has put their power behind strong, pro-choice women candidates up and down the ballot. It is a great honor to be supported by EMILY’s List, especially at such a critical time for reproductive rights in our country.

While our campaign is gaining support from Democratic leaders like EMILY’s List, GOP forces are taking note and gearing up to pour millions of dollars into our district. Support is crucial to our success, Peter: Can I count on you to chip in $3 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_rayner_q12022_df?]

** MARCH DIGITAL FUNDRAISING GOAL: $20,000 **
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Emily Fernandez, Field Director Kara Hahn for Congress
subject: Thank you, now we need volunteers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485579/333119986/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=)

Hi Team,

I just spoke with the team about our February numbers. Thanks to your support, we have an excellent foundation for the big things we need to get done in the field during this critical month ahead of us.

Now there's another way you can help out: We need volunteers!

We need people who care about our communities to join us and gather signatures so we can get Kara on the ballot.

**[If you live in the district, or nearby, can you sign up to help gather signatures to get Kara on the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485580/333119987/614522842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=&emci=afcf6e86-4b9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fcda2f54-729a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)** [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485581/333119988/614522842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=&emci=afcf6e86-4b9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fcda2f54-729a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896) Don't live in the district? No worries. There is another way you can help our field program.

**[Can you pitch in to power our drive to gather signatures and get Kara on the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485582/333119989/189849860?refcode=em22_220302_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485583/333119990/189849860?refcode=em22_220302_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=) As Kara's field director, I believe that connecting with our neighbors and informing them about the Kara we know and love is where we win. Building community ties with our neighbors is how we generate the grassroots support we'll need at the polls. It's where we'll show the people of Long Island and New York's 1st district we're ready to flip it blue.

Looking forward to seeing you soon!

Emily Fernandez
Field Director
Kara Hahn for Congress

P.S. -- We're officially opening our office headquarters this Sunday, March 6 at 11:00 AM, and we'd love for you to be there. It's a great chance to meet Kara, as well as our amazing staff and volunteers. **[Click here to learn more and RSVP →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485584/333119991/215940308?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=&emci=afcf6e86-4b9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fcda2f54-729a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369896)**

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485585/333119992/189849860?refcode=em22_220302_eomty&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485586/333119993/189849860?refcode=em22_220302_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RhMmY1NC03MjlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZUXxq-LgQk-26uzysnl7WUjEZMWyts5SaxVgTJhTws=)

subject: Bill McSwain: Heroin Injection Sites are a Threat to Pennsylvania
body:
McSwain applauded citizens who turned out to protest possible heroin injection sites in Philadelphia. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-heroin-injection-sites-are-a-threat-to-pennsylvania?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 2, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
|
# Bill McSwain: Heroin Injection Sites are a threat to Pennsylvania
_McSwain applauded citizens who turned out to protest possible injection sites in Philadelphia _ **West Chester, Pa.** **\--** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, released the following statement in support of a protest against heroin injection sites that took place in Philadelphia on Wednesday afternoon.

McSwain, who successfully stopped heroin injection sites from opening in Philadelphia as U.S. Attorney, emphasized the dangers that these illegal sites pose to their host cities and communities, and promised to never allow them as Governor.
---
|
> **_"Heroin injection sites are illegal, and there's nothing safe about them. Far from a public health resource, these sites contribute to the destruction of their host cities and worsen the opioid crisis by perpetuating and normalizing behavior that kills people. Heroin injection sites also lead to an increase in crime and promote an attitude of lawlessness, threatening the safety of law-abiding citizens who don't deserve to live in fear.
>
> I applaud the citizens who have made their voices heard - these sites are not welcome in Philadelphia. Nobody wants them in their neighborhood. As Governor, I will uphold law and order, ban these sites from operating anywhere in Pennsylvania, and do whatever it takes to ensure that our Commonwealth never becomes a haven for state-sponsored illegal activity."_**
---
|
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=4b77402b03&e=b1ec95759b)
###

---

subject: NIH Says COVID Exacerbated Preexisting Resentment against Racial/Ethnic Minorities
body:
COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities, according to a government study conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s medical research agency.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 02, 2022
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmloLWNvdmlkLW1pbm9yaXRpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

# [NIH Says COVID Exacerbated Preexisting Resentment against Racial/Ethnic Minorities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmloLWNvdmlkLW1pbm9yaXRpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities, according to a government study conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s medical research agency. Furthermore, the taxpayer-funded probe reveals that in comparison with whites all minorities “were more likely to report that people acted afraid of them because of suspected COVID-19 infection.” Limited English proficiency, less than a high school education and an annual income below $60,000 were also associated with experiencing increased discrimination, the study found.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26873&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmloLWNvdmlkLW1pbm9yaXRpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues Virginia Supreme Court Officials for Terminating Magistrate After She Made Public Comment about Wrongdoing Tied to Murder ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26874&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy12YS1zdXByZW1lLWNvdXJ0LW9mZmljaWFscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it filed a lawsuit on behalf of former Virginia Magistrate Elizabeth Fuller against officials in the Office of the Executive Secretary of Magistrate Services for firing Fuller in violation of her First and Fourteenth Amendment rights.

On October 19, 2021, Fuller was fired from her position as magistrate after commenting to the _Alexandria Times_ as part of a discussion about the publicly available outcome of her own 2020 complaint against a bondsman named Man Nguyen. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26874&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy12YS1zdXByZW1lLWNvdXJ0LW9mZmljaWFscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research for Judicial Watch, told The Epoch Times that it’s “highly improbable” that the USSS lost the records in question. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26875&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXRyYXZlbC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

### [How The Left’s Push For ‘Equity’ Is Destroying Equality ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58200&L=26858&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGVmdHMtcHVzaC1mb3ItZXF1aXR5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) The Federalist Setting all the math aside, policies like those implemented in California and throughout private companies are unjust and very likely illegal. At least that’s what Judicial Watch and the Free Enterprise Project of the National Center for Public Policy Research have concluded. Both groups have filed lawsuits exposing the laws for what they are — racist, sexist, and discriminatory on many fronts. clean_body: COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities, according to a government study conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s medical research agency. | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 02, 2022 ---|---|--- | | = = COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities, according to a government study conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s medical research agency. Furthermore, the taxpayer-funded probe reveals that in comparison with whites all minorities “were more likely to report that people acted afraid of them because of suspected COVID-19 infection.” Limited English proficiency, less than a high school education and an annual income below $60,000 were also associated with experiencing increased discrimination, the study found. = | | | == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it filed a lawsuit on behalf of former Virginia Magistrate Elizabeth Fuller against officials in the Office of the Executive Secretary of Magistrate Services for firing Fuller in violation of her First and Fourteenth Amendment rights. On October 19, 2021, Fuller was fired from her position as magistrate after commenting to the Alexandria Times as part of a discussion about the publicly available outcome of her own 2020 complaint against a bondsman named Man Nguyen. == The Epoch Times The U.S. Secret Service (USSS) says it can’t locate years of records on communications regarding agents guarding Hunter Biden, the son of President Joe Biden. Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research for Judicial Watch, told The Epoch Times that it’s “highly improbable” that the USSS lost the records in question. The Federalist Setting all the math aside, policies like those implemented in California and throughout private companies are unjust and very likely illegal. At least that’s what Judicial Watch and the Free Enterprise Project of the National Center for Public Policy Research have concluded. Both groups have filed lawsuits exposing the laws for what they are — racist, sexist, and discriminatory on many fronts. | CLIPS = == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

name: Team Seth
subject: Rhode Island stands with Ukraine 🇺🇦⚓️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
"'We do not want the state of Rhode Island to be funding or supporting Putin’s illegal war in any respect,' General Treasurer Seth Magaziner said of his office’s aim to divest the state pension fund of Russian stocks and bonds."
---
Peter,

The message is clear: Rhode Island stands for democracy and freedom, and we stand with the people of Ukraine.

Today, Seth held an emergency meeting of the State Investment Commission to ask the members for the authority to pull the Rhode Island pension fund out of all Russian stocks and bonds. In a unanimous vote, the Commission agreed. Liquidating these investments will have little impact on the health of the pension plan, but will stand as a clear symbol that we will support our NATO allies and will not tolerate Putin’s senseless violence against innocent people.

Financial markets operate best when there is democracy and rule of law. Seth strongly supports severe economic sanctions against Russia and in Congress, will always stand for democracy and freedom.

[**Add your name if you support Seth's actions to ensure Rhode Island does its part to stand with Ukraine >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42485872/333121832/1664110259?ms=em22_220302_uk_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em22_220302_uk_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em22_220302_uk_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220302_uk_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=p44fNsctGaI7I6X/QSIIiWmFj+kknvZA99EdTpznGj80uyyWSEoDA8PoszGaG03nKPbL8E+sZRA2Fl+g3k4tTrkWAZFJ0OZWG0oEZYoOja3fwt5Vsu9FIh+unGi/EedBUeDaZGhLHwhgGgZHDC598hKTsAQEJrhbw36Fg07KFv8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWMxN2YxYy03NDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yi5f74PF9dddcF9-PNXBqfSlYjiQpayxS28ITQf1USs=&emci=5634498b-689a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fac17f1c-749a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)

body:

Peter, first off, let me say thank you for supporting our fundraising efforts in February. I knew I could count on you, as always. **In just over 8 months, North Carolinians will return to the polls.** In the face of so much uncertainty — a world beset by conflict, a climate crisis that is an existential threat to all of us — it might not seem that pressing to think about November now. _But it is._ Right-wing Republican leaders are willing to lie about the outcomes of elections and the actions of their twice-impeached leader when it’s politically necessary. They are willing to go to any lengths — including suppressing the vote — to hold onto power and enact a radical agenda that simply isn’t what most of us want for our state. **Peter, in November it’s up to us to defend democracy. But with GOP gerrymandering affecting Democratic chances here in North Carolina, Democrats need your support NOW, and for the next 8 months, to prevail.** **[Please, consider a monthly donation of $5, $10, or any amount that is right for you to power our work electing North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot. But with GOP gerrymandering affecting Democratic chances here in North Carolina, Democrats need your support NOW, and for the next 8 months, to prevail. = | = = = Thank you for joining with me in this work, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address.
