body:
__
This was my message to Joe Biden & the Democrats
**-- FROM THE DESK OF GOVERNOR KIM REYNOLDS --
43RD GOVERNOR OF IOWA**
Peter,

Just like you, last night I watched Joe Biden's failure of a speech.

I listened as the _Governor of a state_ , as a _mom_ , and as _grandmother_ of 11 who is worried our country is on the wrong track.

We are now one year into his presidency and instead of moving America forward, it feels like President Biden and his party had sent us back in time to the late 70s and early 80s.

_**When runaway inflation was hammering families. A violent crime was crashing our cities, and the Soviet army was trying to redraw the world map.**_

Even before taking the Oath of Office, the president told us he wanted to, "make America respected around the world again and to unite us here at home." _He has failed on both fronts._

Now, we are seeing _**an attack on democracy, freedom, and the rule of law.**_ Joe Biden is weakening our country on the world stage.

_**It is time for America once again to project confidence. It is time to be decisive. It is time to read it. But we can 't project strength abroad if we are weak at home.**_

Republicans may not have the White House, but we are doing what we can to fill the leadership vacuum. And on the issues that are affecting Americans, Republicans are leading.

We are standing up for parents and kids.

We are standing up for life.

We are keeping our communities safe.

We are fighting to restore America's energy independence and that includes biofuel.

We are getting people back to work, not paying them to stay home.

**_Most of all, we are respecting your freedoms._**

Peter, this is only the beginning. We are in an uphill battle against the Dem money machine. Our message resonates with the American people and the Left knows it.

[**If you could chip in just $5, or $10 today it would go a long way to help keep our momentum going. I 'm humbly asking for you to join my team today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5124bc653c4fe6ba8cbbbb3bb95b77&_e=GSS4Fwl4Q4UAYuvoAlO8dV7E37DTmEaRq3bEBFNMXWPOAx5AbfXJSkF1HC3KmVPZFVGARSEB1m7V3ARZQTK9oMOqyZ7huISYS4MSJunoa-EfI-TLeACx-N938qAC5YKLXSyI3_ctQqGP-V4ZGcpE6YXjTKYsmKNeiDN5CwS7JFYeSeqJy5Cja7ioL4sPERStuxyoQ8dLYgTN-xa-UfrSxECiQQZUUE-YmpWKKvm54xx6U1UYY3GNu4IR3gvhT4g8yPRYsqEFuKMQJCgODB2VMXhYCK1lXwgf2cFuii-4HJJFZ7ImJhQ_aFPTjcB7h2Lnrb9568BrcQj4UV_K3P262xtZFO3XzA_yNzYW1fr9GZYJSlES3hLwxQBgfMk1bA3f66eSRss4vRfMvEWBmfL9v2MobBt5tDKpEilYXyeJekX34AuG5yRwMoSPkEQE8r2aDJqqKa9OXDmhQqM2eqauZIlE1d9IuNPkf-G8dKgHoIA4abR0efetXdgrywokbmSyRNeRTjddBgnpPfXksHJrbtmMei-LBujkkzgHuYkOutgohEBwGyR-UagfJkBLIFwY6pRWAZKwU9GpLI2_axXkew%3D%3D)

**[DONATE TODAY](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5124bc653c4fe6ba8cbbbb3bb95b77&_e=GSS4Fwl4Q4UAYuvoAlO8dV7E37DTmEaRq3bEBFNMXWPOAx5AbfXJSkF1HC3KmVPZFVGARSEB1m7V3ARZQTK9oMOqyZ7huISYS4MSJunoa-GbPVN3c5K3YqiwjyHIE-Z2Py4-4rBtRd015Yjphn5QzUuAk9lp5pWv7GAq4ww5Vt70u-yhCy33g3sBMgP2G5oMcKx-5IAQm7M4QeX9fSSOxUDoR5PitxdCQi7OMtPvBtfGti7vinX4zckWmvn-HrPRcFNqi6jPnAtoVzOqquujBsilv8ztBQMgfLvjTbfRvTUGdCOCcNjdjRuSGNeMpuk2pH97y5axnpph4ZijAKsSrbpTSD46iYya41Vw4QhvcKtrFgpjN1Jso49bI86_UNvP7eck6fEH_JNh_c2SvPGr8PtdTTB3d0WoIOg_Tka6YPDXC6d6FjgJjcWZLN6RwSWfFLaVZXzrfJOrjWLib_MCas_kC2yHIs9-gvcfMjOW8b56FU3SIRIN77Vg10CzKBFS3ifrRzhhGmjmTPnzLCneXLd1ARoNYgzPn1MMHk26DtqYTmfnHysACKQMsgkdy9cR1q6eUq42vAVW_QE0vWjxXg%3D%3D)**

You have shown that the soul of America is not about who lives in the White House.

It is men and women like you in every corner of this nation who are willing to step up and take responsibility for your community, for your neighbors, and ultimately, for yourself.

Thank you. God bless you. And God bless the United States of America.

Governor Kim Reynolds

* * *
_**A Personal Message from Governor Kim Reynolds**_ [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=df5124bc653c4fe6ba8cbbbb3bb95b77&_e=GSS4Fwl4Q4UAYuvoAlO8dV7E37DTmEaRq3bEBFNMXWPOAx5AbfXJSkF1HC3KmVPZFVGARSEB1m7V3ARZQTK9oMejigZ608u93VcaGCoz6GaG3kJ2fdRAT7mea8XhT9-yBNvAUBxzYiKY5E6bxGRhXPeyzsp8Y1573H-rRPDM_1CPDqpWudVb6P-KiynkAZdagslkLHZwmW8T7-X14_nB1wXm2B9MT9wWASGS1i4PrQjFvp4DJ42dg_KSG4l8N7Z6XkHzUMWAaZqQRsvHlf6dWG7sN3NE5kLjlQkn_FF6Ox9m_NJVtbVEarfkMvyphqSQr7dUFLsWgs3rmlsvwgoyu4boV326jjWEh5jLpPo5igaEuP77iDnyb-VlrefryVqxHKN9O2wFTDxT2M8n3yvBYe3etJcimpUoRayFVXrag_sM0qWXnVfGUubBb550I68qFFW1PNdI-LLJH3EENEZjHnIUZGusNjjcsvotKxdo2mVUFBRUDtMyg2P_ATgTM7LTl4lROvZkfn8iLN5nh7TCBa2d4R_MMJo0rTT8ylww5zbtMfGcGvCf4tsGeMm0EwpQCZNvhHf5Netjn3b4J7_4sQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Election integrity was listed as the #1 issue of concern among conservatives in CPAC’s straw poll...

_And I would wager to say that sentiment is shared by grassroots Wisconsinites like YOU._
---
But to prove just how vital of an issue this is here in Wisconsin, I’ve commissioned a brand-new survey of my own.

**[Please take just 30 seconds to complete my “Official Survey: Grassroots Priority #1” to let me know if you agree that election integrity ought to be our TOP concern for 2022.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=7b08270c192f4fc7889bacd061af03df&_e=AWmsQchcP8tt5thykU-Go5VCK4GidPVcPSrUG7pQTazQn38GjBYAgF7epUb5cpcjiQndIWAwNiJO1d6ki4ncSBkGhCEk3quWYoQlcBaOWkq0nClArr9pAjT5IFbRuzK1MR8hAVcNmPzq5pcCGqBExvbmxI-uS7TCDxj6XLhtjB6mFyqw_aqxgQOom-yCQItXHlou03M7AggfDM8rkpPLgxU64AGaHtCDLg_NafP5-mgk2s3lZz48tIoaiwmFEpg5x17NRXMdS6_5qMpynZsMi0jKXZnS9mxyXilkVxqUlPYOeVJx2spYtLJkoG7IIYPW_1kUlhOjXJDS4UEsbFSK9l_tnZ0YfUqL9ynoJGV7U2l4mTLUwzjoEAha5xB4Th2tdb2Q9L3HhlXKAb29Zt2erfcKNNmSjFv5PiqJrZU0jegad9k9sci1x-ejLAF2zgdoPDakiTBXH3wEoxqM3vpZcDWBXrxXQv1Cqm-uHDgN4P94SdAkiRlFv_DuxKtf41o_WRb71FsvriTq1nzUL3EEOQ%3D%3D)**

---
There’s no sugarcoating it Friend, 2020 severely eroded the American people’s trust in our elections – and those valid concerns deserve action, not just words.
---
That’s why I SUED the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) for their unlawful guidance in the 2020 election.
---
_And even though the highest court of our state REFUSED to uphold the law and take our case against the WEC, I promised you that I would never stop fighting for what’s right._
---
**_Which is why I announced my plans for a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice to ensure YOUR vote counts. _**
---
Time and again on the campaign trail, voters tell me how deeply concerned they are about election integrity after 2020.
---
But now, I need grassroots conservatives like you to take my survey and help me PROVE that election integrity MUST be our primary focus of this historic election year.
---

clean_body: The most common answer I get... election integrity. | Friend, Election integrity was listed as the #1 issue of concern among conservatives in CPAC’s straw poll... And I would wager to say that sentiment is shared by grassroots Wisconsinites like YOU. But to prove just how vital of an issue this is here in Wisconsin, I’ve commissioned a brand-new survey of my own. There’s no sugarcoating it Friend, 2020 severely eroded the American people’s trust in our elections – and those valid concerns deserve action, not just words. That’s why I SUED the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) for their unlawful guidance in the 2020 election. And even though the highest court of our state REFUSED to uphold the law and take our case against the WEC, I promised you that I would never stop fighting for what’s right. Which is why I announced my plans for a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice to ensure YOUR vote counts. Time and again on the campaign trail, voters tell me how deeply concerned they are about election integrity after 2020. But now, I need grassroots conservatives like you to take my survey and help me PROVE that election integrity MUST be our primary focus of this historic election year. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
We are entering a brand new phase of this race.
#

Friend,
This week, Malcolm became the *first* candidate for United States Senate in Pennsylvania to submit the required number of petition signatures to get on the ballot for our May primary!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42486698/333125254/-358086307?refcode2=40bab73d-779a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220302-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGJhYjczZC03NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tuat-cI5FObFh0BXOevfER7YwnKgUbeeTfy7Vm2nH4=)
With Malcolm’s name officially on the ballot, we are entering a brand new phase of this race. That means all gas and no brakes until election day — and we’re counting on grassroots donations from emails like this one to keep up our momentum.
[Can you make a $3 donation to power Malcolm’s campaign to victory today? March is an FEC deadline month and we’ve got big goals to hit before we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42486699/333125255/-358086307?refcode2=40bab73d-779a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220302-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGJhYjczZC03NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tuat-cI5FObFh0BXOevfER7YwnKgUbeeTfy7Vm2nH4=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42486700/333125256/-358086307?refcode2=40bab73d-779a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220302-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGJhYjczZC03NzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tuat-cI5FObFh0BXOevfER7YwnKgUbeeTfy7Vm2nH4=)**
We launched this campaign with one goal in mind: To build a movement that strives for equity and justice for all, powered by working people.
And thanks to your support, we are on our way to making history by electing Malcolm Kenyatta. We’re so grateful to have you be a part of this.
Thank you,
Team Malcolm

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220302-2837-header&t=1&akid=2837%2E2526796%2EnBEB7W)
_Note: This email is from Jessica Cisneros who is running for Congress in Texas' 28th district to defeat Henry Cuellar, a "Democrat" who has voted with Trump 90% of the time._
This is big news!
The votes have been counted in Texas and because of the small margin — we’re headed to a runoff election against Henry Cuellar on May 24th.
This is a crucial moment, so we just set a goal to raise **$50,000 in the next 24 hours** to jump-start our campaign to defeat Cuellar in the runoff.
[I need you to step up right now to help me defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th in the runoff election. Please split a $3 contribution right now between my campaign and Alexandria’s movement fighting to elect a new wave of progressives – we need all hands on deck. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220302?refcode=em20220302-2837-P_FND_RES_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2837_2526796_nBEB7W&akid=2837%2E2526796%2EnBEB7W)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220302?refcode=em20220302-2837-P_FND_RES_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2837_2526796_nBEB7W&akid=2837%2E2526796%2EnBEB7W)**
This fight was about South Texans proving that our dreams could take on their corporate money and that a daughter of immigrants could bring working class leadership back to the community that raised her.
We proved just how powerful our movement is and are ready to keep fighting for the future we deserve. Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people.
We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but we need a major influx of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and the Koch Network. And remember, Henry Cuellar is under FBI investigation.
The people of South Texas deserve a representative who will fight for their interests every step of the way.
[Please split a contribution of any amount that you can afford to jump-start our fundraising for this runoff. Jessica Cisneros

clean_body: Note: This email is from Jessica Cisneros who is running for Congress in Texas' 28th district to defeat Henry Cuellar, a "Democrat" who has voted with Trump 90% of the time. This is big news! The votes have been counted in Texas and because of the small margin — we’re headed to a runoff election against Henry Cuellar on May 24th. This is a crucial moment, so we just set a goal to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours to jump-start our campaign to defeat Cuellar in the runoff. This fight was about South Texans proving that our dreams could take on their corporate money and that a daughter of immigrants could bring working class leadership back to the community that raised her. We proved just how powerful our movement is and are ready to keep fighting for the future we deserve. Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people. We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but we need a major influx of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and the Koch Network. body:
Is it “strong” like Biden claims?
| [](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=4f0ad3c994b345859d6d8ffbc4d727a2&_e=sM61ZvOl-WMFk3klxisPTdcLUp4_eY6WMY1F9DEmWd1gg-hlBG-fe-CGnbVfrOPj-s8zqmbqRQ4wtaP7rxsGMVzLFETJti7s5VNOnR1k42GcTRGc9q6hWgixDp1gRz-ZPr7tO0WPbZzQvV5F_ARxkfD6_PCWVPA38hyU3RlEoi7xPcgIv6PS80Pv0jlJmY5uSpyjXZnlytubvZhVCFB1do2gDx1pJMlmCffhwYqeVkvmSAN1CAf76ZeCMOcxKxpYj8ZFqBVSy1TxxDaEUXzLATlYGye31yfEao4nNKqDv-h2Q1qKFrMnHjYA7b0V8ctMWLKKaJW0NIp_6hXQ79IkrtBXs4_-o-2pgZ14Ljgb5Xm-qd6aISrzXC_OEgFGA0m_AIy3gLvJe6kiZB0jdJC3KwFbgm01Cv8qjBFbXMkBnF9lZip9ExqR0fUEcgsrCDZMpaFKRxOMJnYz679dOSEY6zbaAGxSbGMSuZakwxHaUAsAiYv9x22Vn_wC1c2nQHZq)
---
Peter,
---
During his State of the Union speech last night, Joe Biden called the state of our union “strong”.
---
Even as inflation spirals out of control, our border remains wide-open, and Russia invades Ukraine, he had the audacity to claim that America is better off after a year of his leadership.
---
_I want to get your input on the TRUE state of our union, and I also want to know what your biggest concerns are so I can continue to prioritize them in Congress._
---
[**Please take my State of the Union Poll today to tell me how you feel about the state of America under the Biden Administration.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=4f0ad3c994b345859d6d8ffbc4d727a2&_e=sM61ZvOl-WMFk3klxisPTdcLUp4_eY6WMY1F9DEmWd1gg-hlBG-fe-CGnbVfrOPj-s8zqmbqRQ4wtaP7rxsGMVzLFETJti7s5VNOnR1k42GcTRGc9q6hWgixDp1gRz-ZPr7tO0WPbZzQvV5F_ARxkfD6_PCWVPA38hyU3RlEoi7xPcgIv6PS80Pv0jlJmY5uSpyjXZnlytubvZhVCFB1do2gDx1pJMlmCffhwYqeVkvmSAN1CAf76ZeCMOcxKxpYj8ZFqBVSy1TxxDaEUXzLATlYGye31yfEao4nNKqDv-hRugZR82uGwjAs0HMPmfslMJuhgv-vGZYRycVsAzEWYURp757fktJKUHR0bwsT0jE9JirAjl55jIbSAlnCj3quPD84A2vD9TqcjKFL4seMyq5iHmALJHGhk0o_Qae9X6ZqqMQfq10UVH4QbBeCB-Ex7nGjKwb04_ABbpNlQV26Xg-3UtGllhaQ_0uYGkWRVTSZ_dIdO_tX2Znk19pe4p77)
---
**_Official State of the Union Poll_** **Respondent:** Peter **Response Status: Pending** **[TAKE THE POLL>>](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=4f0ad3c994b345859d6d8ffbc4d727a2&_e=sM61ZvOl-WMFk3klxisPTdcLUp4_eY6WMY1F9DEmWd1gg-hlBG-fe-CGnbVfrOPj-s8zqmbqRQ4wtaP7rxsGMVzLFETJti7s5VNOnR1k42GcTRGc9q6hWgixDp1gRz-ZPr7tO0WPbZzQvV5F_ARxkfD6_PCWVPA38hyU3RlEoi7xPcgIv6PS80Pv0jlJmY5uSpyjXZnlytubvZhVCFB1do2gDx1pJMlmCffhwYqeVkvmSAN1CAf76ZeCMOcxKxpYj8ZFqBVSy1TxxDaEUXzLATlYGye31yfEao4nNKqDv-j7FnNVZJezKw3iD4jHQy1JExKNPWg45WxSgICMM7_Hn29IdIMxWSUZcMG6zJuct6t-R29N4-ia5IXEALCnCz1PnHamtfMB3lF4sGiGUEPbuY1a3apykZMOZGzLflp8Rq7_gV_1oVB710bBhWybuNPdmpnaNjyxG1dq3zNHMCTIdsx8SPEtV5lr4qtwrbvp8tByEfhby7Wqs8ZYESyeRzyG)**
---
I saw Nancy Pelosi recently claimed Biden’s approval rating is tanking because Americans are “uninformed”.
---
**That kind of rhetoric makes me so angry, Peter. Americans are not “uninformed” about what’s going on in our country.**
---
_The Democrats’ policies are just wildly out of touch with the American people, and instead of accepting that, they try to talk down to us like they’re somehow smarter than we are._
---
Let’s show them we see right through Biden’s LIES and that their radical socialist agenda is dead in the water.
---
[**So please, take my State of the Union Poll today to tell me how you feel about the state of America under the Biden Administration.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=4f0ad3c994b345859d6d8ffbc4d727a2&_e=sM61ZvOl-WMFk3klxisPTdcLUp4_eY6WMY1F9DEmWd1gg-hlBG-fe-CGnbVfrOPj-s8zqmbqRQ4wtaP7rxsGMVzLFETJti7s5VNOnR1k42GcTRGc9q6hWgixDp1gRz-ZPr7tO0WPbZzQvV5F_ARxkfD6_PCWVPA38hyU3RlEoi7xPcgIv6PS80Pv0jlJmY5uSpyjXZnlytubvZhVCFB1do2gDx1pJMlmCffhwYqeVkvmSAN1CAf76ZeCMOcxKxpYj8ZFqBVSy1TxxDaEUXzLATlYGye31yfEao4nNKqDv-h-Y8RMfArP66U9ZIeA26XS2WnofRMB4BUNAVLHOUNmt4hjp5-2lMOgheO7-uR5UHfDW8bNPKOtjm1d9aqSN0ToPxNlRPRV_4IWtjj4J_JOrgMacpz3zqr6Meuho9Skai6fAY8pxkkd9nKuVUlI_4hFy_Ej4IsoSkjtK2KL2ffpLX4TCcc8hL1ZYhWJ6RJKThY9Vu-k3bRngdMga5Et5B7G)

Thank you,

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Voters across Pennsylvania saw this on CNN and MSNBC last night →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s keep this going.
#
Derek,
When voters across the Commonwealth tuned into CNN or MSNBC last night for President Biden’s first State of the Union address, they also saw their first TV ad from a Democratic candidate in 2022.
**That ad was OURS!**
Thanks to grassroots donors, we were able to air John’s very first TV ad, _No Place for Granted,_ as *thousands* of PA voters were paying attention. **They all heard the message that John has never, and will never, take any person or place for granted in Pennsylvania.**
People’s response to John’s message has been incredible so far, and we can’t let up now. So we’re coming directly to you to see if you can help us keep this going.
**[Will you make your first $5 donation right now to keep John’s ad on the air? We want as many Pennsylvanians as possible to see our first ad as possible, and we need your help to do that.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45030?refcode=em20220302-4810&t=1&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45030?refcode=em20220302-4810&t=2&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)
**[Keep Our Ad On The Air »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45030?amount=5&refcode=em20220302-4810&t=3&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)**
If you haven’t seen it yet, _No Place for Granted_ highlights John’s deep roots to Pennsylvania, his work as Mayor of Braddock and Lt. Governor, and his long record of fighting for people and communities that have been left behind.
And the fact that we were able to get this ad in front of people during _the State of the Freakin’ Union_ is proof that John is the *only* Democratic candidate with the resources + massive grassroots fundraising base needed to compete with the wealthy self-funders on the Republican side. **💪 💪 💪**
**But that’s exactly why we’re reaching out today.** Thanks to our GOP opponents like Dr. Oz pouring millions into the TV markets in PA, it’s not going to be cheap to keep our ad on people’s TV screens across key media markets. Every single dollar we raise is going to be crucial to helping our campaign and its message reach every single community in PA.
**[If you’re in a place to donate today, can you chip in $5 to help us keep John’s powerful ad on the air? Our goal is to advertise all the way until the May primary to reach as many voters as possible — and we can’t do it without you.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45030?refcode=em20220302-4810&t=4&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)**
Yesterday’s launch was a huge moment for this campaign, and it was 100% made possible by supporters like you. Anything you can pitch in today to keep our ad up means so much to me and our whole Fetterman HQ team. 🙏
More soon,
Team Fetterman
**[Keep Our Ad On The Air »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45030?amount=5&refcode=em20220302-4810&t=5&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220302-4810-footer&t=6&refcode2=4810_434096_NWqVpC&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=4810%2E434096%2ENWqVpC)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Do you receive LaMalfa’s newsletters?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487757/333130100/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=)
Friend,

Many of you get my opponent Doug LaMalfa's e-Newsletter, like the one he sent out yesterday. Some of you ask me what I have to say about them. That’s a fair question so, going forward, I'll be responding to them. If you don't get LaMalfa's e-Newsletter, well, consider yourself lucky -- sometimes they can be masterpieces of mediocrity

This month's Newsletter begins well. LaMalfa takes a strong stance in favor of supporting the Ukrainians in their conflict against Russia. Credit where credit is due! Yes: the Ukrainians are the good guys and the Russians are the bad guys.

**It's crazy that we need to compliment LaMalfa for this stance, but in the modern GOP this opposition to Putin’s Russia is not a given.** Doug LaMalfa claiming that he “told Biden to implement tough sanctions to deter Russia" reveals our congressman as the ineffectual, Monday-morning quarterback he is. He has never served in the military or read a book on strategic deterrence, and has no idea what he’s talking about. He’s just a chicken-hawk trying to look tough. He sounds like an old, overweight couch potato talking about the "right" football play to make.

I'm pretty sure President Biden doesn't need, or want, advice on Ukraine from someone like LaMalfa. The US will continue to provide lethal aid, logistics support, and intelligence, all while building an international coalition to destroy Russia's economy and force them to pull back their forces.

**Let’s not forget, LaMalfa voted against impeaching Donald Trump for blackmailing Ukraine to get dirt on Biden. After acquittal, Trump withheld $400 million in aid to Ukraine.** LaMalfa has plenty of criticism for Biden "not being tough enough" but conveniently forgets the pro-Putin placaters and authoritarian wannabes in the Republican Party and on Fox News. Fact: you don't support Ukraine if you’re afraid to criticize the Putin-appeasers on your own side. LaMalfa is using the Ukraine crisis as a weapon against Biden, just as Trump tried to use the Ukrainian justice system against Biden. The modern GOP is full of hypocrites like LaMalfa. They are not pro-Ukraine and they are not pro-democracy. They are anti-Biden. They have nothing to offer but criticism, even in a crisis.

**The email gets worse. LaMalfa pivots from talking about a war in Ukraine with dead bodies on the ground to waxing poetic about the anti-vax trucker "Freedom Convoy." **First off, LaMalfa has his convoys confused. The "Freedom Convoy" disbanded after only one day because only five trucks showed up. He is instead talking about the "People's Convoy," which is still puttering along towards DC as a puny parade of pick-ups and SUVs. Talk about lacking a sense of perspective! Ukrainian civilians are being killed by Russian artillery and Doug is hyping a convoy of complainers. It's sad.

LaMalfa then complains about Canada "attacking freedom of speech". In fact, Canada was remarkably tolerant of its anti-vax protest. Ultimately though, the Canadian truckers were arrested or cited after refusing to disperse. Civilized countries do not allow protesters to "occupy" major urban centers. This is true whether they are from the far-left as in Portland, or from the far right as in Ottawa.**LaMalfa seems to think that "free speech" means "my side gets to do whatever they want". That is not, in fact, how our right to free speech works.**

**LaMalfa also just can’t stop talking about mask mandates in school.** He never took a stand on the Shasta Board of Supervisors recall -- claiming it wasn't his place to step into local debates. Weird then that he seems so ready to criticize the masking decisions of our elected school boards. Maybe he just gets all his talking points from Fox and Fox didn't cover the Shasta recall? Either way, it's just another example of LaMalfa pandering to a base that terrifies him but being too scared to be a real leader in the district. The Army has a term for officers like this: it’s called “following from the front.” It’s not a compliment.

**[That's it for the LaMalfa newsletter recap. If you agree with my commentary and are ready to support my campaign to unseat Doug LaMalfa, please take a moment to chip in a donation to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487758/333130103/360059203?refcode=em-3.2.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=)** | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487759/333130104/360059203?refcode=em-3.2.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=)**
---

Thanks for hearing me out,

Max

P.S. Let's hope for a happy, rainy March and don't forget to **[visit my website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487760/333130107/2076808317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=&emci=7a62c19c-799a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ec1487d-7c9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11663292)** to sign up for lawn signs!
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487761/333130111/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=)
Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487762/333130115/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=)

If you'd like to receive less email, add your name [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42487763/333130118/379103408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=&emci=7a62c19c-799a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8ec1487d-7c9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11663292) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7a62c19c-799a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/8ec1487d-7c9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxNDg3ZC03YzlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuZcefgwWEsECvu9oQB2sgf6PxI_Hbd8_z2c5R7lhk4=&id=113269053).

Let’s not forget, LaMalfa voted against impeaching Donald Trump for blackmailing Ukraine to get dirt on Biden. After acquittal, Trump withheld $400 million in aid to Ukraine. LaMalfa has plenty of criticism for Biden "not being tough enough" but conveniently forgets the pro-Putin placaters and authoritarian wannabes in the Republican Party and on Fox News. Fact: you don't support Ukraine if you’re afraid to criticize the Putin-appeasers on your own side. LaMalfa is using the Ukraine crisis as a weapon against Biden, just as Trump tried to use the Ukrainian justice system against Biden. The modern GOP is full of hypocrites like LaMalfa. They are not pro-Ukraine and they are not pro-democracy. They are anti-Biden. They have nothing to offer but criticism, even in a crisis. The email gets worse. LaMalfa pivots from talking about a war in Ukraine with dead bodies on the ground to waxing poetic about the anti-vax trucker "Freedom Convoy." First off, LaMalfa has his convoys confused. The "Freedom Convoy" disbanded after only one day because only five trucks showed up. He is instead talking about the "People's Convoy," which is still puttering along towards DC as a puny parade of pick-ups and SUVs. Talk about lacking a sense of perspective! Ukrainian civilians are being killed by Russian artillery and Doug is hyping a convoy of complainers. It's sad. LaMalfa then complains about Canada "attacking freedom of speech". In fact, Canada was remarkably tolerant of its anti-vax protest. Ultimately though, the Canadian truckers were arrested or cited after refusing to disperse. Civilized countries do not allow protesters to "occupy" major urban centers. This is true whether they are from the far-left as in Portland, or from the far right as in Ottawa.LaMalfa seems to think that "free speech" means "my side gets to do whatever they want". That is not, in fact, how our right to free speech works. LaMalfa also just can’t stop talking about mask mandates in school. He never took a stand on the Shasta Board of Supervisors recall -- claiming it wasn't his place to step into local debates. Weird then that he seems so ready to criticize the masking decisions of our elected school boards. Maybe he just gets all his talking points from Fox and Fox didn't cover the Shasta recall? Either way, it's just another example of LaMalfa pandering to a base that terrifies him but being too scared to be a real leader in the district. The Army has a term for officers like this: it’s called “following from the front.” It’s not a compliment. = | = Thanks for hearing me out, Max P.S. Let's hope for a happy, rainy March and don't forget to to sign up for lawn signs! | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

I’ll be honest and let you know that I spent a lot of last night in complete and total disbelief while watching our Commander in Chief and Leader of t Peter, I’ll be honest and let you know that I spent a lot of last night in complete and total disbelief while watching our Commander in Chief and Leader of the Free World, President Joe Biden, address our nation – and let me note: it was an embarrassment to the entire country. Did you watch it? It got me thinking... Our taxes are up. We’re paying more at the pump. Our groceries are more expensive. We often feel less safe... And all of this I realized has happened under the Biden Administration.
So I have a quick question for you: [**Is your life**** _better_****or**** _worse_**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d9bb02dac0e41a9b642428f8027af1a&_e=RUhGU7cp6Ysi7uyOrjntxhfzBa9NcV70FPNB0DMWml1Yk_B4XoznRZLzDvnyzb8BXPn4KcoPBhLJuGP_8FP0URcImPi6Fzrm0g6CB9qeUTMOkbzynkxKIzsI8QodsxWyiI9f1TKX0d_6ID3xlilIo0S77itmW8ySw13JFt_gpFw7Nx_3dinbJXvoBijeMozdPRt7RvKEmwHNYEvAwcVw2sqCpOV2Hp9s5EXtgZIfF5M7FHFT5Qj0AbJMs3qfErjU0pCU6NuaEVQkxSCNAT-pFkuV-YwO1o2JhBjJJEc122m8aLXvkYS0g1_2ubP9nuwNSAsneuPRE-27JtEi_DSTRTJi_lS-coajek83n40LwsU6rnI1tlGmxAUW5ItXIpUgsl8hs4VUDi-w4rmj2-pv9V6SWBJGGt4pqR4_uxCCbG-mVICJ73gJ1dYP2hW3GUhbnWQWH6pHDke-yVXM0jOpmVq6qaCqXezLVVdcBeXglL4%3D)[**since Joe Biden took office? **](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d9bb02dac0e41a9b642428f8027af1a&_e=RUhGU7cp6Ysi7uyOrjntxhfzBa9NcV70FPNB0DMWml1Yk_B4XoznRZLzDvnyzb8BXPn4KcoPBhLJuGP_8FP0URcImPi6Fzrm0g6CB9qeUTMOkbzynkxKIzsI8QodsxWyiI9f1TKX0d_6ID3xlilIo0S77itmW8ySw13JFt_gpFw7Nx_3dinbJXvoBijeMozdPRt7RvKEmwHNYEvAwcVw2sqCpOV2Hp9s5EXtgZIfF5M7FHFT5Qj0AbJMs3qfErjU0pCU6NuaEVQkxSCNAT-pFhbcY5ljZ1ln-h-TqrMsZ7NFB2swN0C2mcIzF4jl1w9xY5Sffdi0PAG-PvecFrAznOhh1iRlMTGa6B3t2Yp-Dj4k2jEKIxrIB10Lz0gx7zS7XRDXh5tm_ylSdNJWPbAE7eP7BNkrYfiL0r5lauQLmrGYxxGmRbkTmkwInbwXWORX_mrUXSD6Uo268YPf-MiHLToimbgo2KoKevj0dpV_rhI%3D) [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d9bb02dac0e41a9b642428f8027af1a&_e=RUhGU7cp6Ysi7uyOrjntxhfzBa9NcV70FPNB0DMWml1Yk_B4XoznRZLzDvnyzb8BXPn4KcoPBhLJuGP_8FP0URcImPi6Fzrm0g6CB9qeUTMOkbzynkxKIzsI8QodsxWyiI9f1TKX0d_6ID3xlilIo0S77itmW8ySw13JFt_gpFw7Nx_3dinbJXvoBijeMozdPRt7RvKEmwHNYEvAwcVw2sqCpOV2Hp9s5EXtgZIfF5M7FHFT5Qj0AbJMs3qfErjU0pCU6NuaEVQkxSCNAT-pFiD7bHXXncGuFBdPT368YW-cvIe4Opr9whqEKnDBMvHRLE8QcPRvJcM7H0jrFNXws851cocVFgxp0-dd1gpACBA1Qh0sCCsJmSE_RfVzPl2uG9KFOimds6aIvUgAZOgJKW6USKM4fj_H67bjY16Ymz66w41A02T2fcRSvHQ4Rra58iXipn1vGz6HC62Yc4BLIhnhjAS3EEmyw8vaspJL3TY%3D) Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Susan Wild are a lethal combination for the nation.
These three continue to make our nation out to be a laughing stock with no solution for how to better it.
They’ve also ushered in the highest inflation rates AND gas prices we’ve seen in years with little regard to how they impact our families.
Not only that, but since President Biden took office, a mass exodus of illegal immigrants have been flooding to our borders knowing the Biden administration would let them walk straight into America. It’s sickening, Peter, and I’ve had enough of it.
While those three make a mockery of the United States, you can trust that I’ll stand up for our God-given rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Peter, take the survey quickly to let me know if you agree that President Biden is quickly deteriorating the state of our beautiful union.
Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. subject: MI-11 stands with Ukraine 💙💛

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42488581/333132625/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZmOGFlMi03ZDlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TzOiSiPYsO4mzDFSMjf-otWVuCM7adHtWFm126mZY8=)

| | Folks, Last week, I along with millions of others, watched in horror as Putin ordered the Russian military to invade Ukraine. My heart and prayers go out to all of the Ukrainian people who are victims to Putin’s authoritarian regime, to our Ukrainian-American population here in Michigan, and to the brave Russian civilians who protested their government’s unprovoked aggression. The world is going through a heavy and dark crisis right now, and as a member of Congress, I want to offer you my reassurances that the Russian government’s actions will not be tolerated. **I am closely monitoring the situation and fully support President Biden’s sanctions against Russia until the freedom of Ukrainains prevail.** I admire President Biden’s position on the world stage and his commitment towards holding Russia accountable. I appreciated hearing from President Biden during last night’s State of the Union address on the evolving situation and how we move forward. But for now, we must continue to stand in solidarity with Ukraine and condemn Russia’s breach of sovereignty. This past weekend, I attended a Stand with Ukraine rally in Warren to show the world that Michigan and the United States believe in peace, freedom, and democracy. A lot remains uncertain about what happens next, but rest assured accountability will be sought and freedom will win. – Haley Stevens

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Last week, I along with millions of others, watched in horror as Putin ordered the Russian military to invade Ukraine. My heart and prayers go out to all of the Ukrainian people who are victims to Putin’s authoritarian regime, to our Ukrainian-American population here in Michigan, and to the brave Russian civilians who protested their government’s unprovoked aggression. The world is going through a heavy and dark crisis right now, and as a member of Congress, I want to offer you my reassurances that the Russian government’s actions will not be tolerated. I am closely monitoring the situation and fully support President Biden’s sanctions against Russia until the freedom of Ukrainains prevail. I admire President Biden’s position on the world stage and his commitment towards holding Russia accountable. I appreciated hearing from President Biden during last night’s State of the Union address on the evolving situation and how we move forward. But for now, we must continue to stand in solidarity with Ukraine and condemn Russia’s breach of sovereignty. This past weekend, I attended a Stand with Ukraine rally in Warren to show the world that Michigan and the United States believe in peace, freedom, and democracy. A lot remains uncertain about what happens next, but rest assured accountability will be sought and freedom will win. – Haley Stevens | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, please click . | Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress | Haley Stevens for Congress 33717 Woodward Ave #539 Birmingham, MI 48009 mailto:info@haleystevensforcongress.com

Biden and his Democrat friends have done nothing but make America weaker from day one - but luckily, we have a chance to stop them before its too late. Peter, the only thing standing between Joe Biden and 330 million Americans is a Republican controlled Senate. We can be the wall that defends America from socialism \- but we can’t take it back without your help. name: Team Harper
subject: “They’re over it” - Morgan Harper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
“There’s a high level of voter frustration around this.”
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220302-739-footer-ak&t=2&akid=739%2E90090%2E3LpKmF)
Hey,
Again and again over the past few months, the filibuster has been used to kill critically needed legislation in the Senate. **[In the Senate, with no hesitation, Morgan will be a YES on getting rid of the filibuster. Chip in right now to help her get there »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29116?t=3&akid=739%2E90090%2E3LpKmF)**
The filibuster requires 60 votes to end debate and actually move to pass any legislation, otherwise the minority party can block a vote indefinitely. It’s not a procedural rule, it’s a tool to score political points and halt progress. **And it has already stalled important and popular legislation** , like protecting voting rights, codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law, and passing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
A handful of corporate-backed, “moderate” Democrats have come together to choose this outdated gridlock-creating rule instead of progress. CNN recently quoted Morgan on this issue:
**_"There's a high level of voter frustration around this. They're over it. They're frustrated. They showed up. They voted for change, for results."_**
She’s right – Ohioans are ready for a **Senator who will actually legislate.** Moderates and Republicans are pointing to this rule as an excuse to block voting rights, endanger our democracy, and prevent investments in our communities. That’s simply wrong.
And here’s the deal: Tim Ryan, Morgan’s opponent in the primary, has flip-flopped on key issues, like reproductive rights and guns. He’s even taken money from Joe Manchin’s PAC – while running ads attacking Manchin and saying he’ll stand up to him in the Senate. Tim Ryan says he’s against the filibuster now, but he changes his mind depending on the political winds. **Morgan is unbought – and she’ll stick to her convictions in the Senate.**

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: What we need to do for Jessica Cisneros right now
body:
We’ve been by Jessica’s side every step of the way while, for years, South Texans have been demanding change.
#
Peter,
Last night, Jessica Cisneros advanced to the next stage of the fight against anti-choice corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar. Because no one cleared the 50% threshold, Jessica and Cuellar will face off for a third time — in a runoff election on May 24.
**[We need to replenish Jessica’s campaign with grassroots contributions immediately so she can match Cuellar’s corporate fundraising. Can you split a $3 donation between Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats right now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97018?refcode=em20220302-22240&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97018?refcode=em20220302-22240&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU)**
We are so proud to have backed Jessica from the very beginning, back in 2019 when she decided to run for Congress. We’ve been by her side every step of the way while, for years, South Texans have been demanding change. Now, Jessica is ready to win the runoff against Cuellar.
Cuellar is the only anti-abortion Democrat left in the U.S. House. He takes millions in campaign contributions from Big Oil, private prisons, GOP mega-donors, corporate defense contractors, and anti-choice dark money groups. Defeating Cuellar would mean defeating all of these corporate special interests and the 17-year incumbent’s conservative politics with a vision of Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, canceling student debt, and so much more.
**We know Cuellar has plenty of deep-pocketed corporate donors, but Jessica needs to quickly fundraise for an expensive sprint to the May 24 runoff. It’s like we’re running a whole primary all over again.**
[Can you rush a $3 split donation to Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats right now? We have a real chance to defeat Cuellar and lift our movement to another victory.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97018?refcode=em20220302-22240&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97018?refcode=em20220302-22240&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement and keeping our work going.
In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220302-22240-footer&t=25&refcode2=22240_1203867_k-5suU&akid=22240%2E1203867%2Ek-5suU)**

name: Team Kelly
subject: [side note] can you help us on a side project by saying you endorse Mark Kelly today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’re looking for 15,000 people to say they endorse Mark’s campaign before the end of the week and we’re hoping you’ll add your name.
#

Friends —
I know we sent an urgent email about the FEC fundraising deadline this morning (and it is urgent), but we also have a side project we’re working on that we want to ask you to participate in.
We’re looking for 15,000 people to say they endorse Mark’s campaign before the end of the week and were hoping you’ll add your name.
Can you?
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-march/?source=em220302-2-3xo&refcode2=2251.6688874.nDF_RJ&t=1&akid=2251%2E6688874%2EnDF_RJ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-march/?source=em220302-2-3xo&refcode2=2251.6688874.nDF_RJ&t=2&akid=2251%2E6688874%2EnDF_RJ)**
There’s a thermometer on the landing page to track our progress. Help us get to 10,000 people today.
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2251%2E6688874%2EnDF_RJ).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Last night, Greg Casar declared victory in his primary for the U.S. House in TX-35, and Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff election in TX-28. The GOP and establishment Democrats love to tell our movement that Texas is too red, too conservative, and too deep in the South for a progressive to win. **Now, we’re proving them wrong — just like we will in Tennessee.** It's going to take all of us across the nation joining forces to stand up to the GOP and win another progressive seat in Congress. clean_body: It's going to take all of us across the nation joining forces to stand up to the GOP and win another progressive seat in Congress. | | | Peter, it’s official: Progressives are winning in Texas. Last night, Greg Casar declared victory in his primary for the U.S. House in TX-35, and Jessica Cisneros is headed to a runoff election in TX-28. The GOP and establishment Democrats love to tell our movement that Texas is too red, too conservative, and too deep in the South for a progressive to win. Now, we’re proving them wrong — just like we will in Tennessee. It's going to take all of us across the nation joining forces to stand up to the GOP and win another progressive seat in Congress. That's why I need your help. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: The GOP candidates who are running in the newly drawn Tennessee House districts do not represent the Nashville that I know. Between them all, we have Donald Trump defenders, QAnon loyalists, and folks who haven’t even lived a year in Tennessee. But with your help, Peter, we’re not going to let them win. These people don't understand the issues facing working class folks in Tennessee, or anywhere else in the country. And if I know anything about the progressive movement — it's that we can organize and win anywhere. Thanks for being with me, and for your dedication to the progressive movement. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Jena Tarantin
subject: Russian War - True Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
|
---
My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJMDJn5TROyKkAlvKkNC4aQTcJdRQTBbWLwgW0EFGsady79FeZyiNLJoz5tRP5_rS5CvD16ZZ12Jdq0BL3inXPqU0HjRHGw-OXBQYvZx9-IWC8dij9gRnZnoR8HEhj-cqyEDs2mvonCIaDyz6VSwZ3vDI7Iqw57zJlMuY3qRmmLTc07ii7GLFXCsSrqaUzn7-cLRuJhvnN2SMGgkTVqK_H28%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJLSb3vfexkM6myxKHBVJs2p7ZTJHFczdzMlt9NTrS_lufGoK0GeXsdXQiut50eWAAAFJxmB3AqY_eAf4bFA8XnzN7tXYmKVsnK7T9oFDw2YGw23WkOyZ_7-qgtsoSQ1bnQ8PW4vsxf07zwUCjOe_fVFqdQdi7tAl4uinzgcRBFMsSKo9ZdRzNCf3nSjh-K71aLH3Vd_kbJ_f-OgTLmL65I8%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJC_5Uz8sgA-3QYil28af3XrpuYOKkHjYDeNu6T-pe4oc-Fc0XFx4P7jO4gTAnDjD-rO4NJi1zL69IXapQ58k4rZfiTsMApwxqAFzky4E_boZhMbqF-9gE0YGvK1bepwlRFey4yje9oVcnhl2FcugnKpooI7diS6QCkI6Tuv4wtCZwwampcrHbNLxMa7TGtBbEC2JyWrSNqe4_AsGGKoPbd0%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJBbJha4kit9Fbi2rlFH2IcsJHW7OpEtxEzFJLhKApSfzv_beNkrVyJ9ZCnwYDx7wLqte0B5122HPrWPnT_MVoDrDXv77escEL23IUZJWpHKIF7q8F6riSxCex3IdwC1dH5Tejqx87KLgsaD_msfLMgCQ1CWV8rGR_rdFMKem_hxtb3zPObVV8Abqb6lJpZ6QLWF22jJHNC1Ed3ETbRNpeFo%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJM-Dzbv4mmCnXgjwQD-aYXWvjRjMtvmxGtaZbPuzJBUfSv3XTF2pobfc-Us5EjZfUJ_q8DwQ-v3J8z6q9pff20oNDD2T5YmyOxbP4elflVvCckyn2gS5Lo0RkShcgPlxRa7RmB3ueL1Mp9L0AB8SJ70dnuNPZKydBln6NvCul-k6SttFNj4DkcnaYaUYnkalRuN08e30iJwDIF0s2F-B32k%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=143688ddcccf49cd84595be830a188c8&_e=9LKBSWGH6yrBxBjro3kEsgIs6Ivc5VDZgfg8Gbz8HA-MCuKKG0ILUqmYHDft9mlCLaIxPMNDqBNDOEBOr5uoX4uQtZsnSZc92nWhVypxwv01TQ2DzQtJr_mm1hSImsXHek2vsYS7J-oXwLpf5Su1Wp5H6C3cu5DMoYq5qxO5EOtu1oc2_iRH-RuiRp0fZMjI0OoUYemzzeTDLerH8mpdwACnbSbtdsdAklzmteSR655dIj_4wWK5XCAsVCu0gg6Vthj2sQowl2oUWumzJHJVJM8NCHZY1Rz6MYDq3rXaSgS9Suj_7BzOHwd1jEvS_pW4XvyUmTspuhLNxccbe1M1qxnjQNzkPS4fwR03pT7RwSGl4f3d55ummJIgWtIcrVCBblpAVCyvAmAFwauCxDLkwWizR-YWiH4vRc5GOhalBy3Ao3pnntVvjDrrN74jQpon1ao9QF5F5Ljw-dUcAgybWITGe7v52sRHZQEPeAvrOJE%3D)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Mask Mandate Extended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A National Outlier](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooTdJBZ7Zu6mRpPGBrWIgv-CnTwBNux3CmgUyCVuzpG3Q&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar2_final&n=1) Newsom has extended the school mask mandate through March 11. Because why not give California kids a couple more weeks of pointless misery. Meanwhile, as CalMatters reports, all the obsessive new vaccine bills would make California “an outlier among states.” You can see the full list [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooq6LFc49fawJ3ZWvLC3J3V&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar2_final&n=2); as always, our state is leading in the very worst way. The good news is we’ve stopped several such bills already. I believe we can stop each and every one of them. In fact, this month we can restore a modicum of sanity at the Capitol. My agenda for March is simple: Repeal Prop. 47. Suspend the Gas Tax. End the Emergency. If you managed to watch the State of the Union last night, the need for new political leadership has never been so painfully clear. And it had a dreadfully familiar ring. I don’t know which is worse: that Newsom called California a “model for the nation” or that Biden seems to have believed him. He and his radical allies in Congress want to turn California from the outlier to the norm. We simply can’t let that happen. We cannot allow our country to go down the same disastrous path as California. This Monday was a record day with 806 citizen donations propelling us past our target. It is beyond uplifting to be joined by so many patriots who believe our state and country are worth fighting. [Help me fight the Biden/Newsom agenda](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar2_final&n=3) [Get your yard sign or bumper sticker](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltXq7hh_rRhphpTOU3CrlU4OUYRYsSRxBtxhIO3bZs38D&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar2_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar2_final&n=5).

subject: WOW, Peter.

body:
[1]Charles Booker

WOWi, Peter. This
has been a huge week for our campaign:

* Just this morning, our campaign staff voted unanimously to unionize 💪🏾

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ][IMG]

* And on Monday we received the endorsement of the LARGEST union in the
country 🔥

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ][IMG]

We’re so proud of the pro-worker movement we’re building. This is exactly
the kind of momentum we need to make our voices heard this election and
replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to
help us grow this momentum? Every dollar you give helps us contact more
voters across Kentucky and amplify our message for people-first change.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ]Contribute $5

Over the years, I’ve been proud to stand on the picket lines with
teachers, on the railroad tracks with coal miners, with workers at
Churchill Downs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ][IMG]

Together, we held the line for fair wages, the right to unionize, sick
days and paid family leave, and for a shot at bettering our children’s
future.

Because that’s what we do in Kentucky,
Peter. It’s part of who we are.
It was in our hills where the labor movement got its legs, and we’ve been
holding the line ever since.

The workers I’ve met are the very reason why I’m running this election to
replace Rand Paul. Recently, Rand introduced legislation that would
nationalize anti-union policies. Legislation that has proven to reduce
worker pay and put more money in the pockets of the rich. Together, we
must vote out politicians like Rand who are funded by companies that
benefit from his anti-union agenda.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220302?refcode=em20220302-1620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&refcode2=1620_346206_gxuRyE&akid=1620%2E346206%2EgxuRyE ]I know if we keep this momentum up we can deliver the changes workers
urgently need in our country. Will you make a $5 donation
right now and show your support for our pro-worker movement?

Let’s keep holding the line,

Charles

subject: Do you approve of President Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
